title: Product Owner
description:
Nova oportunidade para Product Owner em boa vista. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

A Dexian, lançada em 2023, tem presença global e traz consigo quase 30 anos de experiência através de suas companhias legadas, principalmente da combinação da DISYS e Signature Consultants. Iniciamos no Brasil 2007 como DISYS e, de lá para cá, conquistamos mais de 50 clientes de diferentes setores da economia. Como Dexian, passamos a ser uma das maiores empresas de contratação e solução de TI e estamos liderando a indústria por meio de entrega de serviços exclusivos que combina escala global, recursos de serviço completo e agilidade tática para modernizar modelos de contratação, avançar em soluções de mão‑de‑obra e transformar a infraestrutura tecnológica. Contamos com escritórios estrategicamente localizados em quatro grandes capitais: Curitiba (PR), Porto Alegre (RS), Rio de Janeiro (RJ) e São Paulo (SP). Assim, conseguimos nos manter próximos dos nossos clientes e consultores. Também somos uma Minority Owner Company e nos sentimos orgulhosos de ter nascido na diversidade. Na Dexian, valorizamos a diversidade. Esta oportunidade atenderá um importante grupo brasileiro do segmento industrial , com forte atuação nacional e foco contínuo em transformação digital, inovação e evolução de processos corporativos. O projeto está inserido em um contexto estratégico, com atuação próxima às áreas de negócio e tecnologia, envolvendo iniciativas que exigem visão de produto, organização de demandas, capacidade de priorização e condução de times em ambientes ágeis e corporativos complexos. O que esperar do seu dia a dia de trabalho Definir visão de produto e apoiar a construção de roadmap e planejamento de entregas Cria, detalhar e priorizar itens do Product Backlog garantindo alinhamento com os objetivos do negócio Traduzir necessidades e demandas em requisitos claros, estruturados e acionáveis para o time técnico Conduzir refinamentos de backlog, definição de critérios de aceite e acompanhamento das entregas Garantir organização, clareza e transparência das demandas junto às squads Apoiar a evolução contínua do produto através do acompanhamento de métricas, entregas e indicadores Atuar em ambientes ágeis, apoiando a fluidez e disciplina dos ritos Scrum Facilitar cerimônias como Sprint Planning, Daily, Sprint Review e Retrospectivas quando necessário Promover colaboração entre áreas e incentivar troca de conhecimento entre negócio e desenvolvimento O que você precisa ter Experiência consolidada atuando como Product Owner em ambientes ágeis Vivência prática com Scrum e atuação próxima a squads multidisciplinares Forte capacidade de priorização, organização e gestão de backlog Experiência na interface entre áreas de negócio e tecnologia Habilidade para conduzir alinhamentos com múltiplos stakeholders em ambientes corporativos complexos Experiência com escrita de user stories , refinamento funcional e definição de critérios de aceite Capacidade de apoiar a organização e fluidez dos ritos ágeis do time Será um destaque seu perfil com: Inglês avançado para interação em ambientes corporativos e alinhamentos com diferentes stakeholders Experiência prévia em projetos ou ambientes SAP Certificações ágeis como CSPO, PSPO, CSM ou similares Perfil colaborativo, com boa energia e facilidade para compartilhar conhecimento Capacidade de influenciar, engajar e gerar conexão entre áreas técnicas e de negócio Vivência em projetos de transformação digital e evolução de processos corporativos Perfil analítico, proativo e orientado à melhoria contínua Onde você vai trabalhar? Celebramos a troca, as relações e o poder do contato. Modelo de trabalho híbrido , com atuação em Curitiba/PR ou São Paulo/SP (Vila Leopoldina) . É necessário ter disponibilidade para atuação presencial de 3 a 4 vezes por semana em uma dessas localidades. Importante: embora a vaga possa aparecer como remota na plataforma, buscamos profissionais residentes na região ou com disponibilidade para mudança. #J-18808-Ljbffr

title: Video Editor
description:
Nova oportunidade para Video Editor em boa vista. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

A leading digital media and content production group with a large global presence. At EMP, we believe in the power of content to unite and inspire people. With our innovative approach and content-first mentality, we're redefining how content is consumed and shared. We help create content at the highest level including some of the biggest professional athlete led podcasts in the world. Like all winning teams, we value respect, creativity, and fun. We operate in a dynamic environment where collaboration drives ideation and where you will help shape the ever-growing media landscape as we know it. Here at EMP, we provide an opportunity for your voice to be heard and create a space where you can have fun in the process. We’re not just about work, rather we look to build a community that celebrates victories, learns from hardships, and grows as one. EMP is a place where your talent can shine while you make a real impact along the way. You Are... An experienced and driven video editor professional with experience producing quality video edits, ideally within the media, entertainment, or sports industry. You are passionate about growth, entrepreneurial in spirit, and able to work in collaboration with a team You Will... Edit audio and video for podcast, YouTube videos, advertisments, branded content, Social content and more to create high-quality, color corrected, synchronized video content. Ensure audio clarity, correct sync issues, and enhance sound quality with noise reduction, EQ, and other techniques. Add intro/outro music, sound effects, and transitions for a professional and polished final product. Select impactful or interesting moments from episodes to create shorter video clips for social media platforms (e.g., Instagram, YouTube, TikTok). Tailor clips for specific platform requirements (aspect ratios, length, captioning) and audience engagement. Add dynamic motion graphics, lower thirds, captions, and animations to enhance viewer experience. Create and integrate title cards, branding elements, and background visuals in alignment with the podcast’s visual identity Work closely with hosts, producers, and social media managers to align on styles, themes, key messages, and desired tone and more... Job Requirements You Have... The ability to speak advanced to fluent English Minimum 2-3 years of experience in video editing, preferably with podcast or interview-style content. Skills Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or similar video editing software; familiarity with audio software (e.g., Audacity, Adobe Audition) is a plus. Strong understanding of sound design, color correction, and high level motion graphics/animations. Excellent attention to detail and quality control in all aspects of editing. Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively with multiple teams. Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and meet deadlines. Demonstrated experience through a portfolio of video editing work. #J-18808-Ljbffr

title: Lab Systems Architect
description:
Empresa está contratando Lab Systems Architect em rio branco. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Syniti, part of Capgemini is the enterprise data partner, empowering anyone who relies on data to make business-critical decisions by delivering data they can trust through a unique combination of intelligent software and experts who deeply understand the role of data in enterprise growth. At Syniti, we tackle the hardest work in data for the world’s largest organizations. As the industry’s only pure-play data company, we combine our Data First strategy, intelligent software and team of 100% data-focused experts to turn complex data initiatives into quantifiable business success. Trusted by the Fortune 2000, Syniti helps leading businesses reconfigure the role of enterprise data from afterthought to foundational first step; enabling them to unlock valuable insights that ignite growth, reduce risk, and expand their competitive advantage. We’ve enabled more than 5,000 successful projects and we’re a trusted partner for global enterprises and organizations throughout their data journeys. Syniti’s Data First philosophy and enterprise data management platform supports data migration, data quality, data replication, data matching, master data management, analytics, data governance, and data strategy in a single, unified solution. THE ROLE The Lab Systems Architect plays a critical role in the success of Syniti’s Education Services department by designing, implementing, and maintaining technical lab environments that support both eLearning and instructor-led training. This role ensures the seamless operation of lab systems, supports integration with learning platforms, and collaborates cross-functionally to enhance system workflows and user experience. The ideal candidate is a technically skilled, detail-oriented problem solver with a passion for enabling learning through robust infrastructure. WHAT YOU WILL DO Learning Lab Architecture & Management Provide technical oversight for the design, testing, provisioning, and implementation of Learning Lab environments. Manage and maintain lab snapshots, resolving configuration defects as they arise. Optimize lab usage policies in collaboration with Education Coordinators and Leadership. Monitor VM usage reports and metrics, ensuring alignment with budget and demand. Support LMS system integrations as required. Serve as the primary escalation point for lab-related issues and liaise with solution providers to resolve complex problems across all learning lab platforms. System Administration & Support Allocate and reset user training accounts. Stay current with new feature releases across all education platforms. Provide on-call support for lab systems used in global training programs, including availability during evenings and weekends as needed. Regularly review help desk tickets to identify recurring issues, usage patterns, and knowledge gaps. Recommend targeted training, updated documentation, or additional support resources to proactively address common challenges and improve user experience. Train internal and partner instructors on lab systems. Cross-Functional Collaboration & Stakeholder Management Collaborate with Training Operations, Delivery Management, IT, and Application teams to improve workflows, system functionality, and user experience. Manage stakeholder expectations and requirements related to lab systems and processes. Identify and resolve cross-functional issues to ensure company-wide alignment on lab system needs. Reporting & Documentation Document system configurations, best practices, and technical procedures. Own and maintain the Education Services Revenue Report, providing monthly updates to Finance. Support the creation and maintenance of Education Services forms, lists, automations, and integrations, as required. WHAT IT TAKES Proficiency in SQL and at least one of the following databases: Oracle, MS SQL Server, IBM DB2, or MySQL. Experience managing hypervisor solutions and SaaS platform architecture. Knowledge of Microsoft Forms, Power Automate, Power BI, and SharePoint. Experience with Windows Server and Azure Active Directory. Understanding of the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC). Strong technical writing and documentation skills. Excellent communication, collaboration, and stakeholder management abilities. Knowledge of GraphQL queries and mutations (preferred). Self-starter with a proactive approach to problem-solving. Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment. Passion for education technology and continuous improvement. Be fully aligned to our core values: Think Big - Be courageous and bold. Aspire to greatness. Relentlessly pursue market innovation. Set the standard by which others follow. Create solutions that have a meaningful impact. Solve the challenges our customers don’t know they have. Be Curious - Be a lifelong learner. Seek out new ideas to serve customers. Understand our competition and the world. Be permanently dissatisfied with the status quo. Challenge preconceptions. Focus on the future rather than yesterday. Take Action - Be the first. Don’t wait. Take accountability. Inspire others by doing. Fail fast and learn from mistakes. Make a difference every day. Stronger Together - Respect, trust and look out for each other. Celebrate diverse perspectives. Listen. Build connections and belonging. Act with integrity. Give back. One Syniti family. WHAT WE OFFER Trust in your talent. At Syniti you will find a supportive environment and access to learning tools, but micromanagement is not our style. Growth . We are growing rapidly and steadily solving the biggest challenges enterprise companies are faced with today. There was never a better time to join and grow with us. Most importantly you will have the chance to shape our journey and share in our success story. Support . We all rely on each other and enable each other to be successful. You won’t stand alone. Curiosity and genuine interest in you . We all have our different stories, all equally fascinating with each depicting a different journey and we want to hear them all. Recognition . We are the sum of individual achievements and we always take the time to celebrate them. An open organisation . Titles don’t define access at Syniti. We stay humble regardless of where we sit in the organisation. We want to hear every voice, listen to all the ideas and make sure everyone’s work is seen and valued. Our Commitment to Inclusion At Syniti, we’re committed to creating a respectful, inclusive, and fair workplace where everyone belongs and thrives. We believe that diverse perspectives make us stronger — and we value the unique backgrounds, experiences, and voices each person brings to our team. We welcome applicants based on their skills and potential, and we’re dedicated to ensuring equal opportunities for all, regardless of personal background. If you need accommodations during the hiring process, please let us know — we’re here to support you. #J-18808-Ljbffr

title: Creative Video Editor - Dtc Brand
description:
Empresa está contratando Creative Video Editor - Dtc Brand em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Creative Video Editor - DTC Brand Location: Fully Remote (must be based in LATAM) Job Type: Full-Time Create scroll-stopping content for a scaling DTC brand. We need a performance-focused video editor who can turn raw footage into high-converting ads and social content – with creative freedom and direct feedback loops on what's working. About Uproot Clean Uproot Clean is a fast-growing, eco-friendly pet care brand expanding across major retailers like Walmart, Target, and Chewy. Our marketing team is scaling rapidly, and we're looking for a video editor who wants to grow their skills in performance marketing while building a long-term role with a mission-driven company. The Role You’ll be our go-to editor for short-form video content that drives sales—think Facebook/Instagram ads, TikTok content, and social clips. You’ll work with a steady flow of creator and product footage, turning it into thumb-stopping content that performs. This isn’t agency churn-and-burn; you’ll see what converts, iterate based on data, and refine your craft with real-time feedback. What You’ll Do Video Editing & Production Create high-performing Facebook/Instagram ad creatives and social media clips Edit short-form content optimized for platform-specific formats Source and organize B-roll and stock footage using the provided subscriptions Manage creator content in Frame.io and maintain organized asset libraries Graphic Design & Assets Design marketing images, thumbnails, and social graphics Create on-brand visual assets using Photoshop, Illustrator, or Canva Project Management Track assignments and status updates in ClickUp Follow naming conventions and file organization protocols Communicate proactively about timelines, blockers, and questions Requirements 3-5+ years of video editing experience, specializing in short-form content Expert-level Adobe Premiere Pro skills (required) Proven experience creating or editing Facebook/Instagram ads Mid-level proficiency with Photoshop, Illustrator, or Canva Strong fundamentals in typography, color theory, composition, and motion graphics Fluent English — excellent written and verbal communication Self-managed — strong time management and ability to meet daily/weekly deadlines Proactive communicator — asks questions early, flags issues before they become problems Portfolio required — you must submit a portfolio showcasing your video editing work. Applications without portfolios will not be considered. Nice to Have Background in DTC or e-commerce brands Experience with remote collaboration tools (Slack, ClickUp, Frame.io, Notion) Familiarity with performance marketing metrics and what makes ads convert Tech Requirements Computer: i7 processor (or equivalent) with 16GB RAM minimum Internet: 100 Mbps download speed minimum Schedule Monday-Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST (1-hour break) Required: Weekly team meeting on Thursdays at 10:00 AM EST Benefits & Perks Fully remote - work from anywhere in LATAM Paid time off Flex days. Enjoy an extra quarterly day off to unwind and recharge energies whenever you desire. Professional development - opportunities to learn and grow with the business Ready to Apply? If you love creating high-performing video content and have a portfolio that showcases your work, we want to see it. Apply now. Note: Applications without portfolio samples will not be reviewed. #J-18808-Ljbffr

Nossa jornada é trilhada por mais de 20 mil pessoas solares, espalhadas por 13 fábricas e 44 Centros de Distribuição, atendendo a aproximadamente 400 mil pontos de venda em uma área que representa 70% do Brasil. title: Analista De Dados Sênior
description:
Nova oportunidade para Analista De Dados Sênior em rio branco. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Você será a principal referência em dados para o time, garantindo qualidade, organização e clareza das informações utilizadas pelas áreas de Comercial, Marketing, Growth e IA. Estruturar e manter dashboards estratégicos e operacionais em Power BI e Metabase. Integrar novas fontes de dados ao data warehouse e às ferramentas de analytics. Garantir o uso adequado e a confiabilidade de ferramentas como Google Analytics. Escrever queries em SQL para exploração e análise de dados no Snowflake. description:
Nova oportunidade para Ai Benchmark Engineer (Planning/Operations) - 75063 em rio branco. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Based in San Francisco, California, Turing is the world’s leading research accelerator for frontier AI labs and a trusted partner for global enterprises deploying advanced AI systems. Turing supports customers in two ways: first, by accelerating frontier research with high-quality data, advanced training pipelines, plus top AI researchers who specialize in coding, reasoning, STEM, multilinguality, multimodality, and agents; and second, by applying that expertise to help enterprises transform AI from proof of concept into proprietary intelligence with systems that perform reliably, deliver measurable impact, and drive lasting results on the P&L Role Overview We are looking for AI Benchmark Engineers specializing in planning and operations to design and build complex, multi-agent benchmark tasks that simulate real-world planning, scheduling, and operational decision‑making scenarios. This role focuses on creating constraint‑rich problems that evaluate multi‑agent reasoning, decomposition, and optimization capabilities in realistic environments. What does day‑to‑day life look like? Design and develop multi‑agent benchmark tasks involving: Planning, scheduling, and resource allocation Operational decision‑making (project management, logistics, incident response, capacity planning) Create constraint‑rich problem statements with multiple interacting variables Develop verification scripts to evaluate: Feasibility (all constraints satisfied) Completeness (all requirements addressed) Optimality (efficient solutions) Build decomposition strategies: Split tasks across specialized sub‑agents (resource‑based, constraint‑based, conflict resolution, optimization) Model real‑world operational scenarios with dependencies, timelines, and resource constraints Collaborate on improving task quality, coverage, and evaluation rigor Requirements 5+ years of experience in operations, project management, logistics, or supply chain Strong ability to formalize constraints, dependencies, and scheduling logic Proficiency in Python for building verification and validation scripts Strong structured problem‑solving and decomposition skills Clear and precise technical writing skills Experience with AI coding benchmarks (e.g., SWE‑bench, Terminal‑bench) Hands‑on experience with Docker (Dockerfiles, image builds, debugging) Nice to have Experience with optimization techniques (linear programming, constraint satisfaction, scheduling algorithms) Background in operations research Experience with simulation or modeling tools Knowledge of AI planning systems or automated reasoning Perks of Freelancing With Turing Work in a fully remote environment. Opportunity to work on cutting‑edge AI projects with leading LLM companies. Commitments Required: 40 hours per week with overlap of 4 hours with PST. Engagement Type: Contractor assignment (no medical/paid leave) Duration of Contract: 4 weeks (adjustable based on engagement) Evaluation Process Take home assessment #J-18808-Ljbffr

Capacidade de diagnosticar e reparar avarias mecânicas e elétricas. Experiência anterior com manutenção de equipamentos de apoio em solo aeroportuário. Certificações adicionais em manutenção de motores a diesel ou sistemas hidráulicos. Familiaridade com as normas de segurança e regulamentos operacionais de aeroportos. Aspectos físicos Exigem-se coordenação motora ampla e fina, destreza, articulação dos membros superiores e dos inferiores, postura em bipedestação para desenvolvimento de suas atividades, rotação e flexão do tronco, esforço físico, locomoção e deambulação para realização de manutenções e atendimento de serviços emergenciais. Aspectos neuropsíquicos Exigem-se atenção, concentração, habilidade organizacional, criatividade, interpretação de desenhos técnicos, dados e iniciativa para solução de situações causais. dnata Brasil — faça parte do futuro da aviação. ✈️ É quase impossível você andar em um aeroporto no Brasil e não ver o logotipo da dnata . Somos um dos maiores hubs da dnata no mundo, atuando em 26 aeroportos , de norte a sul do país, e em mais de 140 aeroportos em todo o planeta. Sempre em terra, garantindo que cada atendimento aconteça com segurança, responsabilidade e excelência . Aqui, você fará parte de um time com mais de 6.000 profissionais da aviação , especialistas em assistência em solo , atuando desde o atendimento ao passageiro , passando pelo manuseio de bagagens, operações de rampa e chegando até o pushback da aeronave , para a aviação comercial e executiva. title: Lab Systems Architect
description:
Confira a vaga para Lab Systems Architect em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

THE ROLE The Lab Systems Architect plays a critical role in the success of Syniti’s Education Services department by designing, implementing, and maintaining technical lab environments that support both eLearning and instructor‑led training. This role ensures the seamless operation of lab systems, supports integration with learning platforms, and collaborates cross‑functionally to enhance system workflows and user experience. The ideal candidate is a technically skilled, detail‑oriented problem solver with a passion for enabling learning through robust infrastructure. WHAT YOU WILL DO Learning Lab Architecture & Management Provide technical oversight for the design, testing, provisioning, and implementation of Learning Lab environments. Manage and maintain lab snapshots, resolving configuration defects as they arise. Optimize lab usage policies in collaboration with Education Coordinators and Leadership. Monitor VM usage reports and metrics, ensuring alignment with budget and demand. Support LMS system integrations as required. Serve as the primary escalation point for lab‑related issues and liaise with solution providers to resolve complex problems across all learning lab platforms. System Administration & Support Allocate and reset user training accounts. Stay current with new feature releases across all education platforms. Provide on‑call support for lab systems used in global training programs, including availability during evenings and weekends as needed. Regularly review help desk tickets to identify recurring issues, usage patterns, and knowledge gaps. Recommend targeted training, updated documentation, or additional support resources to proactively address common challenges and improve user experience. Train internal and partner instructors on lab systems. Cross‑Functional Collaboration & Stakeholder Management Collaborate with Training Operations, Delivery Management, IT, and Application teams to improve workflows, system functionality, and user experience. Manage stakeholder expectations and requirements related to lab systems and processes. Identify and resolve cross‑functional issues to ensure company‑wide alignment on lab system needs. Reporting & Documentation Document system configurations, best practices, and technical procedures. Own and maintain the Education Services Revenue Report, providing monthly updates to Finance. Support the creation and maintenance of Education Services forms, lists, automations, and integrations, as required. WHAT IT TAKES Proficiency in SQL and at least one of the following databases: Oracle, MS SQL Server, IBM DB2, or MySQL. Experience managing hypervisor solutions and SaaS platform architecture. Knowledge of Microsoft Forms, Power Automate, Power BI, and SharePoint. Experience with Windows Server and Azure Active Directory. Understanding of the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC). Strong technical writing and documentation skills. Excellent communication, collaboration, and stakeholder management abilities. Knowledge of GraphQL queries and mutations (preferred). Self‑starter with a proactive approach to problem‑solving. Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast‑paced environment. Passion for education technology and continuous improvement. WHAT WE OFFER Trust in your talent. At Syniti you will find a supportive environment and access to learning tools, but micromanagement is not our style. Growth . We are growing rapidly and steadily solving the biggest challenges enterprise companies are faced with today. There was never a better time to join and grow with us. Most importantly you will have the chance to shape our journey and share in our success story. Support . We all rely on each other and enable each other to be successful. You won’t stand alone. Curiosity and genuine interest in you . We all have our different stories, all equally fascinating with each depicting a different journey and we want to hear them all. Recognition . We are the sum of individual achievements and we always take the time to celebrate them. An open organisation . Titles don’t define access at Syniti. We stay humble regardless of where we sit in the organisation. We want to hear every voice, listen to all the ideas and make sure everyone’s work is seen and valued. Our Commitment to Inclusion At Syniti, we’re committed to creating a respectful, inclusive, and fair workplace where everyone belongs and thrives. We believe that diverse perspectives make us stronger — and we value the unique backgrounds, experiences, and voices each person brings to our team. We welcome applicants based on their skills and potential, and we’re dedicated to ensuring equal opportunities for all, regardless of personal background. If you need accommodations during the hiring process, please let us know — we’re here to support you. #J-18808-Ljbffr

title: Senior Data Engineer (Snowflake Mandatory) - Relocation To Portugal
description:
Nova oportunidade para Senior Data Engineer (Snowflake Mandatory) - Relocation To Portugal em boa vista. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Your connection with Aubay starts in the following lines: Aubay Portugal is a French multinational company that has been operating in the country since 2007, with offices in Lisbon and Porto. We are a leading technology consultancy with a presence in seven European Union countries, specializing in the management, implementation, development and maintenance of information systems. With more than 150 active partners, we operate in strategic sectors such as banking, insurance, automotive, aviation, telecommunications, services and energy, driving innovation and digital transformation. Excellence, proximity and innovation are the pillars that distinguish us and enable us to support companies in building technological solutions that make a difference. What are we looking for? Minimum of 5 years of experience as a Senior Data Engineer or similar role, with a strong backend focus; Deep expertise in Snowflake for data warehousing; Extensive hands-on experience with dbt (data build tool); Experience with AWS, Azure or Cloud Platform Platform; Fluency in English (B2); Williness to move to Portugal. What do we have to offer you? Feedback&Coffee – our integrated performance management system, with regular feedback sessions and a structured Career Progression Model; Aubay Training Academy, designed for your development: technical and behavioural training (in-class and e-learning), Meet&Techs, Webinars, Mentoring and Technology Centers; Events and team building activities that strengthen team spirit and promote closeness; Digital platform for mental health and emotional well-being, with free psychology consultations, so you can take care of yourself at any time; Health and well-being programme, with workshops and initiatives for our employees and other activities open to the community; We grow with you and your family - we offer a Mini-Aubilous Kit when your children are born and annual support for school supplies, from pre-school to higher education; Language platform, with conversation classes in 12 languages; Working model: relocation to Portugal, mandatory. Will be hibrid in Portugal. What makes us different? title: Contract Review Attorney
description:
Nova oportunidade para Contract Review Attorney em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

About Headshots.com At Headshots.com, we're reimagining how professional headshots are created and delivered. Trusted by clients like Boeing, Capital One, and American Express, we transform smartphone selfies into polished, studio-quality portraits within three business days. As our enterprise client base expands across industries and geographies, including a growing footprint in regulated healthcare environments, we are building out our legal function to support that growth. About the Role This role combines hands‑on contract review with a strategic understanding of how commercial terms translate into operational risk and opportunity. You will be the primary reviewer on incoming Master Services Agreements, Business Associate Agreements, Data Processing Addenda, Statements of Work, and vendor contracts. You will work directly with leadership to redline, negotiate, and finalize agreements that protect the company while preserving the speed and flexibility that allow us to serve enterprise clients well. We are looking for someone who brings both technical legal expertise and strong commercial judgment, someone who can identify which provisions matter, where to push, and where to accept reasonable client positions in service of getting deals closed. Key Responsibilities Lead the review and redlining of MSAs, BAAs, DPAs, SOWs, NDAs, and vendor agreements. Identify risk, draft fallback positions, and negotiate directly with client legal teams when needed. Translate complex legal terms into clear, plain‑language recommendations for the business. Coordinate with the business on Standard Contractual Clauses, data transfer impact assessments, and DPA terms. Negotiate indemnification, limitation of liability, insurance requirements, IP ownership, audit rights, termination, and assignment provisions in a way that is proportionate to our scope and revenue. Develop playbooks and fallback positions so the business can move quickly on standard issues. Maintain contract templates, position playbooks, and a clause library. Work directly with sales, operations, and leadership to support active deal cycles. Translate legal positions into commercial recommendations. Provide guidance during pre‑contract discussions so issues are surfaced early. Track the status of in‑flight negotiations and ensure timely follow‑up with client counterparties. What You Bring Experience & Qualifications Law degree (JD or LLM) from an accredited institution Six or more years of commercial contracts experience, with meaningful time spent in‑house or supporting in‑house teams. 5+ years of demonstrated experience reviewing and negotiating agreements (US and European commercial clients a plus) Working knowledge of GDPR and cross‑border data transfer requirements. Strong command of commercial provisions: indemnification, limitation of liability, IP ownership, insurance, confidentiality, data security, termination, and assignment. Familiarity with SaaS, professional services, and vendor agreements. Excellent English skills, both written and spoken. Mindset & Strengths Commercial pragmatism. You understand that legal review serves business outcomes, and you know when to push, when to compromise, and when to Clear written communication. You can explain complex legal positions to non‑lawyers in plain language and translate client redlines into clear recommendations. Calm and thorough under deadline pressure. You can manage multiple active negotiations without losing track of detail. Independent operator. You can run a contract review process end‑to‑end with limited supervision and know when to surface issues to leadership. Discretion and trustworthiness. You handle confidential business information with care. A no‑ego collaborator. You build trust through transparent communication, take ownership of your work, and welcome feedback. Why Join Us Fully remote, flexible schedule with ET overlap. Work directly with founders and executive leadership on agreements that shape the company's growth. Opportunity to build out the legal function and contracting infrastructure at a fast‑moving company. Exposure to a diverse, enterprise client base across industries and geographies. IMPORTANT Direct inquiries will disqualify candidates. Compensation $40‑60/hour depending on experience #J-18808-Ljbffr

Job Title: Senior Applied Scientist - Computer Vision & Machine Learning Work Mode: 100% Remote Employment Type: Independent Contractor (hourly pay, no benefits; candidate responsible for own taxes) Contract Duration: 6 months, with possibility of extension Hours: 40 hours per week About the Role The Inbound team develops highly scalable solutions to determine item attribute values (such as color, material, and style) and verify merchandise authenticity. Master’s degree or PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Statistics, or a related field, or 8+ years of equivalent industry experience. 3+ years of experience building, deploying, and managing machine learning and deep learning models in large-scale production environments. Deep understanding of Computer Vision and Machine Learning algorithms and techniques, including CNNs, transformers, GANs, optimizers, and regularization, as well as experiment design and best practices such as A/B testing, training and serving pipelines, and feature engineering. Extensive experience with scientific Python libraries such as NumPy and pandas, and Machine Learning frameworks including PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras, and Scikit-Learn. Strong data engineering skills and experience working with large-scale datasets. Experience with experiment automation frameworks such as Ray Tune, Weights & Biases (W&B), and Kubeflow. Experience with cloud technologies including AWS, GCP, or Azure. Fluency in Python. Preferred Requirements PhD preferred in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Statistics, Operations Research, or a related field. Background applying Machine Learning techniques to solve real-world business problems in the retail sector. Familiarity with MLOps tools and pipelines. Impact-focused mindset with a passion for delivering high-quality models. #J-18808-Ljbffr

title: Assistant Production Manager
description:
Empresa está contratando Assistant Production Manager em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

About Headshots.com At Headshots.com, we’re reimagining how professional headshots are created and delivered. Trusted by clients like Boeing, Capital One, and American Express, we transform smartphone selfies into polished, studio-quality portraits within three business days. Our work helps individuals and teams present themselves with consistency and confidence across digital platforms. About the Role This role combines production oversight with a deep appreciation for the artistry of headshot retouching. You’ll manage the daily operations of our editing team, ensuring that each image reflects the clarity, subtlety, and professionalism our brand is known for. We're seeking someone who brings both technical expertise and a discerning creative eye—someone who can guide a team to produce beautiful, natural edits that elevate the subject rather than over-process them. Key Responsibilities Production & Quality Control Co‑develop strategic initiatives to strengthen and improve production operations Ensure timely reporting and clear communication across production workflows Oversee daily editing operations to support consistent, high-quality delivery of headshots Maintain quality standards across visual consistency, lighting, natural retouching, and overall image polish Identify recurring issues, provide constructive feedback, and support continuous improvement across the production team Step in as needed to assist with editing, troubleshooting, or complex production requests Team Leadership & Coaching Supervise and mentor a team of photo editors Hire, train, and onboard new editors to uphold brand standards Foster a collaborative, high‑accountability culture with clear communication Workflow Management & Operational Oversight Monitor task queues and deadlines to ensure smooth project flow Optimize systems and tools to eliminate inefficiencies or bottlenecks Lead team meetings, track KPIs, and document standard operating procedures Client & Project Coordination Collaborate across internal teams to meet client-specific requirements Maintain a client‑centered approach while balancing quality and turnaround Support the development of background templates, sample images, and visual assets as needed What You Bring Experience & Skills 6+ years of photo retouching experience, especially in headshots or portraits 3+ years managing creative or production teams Experience with tools like Dropbox, Asana, and Slack Strong organizational and communication skills Mindset & Strengths Excellent attention to detail and visual aesthetics A "no‑ego" team player: You leave your ego at the door, take extreme ownership of your work, and build deep trust through transparent communication. Reliable, deadline-driven, and calm under pressure Creative problem-solver with a passion for helping people look their best Comfortable giving and receiving feedback in a collaborative team environment Why Join Us? Flexible, remote work Work with a high‑performing creative team Opportunity to shape the quality and scale of a fast‑growing brand Compensation $16-18/hour (full-time contract) depending on experience Schedule Monday to Friday | Flexible hours (ET hours) IMPORTANT: Direct inquiries will disqualify candidates. #J-18808-Ljbffr

title: Assistente De Controle De Inventário
description:

Principais responsabilidadesA Dropservice é a base por trás do crescimento de um ecossistema de marcas. Conectamos pessoas, processos e dados para que nossas marcas cresçam com clareza, eficiência e impacto em grandes marketplaces, como Amazon e TikTok Shop. Diferenciais Experiência com e-commerce ou marketplaces (ex.: Amazon). Familiaridade com ferramentas como ClickUp e Sellerboard. title: Senior Data Engineer (Snowflake Mandatory) - Relocation To Portugal
description:

Your connection with Aubay starts in the following lines: Aubay Portugal is a French multinational company that has been operating in the country since 2007, with offices in Lisbon and Porto. We are a leading technology consultancy with a presence in seven European Union countries, specializing in the management, implementation, development and maintenance of information systems. With more than 150 active partners, we operate in strategic sectors such as banking, insurance, automotive, aviation, telecommunications, services and energy, driving innovation and digital transformation. Excellence, proximity and innovation are the pillars that distinguish us and enable us to support companies in building technological solutions that make a difference. What are we looking for? Minimum of 5 years of experience as a Senior Data Engineer or similar role, with a strong backend focus; Deep expertise in Snowflake for data warehousing; Extensive hands-on experience with dbt (data build tool); Experience with AWS, Azure or Cloud Platform Platform; Fluency in English (B2); Williness to move to Portugal. What do we have to offer you? Feedback&Coffee – our integrated performance management system, with regular feedback sessions and a structured Career Progression Model; Aubay Training Academy, designed for your development: technical and behavioural training (in-class and e-learning), Meet&Techs, Webinars, Mentoring and Technology Centers; Events and team building activities that strengthen team spirit and promote closeness; Digital platform for mental health and emotional well-being, with free psychology consultations, so you can take care of yourself at any time; Health and well-being programme, with workshops and initiatives for our employees and other activities open to the community; We grow with you and your family - we offer a Mini-Aubilous Kit when your children are born and annual support for school supplies, from pre-school to higher education; Language platform, with conversation classes in 12 languages; Working model: relocation to Portugal, mandatory. Will be hibrid in Portugal. What makes us different? Our organisational culture is based on solid values: commitment, excellence, team spirit, well-being, happiness and empathy; We value and recognise those who are part of our history, with referral awards and a special birthday gift; We believe in authenticity: we don't have a dress code, because what matters is talent and attitude; We promote closeness and an informal environment; Here, you will grow in good company, because we believe that professional development also means sharing experiences and building relationships. Your next adventure starts here! If you can see yourself growing with us, take the first step and send your CV to: . The future is waiting for you — and so are we! Personal Data collected by AUBAY PORTUGAL as Data Controller, regarding the identification, contact and professional capabilities of the candidates, in the present procedure, will be processed for the application analysis, having in consideration that the processing is conducted in order to to take the steps, at the request of the data subject, prior to entering into a contract; Personal data sent through the present application will be kept by Aubay during the application procedure and will remain stored whilst updated (for two years period). The collected data might be transferred or include other processing activities, as long as the data subject is informed, in the occurrence of a standard application and selection procedure, for the compliance of legal obligations for the time required by law. For any queries or request regarding personal data protection rights, the Data Subject may contact AUBAY PORTUGAL’s headquarters in Avenida Duque D`Ávila, nº46 em Lisboa or use the DPO’s e-mail - . The Data Subject also has the right to file a complaint with the National Data Protection Authority – (please do not include data regarding racial or ethnical origins, political opinions, religion, philosophy, biometrical data, health data, sexual life and orientation, or relating to criminal convictions and offences.) #J-18808-Ljbffr

title: Airtable No-Code Operations Specialist
description:
Confira a vaga para Airtable No-Code Operations Specialist em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Winning Ivy Prep is a boutique, high-touch college admissions strategy firm serving ambitious families nationwide. We run two core programs: College Planning (Grades 9–11) and College Essay (senior year). Both are high-touch, deadline-driven, and built on the belief that every student and family deserves a consistent, exceptional experience. The Role This is a builder role. We need someone who can design and build the infrastructure and systems that ensure our operations team can run our programs smoothly. You'll work in Airtable, Zapier, and Google Workspace to create visibility, automate workflows, and solve operational problems. description:

Here at TCS we believe that people make the difference, that's why we live a culture of unlimited learning full of opportunities for improvement and mutual development. The ideal scenario to expand ideas through the right tools, contributing to our success in a collaborative environment. We are looking for (job name) who wants to learn and transform his career. In this role you will: (responsibilities) Provide end-to-end support (L1–L3) for Veeva RIM and Veeva SafetyDocs platforms, including issue diagnosis, resolution tracking, and proactive system monitoring. Mandatory Skills : Experience with the life science and healthcare industry. Knowledge of GxP, 21 CFR Part 11, Annex 11 and validation processes in a regulated environment. Strong technical skills in configuration, and issue resolution in Windows-based enterprise environments. Familiarity with ticketing systems (e.g., ServiceNow) and Request/ incident/change management processes. Excellent interpersonal skills and the ability to communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders. Ability to work independently and collaboratively across global, cross-functional teams. Experience with documentation tools and version control systems is a plus. Maintain comprehensive documentation, including SOPs, user manuals, knowledge base articles, and incident logs. Assist in system upgrades, patch testing, and user acceptance testing (UAT) to support uninterrupted business operations. Proactively identify and drive opportunities for process automation, system optimization, and user experience enhancements. Troubleshoot critical production issues, including system unavailability and data integrity issues, and propose resolutions or workarounds. Ability to replicate & diagnose issues using industry-standard tools and techniques (e.g., FTP, Postman, AWS Tools), and propose resolutions or workarounds. What can you expect from us? • Professional development and constant evolution of your skills, always in line with your interests. • Opportunities to work outside Brazil • A collaborative, diverse and innovative environment that encourages teamwork. What do we offer? Health insurance Life insurance Gympass TCS Cares – free 0800 that provides psychological assistance (24 hrs/day), legal, social and financial assistance to associates Partnership with SESC Reimbursement of Certifications Free TCS Learning Portal – Online courses and live training International experience opportunity Discount Partnership with Universities and Language Schools Bring Your Buddy – By referring people you become eligible to receive a bonus for each hire TCS Gems – Recognition for performance Xcelerate – Free Mentoring Career Platform At TATA Consultancy Services we promote an inclusive culture, we always work for equity. This applies to Gender, People with Disabilities, LGBTQIA+, Religion, Race, Ethnicity. All our opportunities are based on these principles. We think of different actions of inclusion and social responsibility, in order to build a TCS that respects individuality. Come to be a TCSer! #J-18808-Ljbffr

Professional English is a requirement for this role A challenge will be required for evaluation About Foundey Foundey (formerly Uitify) is a design studio specializing in delivering high-quality UI/UX and branding solutions for early-stage SaaS startups based in the United States. We are committed to transforming complex business ideas into elegant, user‑centric digital experiences. With a strong emphasis on design excellence, innovation, and client collaboration, we help fast‑growing companies establish strong visual identities and seamless digital products. The Opportunity We are looking for an experienced and strategic Product Designer. This role is ideal for a designer who thrives on solving complex user problems, designing for technical audiences, and delivering intuitive, scalable product experiences in fast‑paced, startup environments. The ideal candidate is a hands‑on product thinker with a deep understanding of user‑centered design for B2B software, a track record of shipping enterprise‑grade digital products, and experience working closely with Product Managers, Engineers, and key stakeholders in the cybersecurity and SaaS sectors. Responsibilities Lead end‑to‑end product design processes, from discovery and research to wireframing, prototyping, and high‑fidelity UI design; Partner closely with Product Management and Engineering to define product requirements and translate them into user‑centered design solutions; Design intuitive interfaces for complex cybersecurity tools and SaaS products, focusing on usability, scalability, and performance; Conduct user research, usability testing, and heuristic evaluations to validate design decisions and optimize user experience; Collaborate with stakeholders to align design goals with business objectives, technical constraints, and customer needs; Create and maintain design systems and UI libraries to ensure consistency and efficiency across the product suite; Stay updated on design trends, user behavior patterns in B2B software, and industry best practices in product design; Mentor junior designers and provide design critique and feedback within the team. Requirements Full professional proficiency in English (verbal and written), with the ability to clearly articulate design rationale and collaborate with international teams; Strong portfolio showcasing complex product design work for enterprise software, especially in security, data visualization, or technical tools; Deep expertise with design tools like Figma, FigJam, and prototyping tools such as Framer or Principle; Solid understanding of user flows, interaction design, information architecture, and visual hierarchy for B2B software; Experience working in agile development environments, with strong collaboration skills alongside Product Managers and Engineers; Familiarity with design systems, accessibility standards (WCAG), and responsive design principles. Preferred Qualifications 6+ years of experience as a Product Designer; Direct experience designing for cybersecurity platforms (e.g., threat detection tools, security dashboards, monitoring platforms, etc.); Background in designing data‑heavy interfaces, with complex user journeys and role‑based user permissions; Knowledge of frontend development principles (HTML, CSS) to effectively communicate with developers; Prior experience working with US‑based startups or product teams; Experience facilitating design workshops, user interviews, or stakeholder alignment sessions. Why Join Us? At Foundey, you will work on high‑impact projects for fast‑growing SaaS and cybersecurity companies, helping shape the digital tools that protect and empower businesses worldwide. You’ll collaborate with talented designers and technologists, contribute to cutting‑edge design solutions, and grow your career in a studio that values innovation, ownership, and excellence. #J-18808-Ljbffr

title: Lead Product Designer
description:
Empresa está contratando Lead Product Designer em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Transcenda, headquartered in the US, was founded in July 2019 and is a full-lifecycle product development company. With locations throughout Romania, Poland, Ukraine, and Brazil, Transcenda works with Fortune 500 companies and well-funded startups to help bring new products to life. Transcenda helps companies ideate new product concepts, build prototypes, design world-class solutions then engineer new commercial products. Transcenda puts people first and strives to be a changemaker by building a better world through technology. Transcenda has grown from a 5-person team to over 250 people over the past four years and plans to continue growing. About the role This is a senior, consultancy-style design role. You'll move between leading projects end-to-end — driving discovery, aligning stakeholders, shaping direction — and rolling up your sleeves as a senior-level individual contributor when that's what the work needs. You'll be working on mature, live products where the bar is improving what exists: smoothing workflows, sharpening hierarchy, lifting conversion, and removing friction. This is not a greenfield, portfolio-piece role. If you get satisfaction from making a working product noticeably better for the people who use it every day, you'll like it here. Key responsibilities Take ownership of design problems on assigned projects — frame the problem, drive it through discovery, design, and delivery, and bring stakeholders along the whole way. Lead or contribute on a project depending on what's needed — sometimes you're directing the design effort, sometimes you're the one in Figma producing the work. Both modes should feel comfortable. Partner closely with product managers and engineers, translating ambiguous requirements into concrete, testable design solutions and iterating against live implementations. Run the iterative cycle from low-fidelity exploration through high-fidelity delivery, with usability validation at the points where it actually changes the outcome. Facilitate workshops, design reviews, and working sessions with cross-functional and executive stakeholders. Make decisions visible and trade-offs explicit. Mentor and raise the bar for designers around you. Build durable relationships with stakeholders. Understand what they're actually trying to achieve and push back constructively when the brief is wrong. Must haves 6–10+ years of UX/Product Design experience, ideally including time in a consultancy, agency, or embedded-team setting where you've owned client or stakeholder relationships directly. Demonstrated ability to flex between leading a project (or a small team) and contributing as a senior IC, depending on what the engagement needs. Track record of improving existing products rather than designing greenfield experiences — measurable wins on usability, conversion, or workflow efficiency. Strong visual and UI judgment for forms, workflows, CTAs, hierarchy, and layout. You can defend a layout decision on the merits. Comfort working closely with engineering against live implementations — you can read a real interface and tell us what's wrong with it before opening Figma. Ability to articulate why a design decision was made and what problem it solves, to audiences ranging from engineers to executives. Experience facilitating cross-functional workshops and leading business reviews or strategic planning sessions with senior stakeholders. Nice to have Background designing for regulated or enterprise domains (finance, compliance, GRC, banking, or similar). Experience designing software embedded inside third-party platforms. Familiarity with mature component libraries and design systems (MUI or similar). Experience mentoring or leveling up other designers through example and critique. Degree in Design, HCI, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field — or equivalent experience. #J-18808-Ljbffr

Curte ambiente de startup de verdade : entende que aqui as coisas mudam rápido, nem tudo tá pronto, e o caminho a gente descobre fazendo; Quer autonomia pra trazer suas ideias : propõe, experimenta, testa, ajusta enquanto trabalha do jeito que rende melhor pra você; Usa IA no dia a dia e gosta : explora, usa e tem interesse de verdade em IA; Tá aberto a inovação : entra em cenários sem mapa pronto e gosta disso; Quer crescer junto : encara a vaga como um lugar pra se desenvolver e aprender na prática. Se a vaga te chamou atenção, manda um e-mail pra gente em com seu portfólio + um parágrafo curto contando por que essa vaga faz sentido pra você Criar um alerta de emprego para esta pesquisa Designer de UX / UI • rio branco, estado do acre, br #J-18808-Ljbffr

title: Editor De Vídeo Freelancer (Pj) | Reels, Redes Sociais E Conteúdo De Alta Retenção
description:
Confira a vaga para Editor De Vídeo Freelancer (Pj) | Reels, Redes Sociais E Conteúdo De Alta Retenção em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Editor de Vídeo Freelancer (PJ) | Reels, Redes Sociais e Conteúdo de Alta Retenção Remoto | Escopo semanal recorrente | Início imediato A Dreamland Holding , ecossistema de empresas premiadas internacionalmente em crescimento acelerado. E busca um(a) Editor(a) de Vídeo Freelancer/PJ para atuar na criação de conteúdos de alta performance para redes sociais. A atuação será direcionada principalmente aos perfis da Dream Success , da Conface Contabilidade e da diretoria da empresa, com foco em vídeos para Reels, Shorts e TikTok , sempre respeitando a identidade visual, o tom de voz e o padrão técnico das marcas. Esta oportunidade é destinada a profissionais que já dominam a linguagem das redes sociais, gostam de vídeos dinâmicos, acompanham tendências, conhecem influenciadores, entendem humor de internet e sabem transformar conteúdo bruto em vídeos com ritmo, retenção, clareza, estética e potencial de viralização . Escopo da Prestação de Serviço Edição de 10 vídeos semanais para Reels; Edição de conteúdos para redes sociais da Dream Success, Conface Contabilidade e perfil da CEO da Holding; Transformação de materiais brutos em vídeos finais com duração de até 3 minutos; Aplicação de cortes dinâmicos, legendas, ritmo, humor, efeitos sonoros, imagens de apoio, memes e recursos visuais quando fizer sentido para o conteúdo; Replicação do estilo técnico e narrativo das referências indicadas pela empresa; Adequação dos vídeos ao brandbook, identidade visual e tom de voz de cada perfil; Organização de arquivos, versões e entregas finais; Realização de ajustes técnicos dentro do briefing original e dos critérios previamente alinhados. O material bruto poderá ter duração superior a 3 minutos. A expectativa é que o prestador consiga interpretar o conteúdo, selecionar os melhores trechos e entregar vídeos finais adequados ao formato de Reels, com clareza, ritmo, retenção e acabamento profissional. Referências de Estilo O prestador deverá ser capaz de editar vídeos com linguagem semelhante aos exemplos abaixo, considerando ritmo, narrativa, legendas, humor, cortes, recursos visuais e acabamento: Requisitos Técnicos Obrigatórios Experiência comprovada em edição de vídeos para redes sociais; Portfólio com vídeos curtos em formato vertical, especialmente Reels, Shorts ou TikTok; Domínio real de linguagem de redes sociais, retenção, humor, cortes dinâmicos e ritmo narrativo; Capacidade de editar vídeos com timing cômico, legendas bem aplicadas, efeitos sonoros, memes, imagens de apoio e recursos visuais; Conhecimento prático de creators, influenciadores, memes, trends e formatos virais; Familiaridade com referências de humor e cultura digital, como Ranoroxa/Ranozera, Diva Depressão e criadores semelhantes; Domínio profissional de CapCut Pro e Adobe Premiere. Com maior foco no Capcut onde dispomos de templates prontos; Conhecimento funcional de recursos como legendas dinâmicas, zooms, prints, cortes rápidos, imagens de apoio, efeitos sonoros e elementos gráficos; Senso estético apurado e atenção rigorosa aos detalhes; Capacidade de replicar referências de edição de forma autônoma, sem necessidade de treinamento básico; Organização com arquivos, versões, prazos e entregas; E é obrigatório que o prestador possua as ferramentas, recursos e estrutura técnica necessários para execução do serviço com qualidade profissional. ⚙️ Modelo de Prestação de Serviço Contratação como pessoa jurídica PJ/freelancer; Prestação de serviço 100% remota; Remuneração por escopo semanal de R$ 600 por 10 vídeos por semana; Pagamento condicionado a entrega e aprovação dos materiais; Envio dos materiais e orientações no início da semana, preferencialmente às segundas-feiras; Entrega dos vídeos acontece ao longo da semana até sexta-feira, conforme briefing, escopo e padrão técnico previamente alinhados; Ajustes necessários dentro desta proposta; A execução ocorre com autonomia de organização, sem exigência de horário fixo e sem controle de jornada. Fluxo de Avaliação Nosso processo de avaliação é objetivo e focado em validar capacidade técnica, aderência ao estilo de edição e maturidade para atuar em um escopo recorrente de redes sociais. Portfólio em PDF obrigatório: O portfólio deve ser anexado diretamente na candidatura via LinkedIn e precisa conter vídeos curtos editados pelo prestador, preferencialmente Reels, Shorts ou TikToks. Candidaturas sem portfólio em PDF ou com materiais genéricos serão desclassificadas automaticamente. Análise dos materiais enviados: Avaliaremos ritmo, retenção, acabamento, legendas, timing de humor, senso estético e domínio real da linguagem de redes sociais. Teste prático eliminatório: Os profissionais selecionados deverão realizar um teste prático de edição, com prazo de 24 horas para execução de um vídeo teste. O teste será sem custo, exclusivamente avaliativo, não será utilizado comercialmente, não será publicado e será desconsiderado após a análise técnica. Alinhamento final: Profissionais aprovados seguem para alinhamento sobre escopo semanal, dinâmica de entrega, prazos, padrão de qualidade e início da prestação de serviço. Este projeto exige um perfil técnico, autônomo e maduro, com repertório real de redes sociais e capacidade de entrega recorrente. Buscamos prestadores que entendam formatos nativos de Reels, Shorts e TikTok, saibam trabalhar com retenção, ritmo, humor, cortes dinâmicos, memes, legendas e linguagem viral. Também é essencial ter familiaridade com creators, trends, cultura digital e referências contemporâneas de internet. O profissional precisa conseguir analisar referências, compreender o estilo esperado e executar a edição com autonomia, sem depender de treinamento básico ou condução constante. Também esperamos organização com arquivos, versões e prazos, além de abertura para feedbacks objetivos e aplicação precisa de ajustes. Este projeto não tem caráter formativo. Não buscamos profissionais iniciantes, edições básicas ou prestadores que ainda estejam aprendendo a construir vídeos com ritmo, humor e retenção. Também não tende a performar bem neste contexto quem não possui repertório de redes sociais, tem dificuldade em receber feedbacks técnicos, baixa tolerância à pressão, resistência a ajustes ou postura passiva diante das entregas. A Dream Success atua com mentalidade de startup, alto padrão de exigência e foco em performance. A direção possui forte leitura de tendências, atenção rigorosa aos detalhes e alto nível técnico. Por isso, esperamos resiliência, responsabilidade, iniciativa e compromisso real com qualidade. Alinhamento Cultural A Dream Success está inserida em um ecossistema empresarial em crescimento acelerado, com foco em performance, consistência e evolução. Nosso ambiente valoriza profissionais que trabalham com profundidade, velocidade, responsabilidade e clareza. A prestação de serviço oferece autonomia na organização do trabalho, mas exige maturidade para cumprir prazos, sustentar qualidade e lidar com feedbacks objetivos. A cultura da empresa não é compatível com vitimismo, baixa energia de execução, resistência a feedback, justificativas recorrentes ou dificuldade de lidar com cobrança técnica. Autonomia, aqui, não significa ausência de exigência. Significa liberdade para organizar o próprio trabalho com responsabilidade suficiente para entregar no padrão esperado. Se você busca atuar em um projeto recorrente de redes sociais, com marcas em crescimento, alto padrão de exigência e possibilidade de continuidade, essa é uma oportunidade para demonstrar domínio técnico, repertório criativo e capacidade real de entrega. Do nosso lado, garantimos um processo de avaliação objetivo, ágil e respeitoso com seu tempo. Desde já, agradecemos sua atenção e interesse Criar um alerta de emprego para esta pesquisa Editor de Vídeo Freelancer (PJ) | Reels, Redes Sociais e Conteúdo de Alta Retenção • boa vista, estado de roraima, br #J-18808-Ljbffr

title: Contract Review Attorney
description:
Confira a vaga para Contract Review Attorney em rio branco. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

At Headshots.com, we're reimagining how professional headshots are created and delivered. Trusted by clients like Boeing, Capital One, and American Express, we transform smartphone selfies into polished, studio-quality portraits within three business days. As our enterprise client base expands across industries and geographies, including a growing footprint in regulated healthcare environments, we are building out our legal function to support that growth. We're looking for a Contract Review Attorney, reporting to the Chief Operating Officer, who will own the day-to-day review and negotiation of commercial agreements, partner closely with our business teams, and help us scale a thoughtful, risk-calibrated approach to enterprise contracting. About the Role This role combines hands-on contract review with a strategic understanding of how commercial terms translate into operational risk and opportunity. You will be the primary reviewer on incoming Master Services Agreements, Business Associate Agreements, Data Processing Addenda, Statements of Work, and vendor contracts. You will work directly with leadership to redline, negotiate, and finalize agreements that protect the company while preserving the speed and flexibility that allow us to serve enterprise clients well. We are looking for someone who brings both technical legal expertise and strong commercial judgment, someone who can identify which provisions matter, where to push, and where to accept reasonable client positions in service of getting deals closed. Key Responsibilities Lead the review and redlining of MSAs, BAAs, DPAs, SOWs, NDAs, and vendor agreements. Identify risk, draft fallback positions, and negotiate directly with client legal teams when needed. Translate complex legal terms into clear, plain-language recommendations for the business. Coordinate with the business on Standard Contractual Clauses, data transfer impact assessments, and DPA terms. Negotiate indemnification, limitation of liability, insurance requirements, IP ownership, audit rights, termination, and assignment provisions in a way that is proportionate to our scope and revenue. Develop playbooks and fallback positions so the business can move quickly on standard issues. Maintain contract templates, position playbooks, and a clause library. Work directly with sales, operations, and leadership to support active deal cycles. Translate legal positions into commercial recommendations. Provide guidance during pre-contract discussions so issues are surfaced early. Track the status of in-flight negotiations and ensure timely follow-up with client counterparties. What You Bring Experience & Qualifications Law degree (JD or LLM) from an accredited institution Six or more years of commercial contracts experience, with meaningful time spent in-house or supporting in-house teams. 5+ years of demonstrated experience reviewing and negotiating agreements (US and European commercial clients a plus) Working knowledge of GDPR and cross-border data transfer requirements. Strong command of commercial provisions: indemnification, limitation of liability, IP ownership, insurance, confidentiality, data security, termination, and assignment. Familiarity with SaaS, professional services, and vendor agreements. Excellent English skills, both written and spoken. Mindset & Strengths Commercial pragmatism. You understand that legal review serves business outcomes, and you know when to push, when to compromise, and when to escalate. Clear written communication. You can explain complex legal positions to non-lawyers in plain language and translate client redlines into clear recommendations. Calm and thorough under deadline pressure. You can manage multiple active negotiations without losing track of detail. Independent operator. You can run a contract review process end-to-end with limited supervision and know when to surface issues to leadership. Discretion and trustworthiness. You handle confidential business information with care. A no-ego collaborator. You build trust through transparent communication, take ownership of your work, and welcome feedback. Why Join Us Fully remote, flexible schedule with ET overlap. Work directly with founders and executive leadership on agreements that shape the company's growth. Opportunity to build out the legal function and contracting infrastructure at a fast-moving company. Exposure to a diverse, enterprise client base across industries and geographies. IMPORTANT Direct inquiries will disqualify candidates. #J-18808-Ljbffr

title: Cientista De Dados
description:
Empresa está contratando Cientista De Dados em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Local de Atuação: Brasil Modelo de Trabalho: Remoto Estamos em busca de um Cientista de Dados Sênior com sólida experiência em projetos de Data Science, análise de dados e aplicação de Inteligência Artificial. A pessoa atuará na construção de soluções analíticas capazes de gerar valor para o negócio através da análise de grandes volumes de dados. Qualificações Experiência com análise exploratória, tratamento e modelagem de dados. Conhecimento sólido em Python e SQL. Experiência com Machine Learning e Inteligência Artificial. Vivência com Big Data e processamento de grandes volumes de dados. Conhecimento em Apache Spark e Databricks. Experiência com plataformas Cloud (Microsoft Azure, AWS ou Google Cloud Platform). Conhecimento em modelagem de dados e bancos relacionais e NoSQL. Experiência com ferramentas de visualização de dados como Power BI ou Tableau. Capacidade de traduzir necessidades do negócio em soluções analíticas. Perfil analítico, investigativo e orientado à resolução de problemas complexos. Responsabilidades Desenvolver soluções de Ciência de Dados voltadas à geração de valor para o negócio. Realizar análise exploratória, tratamento e preparação de dados. Trabalhar com grandes volumes de dados estruturados e não estruturados. Desenvolver soluções utilizando Python, SQL, Spark e plataformas Cloud. title: Editor De Vídeos
description:
Nova oportunidade para Editor De Vídeos em boa vista. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Vaga: Editor(a) de Vídeo Júnior — 100% Remoto | CLT + Plano de Saúde + Bônus LEIA ATÉ O FINAL COM ATENÇÃO - NÃO ADIANTA SÓ CLICAR EM SE CANDIDATAR AQUI NO LINKEDIN Em menos de 2 anos, possivelmente, já somos a maior clínica de fisioterapia pélvica particular do Brasil e nosso ritmo de crescimento é acelerado e cada vez mais rápido. Conteúdo é um dos motores desse crescimento. Cada corte que sai da nossa edição educa pacientes, quebra tabus sobre disfunções íntimas e mostra que existe tratamento sério para problemas que a maioria dos lugares trata errado. Agora estamos abrindo vaga para um(a) Editor(a) de Vídeo Júnior que queira entrar nesse time, aprender rápido e crescer junto. • Salário fixo: R$ 1.830 • Bônus mensal de até R$ 300 (por desempenho e comportamento) • Plano de saúde Total possível inicial: até R$ 2.430/mês + plano de saúde. Cargo Júnior. Mas não é uma vaga para quem quer ficar Júnior. Quem entrega, evolui rápido para Pleno — esse é o nosso jeito de operar em todos os cargos. A vaga em uma frase Assistir vídeos longos da PelvClinic, achar os melhores trechos e transformar em cortes curtos que prendem atenção no Reels, TikTok e Shorts. A edição técnica importa. Mas escolher o corte certo importa mais. Saber identificar qual trecho começa forte, qual fala gera curiosidade, qual explicação tem valor — esse é o olhar que faz a diferença entre um editor comum e um editor que move o ponteiro. É isso que vamos te ensinar e cobrar. Como você vai trabalhar Você será liderado(a) pela Emilly, nossa Social Media, que vai te orientar no dia a dia: demanda, feedback, padrão de qualidade, prioridades. Trabalho remoto exige maturidade. Você precisa ter: • Computador próprio com capacidade real para edição • Organização para entregar sem ser lembrado • Disponibilidade para alinhamentos com a Emilly Se você precisa de cobrança constante para produzir, essa vaga não é pra você. Três coisas — em ordem de importância: 1. Olho para conteúdo. Capacidade de assistir uma hora de vídeo e identificar os 30 segundos que prendem atenção sozinhos. 2. Constância. Entregar bem hoje, amanhã e na semana que vem. Não picos seguidos de sumiço. 3. Vontade real de crescer. Pessoa que estuda referência por conta própria, aceita feedback sem peso, aplica e volta melhor. >>>Teste prático (Passo 1) Vídeo de explicação do teste: A sua pontuação no teste terá base na qualidade e quantidade de bons cortes e conteúdos que conseguir extrair de cada vídeo longo: • Vídeos curtos de alcance em formato 16:9 (geralmente de 20 segundos até 2 minutos — topo de funil) • Vídeos médios de 2 a 7 minutos formato 16:9, mais completos e explicados, para gerar mais profundidade de relacionamento (meio e fundo de funil) • Carrosséis, tanto dos vídeos longos base, quanto dos vídeos menores FAQ: tem número de vídeos que vocês imaginam? O teste é para ver a sua capacidade de extrair o maior número de bons conteúdos e ideias possível de cada vídeo longo (vídeos menores e posts/carrosséis). P.S. Os vídeos já foram editados por nós, e essa será a régua para classificação. Vídeos longos base (extrair vídeos curtos e carrosséis): Quanto maior o número e a qualidade dos conteúdos, mais alta sua pontuação. Penalização por conteúdos ruins ou fracos. Sem encher linguiça — o que conta é volume de conteúdos bons. Critérios de avaliação: • Seleção de tema e clareza da ideia • Gancho falado — força nos 0–3s e 0–7s, curiosidade e interesse sem clickbait • Entrega de conteúdo — satisfação depois de consumir • Comunicação da marca — ética, acolhimento, evidência, linguagem simples • Velocidade e capricho — quanto mais rápido melhor, arquivos nomeados, zero ruído Referências de vídeos curtos: Envie o teste feito para: Corpo: ENVIE o Link (pasta no drive) dos conteúdos que você editou + currículo Para quem essa vaga não é • Quem quer trabalho remoto pra ficar tranquilo • Quem precisa de cobrança constante pra entregar • Quem reage a feedback como ataque • Quem quer fazer o mínimo e receber o suficiente Para quem essa vaga é • Quem está começando mas quer crescer rápido • Quem topa trabalhar duro para se provar • Quem quer entrar numa empresa que está construindo algo grande e ter a chance de crescer junto Criar um alerta de emprego para esta pesquisa #J-18808-Ljbffr
