The ideal candidate will have 5+ years of experience and demonstrate strong senior level expertise across the required technologies, along with the ability to thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced, distributed team environment. warning Contract Length: 3-6 month (likely to extend) Location: Remote (Will work US CT Working Hours) Start Date: ASAP A fast-growing AI and IoT software company is building predictive intelligence platforms for the residential infrastructure and home services industry. Their technology combines connected devices, machine learning, and data-driven software to help service providers proactively identify and prevent equipment failures before they happen. They’re looking for a Software Engineer to help shape and scale their next-generation web platform across customer experiences, operational tooling, and AI-powered dashboards. This is a high-ownership role within a small, high-calibre engineering team. They want someone who enjoys building products from scratch, understands systems and architecture, and can operate autonomously in a fast-moving startup environment. Key Experience Needed Experience building and scaling modern web applications Strong TypeScript and modern web architecture experience Experience building products from 0→1 through to scale Experience with scalable frontend systems and design systems Product-focused mindset with strong user and business understanding Comfortable working across Product, Design, Backend, and AI teams Able to work autonomously in fast-moving environments Strong understanding of scalability, performance, and engineering best practices Python/backend experience is highly desirable Experience with AI, IoT, or data-heavy products is beneficial Key Responsibilities Lead the architecture and technical direction of the web platform Build scalable customer-facing products, internal tooling, and AI dashboards Develop shared frontend frameworks and platform infrastructure Collaborate closely with Product, Design, AI, and Backend teams Improve scalability, performance, and developer workflows Help shape engineering standards and technical direction Contribute hands-on across architecture, development, and problem solving Mentor engineers and help elevate engineering quality Software Engineer Contract Length: 3-6 month (likely to extend) Location: Remote (Will work US CT Working Hours) Start Date: ASAP warning Founding software engineer for Quectel's new Manaus operation Role Software Engineer – IoT Module – LATAM Level Mid-Level (3–5 years of experience) Type Full-Time, On-Site Languages Portuguese & English required · Spanish a plus About Quectel Quectel is one of the world's leading suppliers of cellular IoT modules, antennas, and connectivity services, with more than 4,000 professionals across 8 R&D centers and 50+ sales offices worldwide. Our technology powers everything from smart meters and connected cars to industrial robots and point-of-sale terminals — quietly enabling billions of devices to talk to the cloud. This is something special. Quectel is launching a brand-new operation in Manaus, Brazil — and we're building the founding team right now. Hosted at ICT Manaus (Instituto Centro de Pesquisa e Desenvolvimento em Tecnologia de Software), an accredited Science, Technology and Innovation Institution under SUFRAMA's CAPDA framework, this new setup will become Quectel's regional engine for R&D, customer enablement, and ANATEL certification across Latin America. Joining now means more than taking a job — it means shaping a team, a culture, and a way of working from day one. Your fingerprints will be on everything we build here. We're hiring one of the founding software engineers for Quectel's brand-new Manaus setup. You'll work on the embedded Linux software stacks running inside Quectel's cellular IoT modules — Qualcomm-based platforms supporting LTE, 5G, and LPWA technologies — and you'll be the go-to software expert for customers across Latin America. Because the team is being built from scratch, you'll have unusual influence: the tooling, the development workflows, the customer-engagement model, the way we triage and resolve field issues — these are decisions you'll help make, not inherit. You'll collaborate closely with Quectel's global R&D centers while owning the LATAM software story end to end. "You get the depth of an embedded Linux job — kernel, drivers, Yocto — and the rare chance to help build a brand-new operation from day one. That combination doesn't come around often." What You'll Do Design, develop, and maintain software modules for Quectel cellular modems (LTE / 5G / LPWA) on Qualcomm SoCs. Build and tune Linux-based networking systems for IoT devices and gateways — TCP/IP, sockets, routing, the works. Develop device drivers, daemons, and system services on embedded Linux. Hunt down issues across the full stack — kernel, Yocto build system, middleware, and applications. Use Wireshark, tcpdump, and your debugging instincts to crack tough field and lab problems. Support LATAM customers directly: develop new SW features, debug their issues, maintain the SW stack, and improve our demo applications. Partner with hardware, integration, and QA teams during board bring-up and validation. Contribute to architecture decisions and performance optimization for the next generation of modules. What You Bring Bachelor's or Master's in Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field. 3–5 years of experience with embedded Linux, cellular modem development, or both. Hands-on experience with Qualcomm-based modem SoCs and their firmware. Strong C and C++ skills, with a real understanding of microcontroller/microprocessor architecture. Solid knowledge of Linux internals and system programming. Comfort with the Linux network stack and packet analysis tools (Wireshark, tcpdump). Working knowledge of Linux networking: TCP/IP, sockets, routing. Day-to-day experience with Git and Agile workflows. Strong problem-solving skills and the communication chops to work directly with customers. Fluent in English and Portuguese; Spanish is a plus. Bonus Points For Yocto Project or other embedded Linux build framework experience. LPWA experience (NB-IoT, LTE-M) and familiarity with cellular certification. Prior FAE or customer-engineering experience in the LATAM region. Quectel blog & insights — deep dives on cellular IoT, edge compute, and industry trends. Why You'll Love Working Here Founding-team energy — you're not joining an established office, you're building one. The processes, the culture, the technical playbook — you'll help write it. Real impact from day one — your decisions and designs ship inside products used by millions across LATAM. Backed by a global leader — startup feel, but with the technology, customers, and resources of a 4,000-person publicly-listed IoT company behind you. Direct line to global R&D — work side-by-side with our R&D centers in China, Europe, and North America while staying rooted in Manaus's growing tech ecosystem. Cutting-edge technology — 5G, LPWA, AI at the edge, smart camera modules, and the next generation of connected devices. Career growth on a fast curve — early team members typically grow into senior technical or leadership roles as the operation scales. Customer-facing exposure — directly shape how leading LATAM brands build their connected products. Competitive package — attractive compensation, benefits, and the stability of a global market leader. Competitive base salary aligned with LATAM market benchmarks. Flexible meal and grocery vouchers (meal allowance / food allowance). Health insurance with no co-pay. Life insurance. Paid time off. International travel opportunities — HQ visits and global trade shows. Ready to Apply? If this sounds like your kind of challenge, we'd love to hear from you. Send your CV (in English) along with a short note about what excites you most about the role. We review applications on a rolling basis. Quectel is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to building an inclusive team where everyone can do their best work. warning #J-18808-Ljbffr

title: Assessor de Investimentos
description:
Confira a vaga para Assessor de Investimentos em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Estamos em busca de um Assessor de Investimentos para atuar de forma estratégica no relacionamento com clientes, oferecendo soluções financeiras alinhadas aos objetivos e ao perfil de cada investidor. Na EQI, o início da carreira é fortemente focado na formação de pessoas , com um modelo educacional estruturado e progressão de aprendizado intensiva. Esse processo é constantemente avaliado, sendo atrativo tanto para profissionais em fase inicial ou em transição de carreira, quanto para aqueles já experientes que buscam uma instituição que valoriza educação, resultado e evolução contínua. Etapa Inicial Desde o primeiro dia, o profissional já atua como Assessor de Investimentos, inserido em um modelo de formação intenso e educacional. Onboarding Integração à cultura EQI, ferramentas e fundamentos técnicos e comerciais necessários para a atuação. Desenvolvimento Comercial Atuação prática com foco em prospecção, geração de oportunidades e fortalecimento das habilidades de relacionamento. Consolidação da Atuação Após o período de adaptação e com a consolidação dos resultados esperados, o(a) Assessor(a) passa a receber carteira de clientes EQI e inicia sua atuação completa, exercitando o modelo de assessoria da EQI com métricas e indicadores que acompanharão ao longo de toda a carreira. Plano de Carreira O desenvolvimento começa já na formação e evolui de forma estruturada, com avaliações em cada etapa e oportunidades de crescimento até posições de maior senioridade. O que importa no nosso processo seletivo? • Fit Cultural; • Certificação CPA-20 (CPA +CPROR), CEA (CPROI) ou CFP (ou interesse em tirar); • Conhecimento sobre Investimentos (RV, RF, Fundos, entre outros); • Perfil comercial e relacional; • Disponibilidade em tempo integral (100% presencial); • Experiência mínima de 6 meses de atuação profissional no Mercado Financeiro (Banco, Corretora, AAI ou Family Office). Por que escolher a EQI? Plano de carreira estruturado e diferenciado Suporte e acompanhamento integral das lideranças no dia a dia Feedbacks estruturados Sistemas avançados e tecnologias de ponta Plataformas próprias de desenvolvimento profissional (EaD) com mais de 350 treinamentos disponíveis (habilidades técnicas e comportamentais) Partnership Informações adicionais Benefícios: PPR anual VA/VR de R$ 1.812

title: Software Engineer
description:
Confira a vaga para Software Engineer em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Software Engineer-SMART MODULE Founding smart-module engineer at Quectel's new Manaus hub Location Manaus, Amazonas, Brazil Role Software Engineer – Smart Module – LATAM Level Mid-Level (3–5 years of experience) Type Full-Time, On-Site Languages Portuguese & English required · Spanish a plus About Quectel Quectel is one of the world's leading suppliers of cellular IoT modules, antennas, and connectivity services, with more than 4,000 professionals across 8 R&D centers and 50+ sales offices worldwide. Our technology powers everything from smart meters and connected cars to industrial robots and point-of-sale terminals — quietly enabling billions of devices to talk to the cloud. A New Chapter: Quectel in Manaus This is something special. Quectel is launching a brand-new operation in Manaus, Brazil — and we're building the founding team right now. Hosted at ICT Manaus (Instituto Centro de Pesquisa e Desenvolvimento em Tecnologia de Software), an accredited Science, Technology and Innovation Institution under SUFRAMA's CAPDA framework, this new setup will become Quectel's regional engine for R&D, customer enablement, and ANATEL certification across Latin America. Joining now means more than taking a job — it means shaping a team, a culture, and a way of working from day one. Your fingerprints will be on everything we build here. Learn more about Quectel: Company website — quectel.com Our history & global footprint — quectel.com/company/history LATAM in action — Furukawa Electric LatAm customer story (Brazil) Follow us on LinkedIn The Role Smart modules are where Quectel's cellular tech meets serious compute — Android and Linux platforms with camera, multimedia, and AI capabilities, powering everything from smart POS terminals to AI vision devices and connected industrial equipment. This is a founding-team role at Quectel's brand-new Manaus operation. You'll own the smart-module software story for the LATAM region: drivers, peripheral bring-up, multimedia and camera frameworks, and the customer-facing engineering work that turns Quectel modules into shipping products. Because the team is being built from scratch, you'll help define the technical playbook, the customer engagement model, and the way smart-module work happens here. "Smart modules let you touch the whole stack — kernel drivers, camera HAL, all the way up to Android apps. Doing that as part of a founding team, where you shape how things get built? Even better." What You'll Do Own software development and maintenance for assigned LATAM customer projects on Quectel smart modules. Design and develop camera algorithms — image processing, enhancement, optimization. Bring up and integrate camera and image processing features into customer applications. Run camera testing and tuning across lighting conditions to deliver great image quality. Debug peripheral bring-up issues: MIPI LCD, sensors, MIPI camera, audio/video codecs. Support LATAM customers: develop new SW features, debug their issues, improve the SW stack and demo applications. Collaborate with overseas R&D teams — platform, hardware, FAEs, project managers, QA. Document what you build: design specs, technical analysis reports, knowledge articles. Write clean, scalable, efficient code — and improve the code that's already there. What You Bring Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field. 3–5 years of embedded software experience on Android and/or Linux platforms. Strong C, C++, and Java programming skills. Solid Linux internals and system programming knowledge; RTOS exposure is a plus. Experience with the embedded software development lifecycle. Hands-on experience with Android applications, HAL, and multimedia frameworks (GStreamer, CamX, OpenCV, OpenGL). Linux device driver development and peripheral bring-up experience (MIPI LCD, sensors, MIPI camera, audio/video codecs). Comfort with hardware/software integration and debugging. Day-to-day experience with Git and Agile workflows. Strong problem-solving skills and customer-friendly communication. Fluent in English and Portuguese; Spanish is a plus. Bonus Points For AI / machine learning experience for image analysis. Familiarity with Qualcomm camera frameworks (CamX / Chi-CDK). Prior FAE or customer-engineering experience in the LATAM region. The Tech You'll Work With Quectel's smart module portfolio — Android, Linux, and Yocto-based platforms supporting cameras, displays, audio, GNSS, Wi-Fi/BT, and 5G. Read the deep-dive: "What is a smart module?" by a Quectel product manager. Qualcomm camera frameworks (CamX/Chi-CDK), GStreamer, OpenCV, OpenGL, and AI/ML at the edge. Why You'll Love Working Here Founding-team energy — you're not joining an established office, you're building one. The processes, the culture, the technical playbook — you'll help write it. Real impact from day one — your decisions and designs ship inside products used by millions across LATAM. Backed by a global leader — startup feel, but with the technology, customers, and resources of a 4,000-person publicly-listed IoT company behind you. Direct line to global R&D — work side-by-side with our R&D centers in China, Europe, and North America while staying rooted in Manaus's growing tech ecosystem. Cutting-edge technology — 5G, LPWA, AI at the edge, smart camera modules, and the next generation of connected devices. Career growth on a fast curve — early team members typically grow into senior technical or leadership roles as the operation scales. Customer-facing exposure — directly shape how leading LATAM brands build their connected products. Competitive package — attractive compensation, benefits, and the stability of a global market leader. Compensation & Benefits Competitive base salary aligned with LATAM market benchmarks. Performance bonus / sales commission structure (role dependent). Flexible meal and grocery vouchers (meal allowance / food allowance). Health insurance with no co-pay. Life insurance. Paid time off. International travel opportunities — HQ visits and global trade shows. Ready to Apply? If this sounds like your kind of challenge, we'd love to hear from you. Send your CV (in English) along with a short note about what excites you most about the role. We review applications on a rolling basis. Apply via: | Browse open roles: quectel.com/recruitment Quectel is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to building an inclusive team where everyone can do their best work.

title: Software Engineer
description:
Empresa está contratando Software Engineer em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Software Engineer – IoT Module Founding software engineer for Quectel's new Manaus operation Location Manaus, Amazonas, Brazil Role Software Engineer – IoT Module – LATAM Level Mid-Level (3–5 years of experience) Type Full-Time, On-Site Languages Portuguese & English required · Spanish a plus About Quectel Quectel is one of the world's leading suppliers of cellular IoT modules, antennas, and connectivity services, with more than 4,000 professionals across 8 R&D centers and 50+ sales offices worldwide. Our technology powers everything from smart meters and connected cars to industrial robots and point-of-sale terminals — quietly enabling billions of devices to talk to the cloud. A New Chapter: Quectel in Manaus This is something special. Quectel is launching a brand-new operation in Manaus, Brazil — and we're building the founding team right now. Hosted at ICT Manaus (Instituto Centro de Pesquisa e Desenvolvimento em Tecnologia de Software), an accredited Science, Technology and Innovation Institution under SUFRAMA's CAPDA framework, this new setup will become Quectel's regional engine for R&D, customer enablement, and ANATEL certification across Latin America. Joining now means more than taking a job — it means shaping a team, a culture, and a way of working from day one. Your fingerprints will be on everything we build here. Learn more about Quectel: Company website — quectel.com Our history & global footprint — quectel.com/company/history LATAM in action — Furukawa Electric LatAm customer story (Brazil) Follow us on LinkedIn The Role We're hiring one of the founding software engineers for Quectel's brand-new Manaus setup. You'll work on the embedded Linux software stacks running inside Quectel's cellular IoT modules — Qualcomm-based platforms supporting LTE, 5G, and LPWA technologies — and you'll be the go-to software expert for customers across Latin America. Because the team is being built from scratch, you'll have unusual influence: the tooling, the development workflows, the customer-engagement model, the way we triage and resolve field issues — these are decisions you'll help make, not inherit. You'll collaborate closely with Quectel's global R&D centers while owning the LATAM software story end to end. "You get the depth of an embedded Linux job — kernel, drivers, Yocto — and the rare chance to help build a brand-new operation from day one. That combination doesn't come around often." What You'll Do Design, develop, and maintain software modules for Quectel cellular modems (LTE / 5G / LPWA) on Qualcomm SoCs. Build and tune Linux-based networking systems for IoT devices and gateways — TCP/IP, sockets, routing, the works. Develop device drivers, daemons, and system services on embedded Linux. Hunt down issues across the full stack — kernel, Yocto build system, middleware, and applications. Use Wireshark, tcpdump, and your debugging instincts to crack tough field and lab problems. Support LATAM customers directly: develop new SW features, debug their issues, maintain the SW stack, and improve our demo applications. Partner with hardware, integration, and QA teams during board bring-up and validation. Contribute to architecture decisions and performance optimization for the next generation of modules. What You Bring Bachelor's or Master's in Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field. 3–5 years of experience with embedded Linux, cellular modem development, or both. Hands-on experience with Qualcomm-based modem SoCs and their firmware. Strong C and C++ skills, with a real understanding of microcontroller/microprocessor architecture. Solid knowledge of Linux internals and system programming. Comfort with the Linux network stack and packet analysis tools (Wireshark, tcpdump). Working knowledge of Linux networking: TCP/IP, sockets, routing. Day-to-day experience with Git and Agile workflows. Strong problem-solving skills and the communication chops to work directly with customers. Fluent in English and Portuguese; Spanish is a plus. Bonus Points For Yocto Project or other embedded Linux build framework experience. RTOS exposure. LPWA experience (NB-IoT, LTE-M) and familiarity with cellular certification. Prior FAE or customer-engineering experience in the LATAM region. The Tech You'll Work With Quectel's cellular module portfolio — 5G, LTE-A, LTE Cat 1/4, NB-IoT, and LTE-M, all on Qualcomm SoCs. LATAM in production — see the Furukawa Electric LatAm case study for an example of the kind of work you'll support. Quectel blog & insights — deep dives on cellular IoT, edge compute, and industry trends. Why You'll Love Working Here Founding-team energy — you're not joining an established office, you're building one. The processes, the culture, the technical playbook — you'll help write it. Real impact from day one — your decisions and designs ship inside products used by millions across LATAM. Backed by a global leader — startup feel, but with the technology, customers, and resources of a 4,000-person publicly-listed IoT company behind you. Direct line to global R&D — work side-by-side with our R&D centers in China, Europe, and North America while staying rooted in Manaus's growing tech ecosystem. Cutting-edge technology — 5G, LPWA, AI at the edge, smart camera modules, and the next generation of connected devices. Career growth on a fast curve — early team members typically grow into senior technical or leadership roles as the operation scales. Customer-facing exposure — directly shape how leading LATAM brands build their connected products. Competitive package — attractive compensation, benefits, and the stability of a global market leader. Compensation & Benefits Competitive base salary aligned with LATAM market benchmarks. Performance bonus / sales commission structure (role dependent). Flexible meal and grocery vouchers (meal allowance / food allowance). Health insurance with no co-pay. Life insurance. Paid time off. International travel opportunities — HQ visits and global trade shows. Ready to Apply? If this sounds like your kind of challenge, we'd love to hear from you. title: Hardware Engineer
description:
Empresa está contratando Hardware Engineer em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Hardware Electronics Engineer Be a founding member of Quectel's new LATAM hub in Manaus Location Manaus, Amazonas, Brazil Role Hardware Electronics Engineer – LATAM Level Mid-Level (1-3 years of experience) Type Full-Time, On-Site Languages Portuguese & English required · Spanish a plus About Quectel Quectel is one of the world's leading suppliers of cellular IoT modules, antennas, and connectivity services, with more than 4,000 professionals across 8 R&D centers and 50+ sales offices worldwide. Our technology powers everything from smart meters and connected cars to industrial robots and point-of-sale terminals — quietly enabling billions of devices to talk to the cloud. A New Chapter: Quectel in Manaus This is something special. Quectel is launching a brand-new operation in Manaus, Brazil — and we're building the founding team right now. Hosted at ICT Manaus (Instituto Centro de Pesquisa e Desenvolvimento em Tecnologia de Software), an accredited Science, Technology and Innovation Institution under SUFRAMA's CAPDA framework, this new setup will become Quectel's regional engine for R&D, customer enablement, and ANATEL certification across Latin America. Joining now means more than taking a job — it means shaping a team, a culture, and a way of working from day one. Your fingerprints will be on everything we build here. Learn more about Quectel: Company website — quectel.com Our history & global footprint — quectel.com/company/history LATAM in action — Furukawa Electric LatAm customer story (Brazil) Follow us on LinkedIn The Role We're hiring the founding hardware engineer for Quectel's brand-new Manaus operation. You'll be the first technical point of contact — and the technical voice — for customers across Latin America who are building tomorrow's connected products on Quectel modules: automotive telematics, smart energy, industrial IoT, connected payments, and more. Because this is a new setup, you won't be slotting into someone else's playbook. You'll define how we review designs, how we work with ANATEL labs, how we support customers, and how we train the next engineers who join the team. You'll work hands-on with hardware, sit across the table from customer engineering teams, and partner with Quectel's global R&D centers to bring solutions home for the LATAM market. "Joining a brand-new operation means you're not just doing the work — you're deciding how the work gets done. That's rare, and it's the reason engineers stay." What You'll Do Partner with LATAM customers to understand their products, then design hardware architectures and recommend the right Quectel solutions. Review schematics and PCB layouts in Altium, Cadence, or PADS — and turn your feedback into better, more reliable designs. Get hands-on at the bench: power supply analysis, signal integrity, oscilloscope work, debugging interface and certification issues. Be the trusted technical voice for our LATAM customers — answering tough questions and solving complex problems alongside our global engineering teams. Lead technical discussions with customers and certification labs, including ANATEL homologation activities. Write the application notes, design guidelines, and FAQs that help customers ship faster. Train internal FAE and Sales teams across the region — your expertise will scale across LATAM. Support the project team with BOM preparation for fast, accurate customer quotations. What You Bring Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics, Computer Engineering, or a related field. 3–5 years of hardware design or hardware support experience — bonus if you've worked in customer-facing or FAE roles. Solid grasp of hardware fundamentals: CPU, memory, PMU, system interfaces. Strong skills in power supply design, power sequencing, charging, and power consumption analysis. Comfortable with serial interfaces — I²C, SPI, UART, USIM — for integration and debug. Confident with bench tools: power supplies, multimeters, oscilloscopes. Hands-on with at least one EDA tool (Altium Designer, Cadence, or PADS). Fluent in English and Portuguese; Spanish is a plus. Bonus Points For Experience designing PCBA end-to-end. Deep knowledge of USB 2.0/3.0, USB hub architecture, USB Type-C. Experience with high-speed interfaces: MIPI DSI/CSI, PCIe, SDIO. RF testing experience across cellular (2G/3G/4G/5G) and Wi-Fi 802.11. Background in PC, mobile, server, or FWA system integration. Prior ANATEL homologation experience. Team leadership or technical mentoring experience. The Tech You'll Work With Quectel's full product portfolio — cellular (5G/LTE/LPWA), GNSS, smart modules, and antennas. Quectel services — including device certification work for ANATEL and other regional bodies. See it in action — Quectel customer stories from automotive, smart metering, agribusiness, and more. Why You'll Love Working Here Founding-team energy — you're not joining an established office, you're building one. The processes, the culture, the technical playbook — you'll help write it. Real impact from day one — your decisions and designs ship inside products used by millions across LATAM. Backed by a global leader — startup feel, but with the technology, customers, and resources of a 4,000-person publicly-listed IoT company behind you. Direct line to global R&D — work side-by-side with our R&D centers in China, Europe, and North America while staying rooted in Manaus's growing tech ecosystem. Cutting-edge technology — 5G, LPWA, AI at the edge, smart camera modules, and the next generation of connected devices. Career growth on a fast curve — early team members typically grow into senior technical or leadership roles as the operation scales. Customer-facing exposure — directly shape how leading LATAM brands build their connected products. Competitive package — attractive compensation, benefits, and the stability of a global market leader. Compensation & Benefits Competitive base salary aligned with LATAM market benchmarks. Performance bonus / sales commission structure (role dependent). Flexible meal and grocery vouchers (meal allowance / food allowance). Health insurance with no co-pay. Life insurance. Paid time off. International travel opportunities — HQ visits and global trade shows. Ready to Apply? If this sounds like your kind of challenge, we'd love to hear from you. title: Líder Técnico
description:
Confira a vaga para Líder Técnico em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Sobre a oportunidade: Esta vaga é para quem gosta de liderar pelo exemplo e construir sistemas que saem do PowerPoint para operar no mundo real. A GETTER procura um líder técnico com profundidade suficiente para discutir arquitetura, orientar trade-offs, acelerar execução entre squads e manter padrão de entrega num projeto que mistura IA, visão computacional, integrações, produto operacional em contexto industrial crítico e de escala global. Aqui, liderança técnica significa entrar nos problemas, discutir arquitetura, acelerar execução e elevar o padrão do sistema. Teste curto: Um case realista de arquitetura envolvendo IA, integrações e operação industrial. Em seu portfólio público, a empresa apresenta o SAFETY, focado em segurança e ergonomia com alertas e dashboards; o PLUS, focado em contagem de produção, inspeção de qualidade e aumento de produtividade via IA; e o Menthor, assistente virtual treinado com os dados reais da operação e integrado a documentos, ERP e bancos de dados. A proposta da GETTER é transformar dados operacionais em consciência, decisão e ação no mundo físico. Sobre o Projeto O escopo envolve visão computacional, modelos de IA, Digital Twin 3D, LLMs, geração automática de instruções, modelos preditivos, dashboards operacionais e integrações com o ecossistema fabril. A oportunidade é especialmente aderente para pessoas que gostam de construir software e IA conectados ao mundo físico, com impacto direto em produtividade, segurança, decisão operacional e melhoria contínua.

title: Gerente comercial
description:
Empresa está contratando Gerente comercial em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Buscamos um Gerente Comercial que tenha a combinação na experiência comercial, conhecimento regional e habilidades de liderança adaptadas a cenários desafiadores do interior de Manaus. Requisitos Necessários: Sólida experiência na atuação como Gerente ou Coordenador de Vendas, com foco no varejo alimentar ou bebidas. Conhecimento Regional: Experiência prática na atuação dos municípios do interior do Amazonas (ex: Parintins, Itacoatiara, Manacapuru, Coari, Tefé, Tabatinga, etc.). É importante compreender a logística da região, incluindo o transporte e a influência do regime das águas (vazante e enchente) no abastecimento e nos prazos de entrega. Possui Ensino Superior Completo nas áreas de Administração, Economia, Marketing, Logística ou áreas afins. Domínio do Pacote Office (especialmente Excel para análise de dados de sell-in e sell-out), familiaridade com sistemas de roteirização e ferramentas de BI para acompanhamento de indicadores. Graduação completa em administração ou área afins. Principais Responsabilidades e Desafios Liderança de Supervisores : Gerir, treinar e desenvolver a equipe de Supervisores de Vendas distribuídos garantindo o alinhamento com as diretrizes da regional. Capitão de Marcas (Embaixador) : Atuar como o representante das marcas no interior, desenvolvendo o time para garantir a excelência na execução no ponto de venda e ajudar no desenvolvimento dos programas de excelência com as indústrias. Gestão de Metas e Abastecimento: Definir e desdobrar as metas do time de acordo com o objetivo mensal, levando em consideração o lead time logístico de cada região para evitar rupturas . Monitoramento de KPIs : Acompanhar rigorosamente indicadores como volume, faturamento, mix de produtos e movimentação. Gerar relatórios analíticos sobre o desempenho da equipe, sugerindo melhorias e novas abordagens de vendas. Participar de agendas semanais de resultado e alinhamento de estratégia de negócio .

title: Assistente de Controladoria | Vaga Inclusiva (PCD)
description:
Confira a vaga para Assistente de Controladoria | Vaga Inclusiva (PCD) em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Assistente de Controladoria | Vaga Inclusiva (PCD) A Blaster Explosivos é uma empresa líder no mercado de explosivos e perfuração de rochas no Norte do país, com mais de 29 anos de atuação e presença em diversos estados brasileiros. Com sede em Palmas (TO), somos reconhecidos pela nossa expertise técnica e compromisso com soluções seguras e inovadoras. Incentivamos a candidatura de pessoas com deficiência (PCD). Esta vaga é inclusiva e não exclusiva, sendo aberta a todos os profissionais que atendam aos requisitos. Estamos em busca de um(a) Assistente de Controladoria para atuar no suporte às rotinas contábeis, fiscais e de controladoria, garantindo a qualidade das informações, o cumprimento de prazos e o apoio à tomada de decisão estratégica da empresa. Principais Responsabilidades Realizar conferências e validações de informações fiscais, contábeis e financeiras registradas no SAP. Acompanhar a integração e a consistência dos lançamentos entre os processos operacionais, financeiros, fiscais e contábeis. Efetuar conciliações e conferências de contas e relatórios, identificando divergências e propondo melhorias nos processos. Apoiar as rotinas de fechamento contábil e gerencial, garantindo a qualidade e a confiabilidade das informações. Suporte às áreas internas em temas relacionados a cadastros, tributação, faturamento e processos fiscais. Atuar como interface entre a empresa e os prestadores de serviços em temas contábeis e fiscais, acompanhando demandas e garantindo o cumprimento de prazos. Apoiar o atendimento às auditorias internas e externas, providenciando documentos, relatórios e esclarecimentos quando necessário. Participar de iniciativas de melhoria contínua dos controles internos e processos das áreas contábil, fiscal e financeira. Requisitos Ensino superior cursando ou concluído em Ciências Contábeis Conhecimento de processos contábeis e fiscais Excel intermediário a avançado Experiência com ERP (SAP será um diferencial) Familiaridade com ferramentas de BI Residir em Palmas – TO Se você quer atuar de forma ativa na construção e melhoria dos processos financeiros e de controladoria, venha fazer parte do nosso time!

title: Personal trainers — capte novos alunos através dos desafios do acadenutri
description:
Confira a vaga para Personal trainers — capte novos alunos através dos desafios do acadenutri em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Descrição da vaga Se você é personal trainer e quer aumentar sua base de alunos, essa oportunidade é para você. O Acadenutri é uma plataforma que conecta profissionais de educação física a pessoas que estão buscando acompanhamento, treino e melhora da qualidade de vida. Como funciona: • Centenas de pessoas entram na plataforma por meio dos nossos desafios de 7 e 14 dias, aumentando a demanda por acompanhamento profissional. • Os profissionais parceiros do Acadenutri podem captar novos alunos através desses desafios e monetizar diretamente seus atendimentos. • Além das ferramentas de acompanhamento profissional, os profissionais recebem acesso completo às ferramentas da plataforma: — aplicativo para alunos — sistema administrativo para anamneses, avaliações físicas, criação de treinos e gestão de atendimentos — acompanhamento de treinos — recursos de atendimento e organização • Para participar da plataforma, é necessário possuir uma assinatura ativa do Acadenutri. Após a ativação, os profissionais recebem acesso à comunidade oficial dos desafios para networking, suporte e oportunidades de atendimento. • Profissionais com plano anual participam dos desafios sem custo adicional. Modelo: Modelo de atuação baseado em autonomia profissional e atendimentos independentes através da plataforma. Para quem é: • Personal trainers que querem mais alunos • Profissionais com perfil proativo • Interesse em atendimento online ou presencial Como fazer parte: • Baixar o aplicativo Acadenutri • Criar seu perfil profissional • Completar seu perfil profissional na plataforma Buscamos profissionais comprometidos, humanizados e interessados em crescer junto com a plataforma. Se você acredita que treino vai além da estética e pode transformar vidas, queremos conhecer você. O Acadenutri está construindo uma rede integrada entre saúde, treino e acompanhamento profissional personalizado. Estamos expandindo nossa rede de profissionais parceiros neste momento.

title: Emerging market trader
description:
Empresa está contratando Emerging market trader em boa vista. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Role Overview We are seeking a highly skilled Emerging Markets FX Trader with deep expertise in African/LATAM/Asian currencies to join our global trading & liquidity team. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience managing illiquid and restricted FX markets, executing OTC and interbank trades, and designing robust hedging and liquidity frameworks to support high-volume cross-border payment flows. This role requires both strong trading capability and infrastructure expertise, including building and optimizing FX trading systems, hedging engines, and liquidity connectivity with banks, brokers, and OTC counterparties. Key Responsibilities FX Trading & Liquidity Management Manage proprietary and flow-driven FX trading positions across Emerging Market currencies, with a focus on African (e.g., NGN, KES, ZAR, GHS), LATAM (ARS, BRL, MXN) and/or Asian (IDR, VDN, etc.) on markets. Source and maintain deep liquidity relationships with banks, brokers, and OTC desks across relevant regions. Execute spot, forwards, NDFs, swaps, and OTC trades to optimize execution quality and manage currency exposure. Monitor market developments, capital controls, and liquidity dynamics across EM FX markets. Hedging Strategy & Risk Management Design and implement FX hedging strategies to manage corporate or client-driven exposures. Optimize hedging efficiency across multiple liquidity venues including banks, ECNs, OTC desks, and crypto liquidity pools where relevant. Develop models for dynamic hedging, inventory risk management, and spread optimization. Monitor risk limits, Pn L, and exposure across currency books. Trading Infrastructure & Systems Work closely with engineering and product teams to build and enhance FX trading and hedging infrastructure, including: Automated hedging engines Liquidity aggregation systems Smart order routing Pricing and risk management tools Integrate connectivity with banks, ECNs, and liquidity providers via APIs or FIX protocols. Improve execution automation, latency optimization, and real-time exposure monitoring. Market Development Identify and onboard new liquidity providers and OTC trading partners across emerging markets. Build pricing frameworks for illiquid currency pairs and support new corridor launches. Contribute to the development of scalable FX infrastructure supporting global payments and settlement flows. Requirements Experience 5–10+ years of FX trading experience in Emerging Markets. Strong experience trading African currencies, such as: Africa: NGN, KES, ZAR, GHS, EGP Experience working at: Global banks EM FX trading firms Payment / fintech companies Crypto exchanges or market makers Proven experience executing OTC and institutional-sized FX trades. Technical Expertise Deep understanding of: FX market microstructure in illiquid markets NDF markets and offshore hedging Capital controls and FX regulatory frameworks Hands-on experience building or optimizing: FX trading systems Hedging engines Liquidity aggregation platforms Familiarity with FIX connectivity, API-based trading systems, and algorithmic execution. Skills Strong quantitative and analytical capabilities. Ability to operate in high-volatility and fragmented liquidity environments. Strong network within EM FX liquidity providers and OTC trading desks. Excellent communication and cross-functional collaboration skills. Preferred Qualifications Experience supporting high-volume cross-border payment flows or treasury operations. Experience trading EM FX through both traditional banks and alternative liquidity sources. Familiarity with stablecoin / crypto liquidity markets in emerging economies. Background in building or scaling FX market-making operations. Strong analytical and problem solving skills Ability to operate across global teams and fast paced environments Vision & Mission OSL is the first SFC-licensed digital asset platform in Hong Kong and a Pay Fi innovator. Through stablecoin payments, cross-border settlement and global licensing, we are building the next-generation payments network. Stablecoins have become everyday money across emerging markets and are widely viewed as blockchain's "killer app," with industry focus shifting from token issuance to real-world consumer and enterprise payment adoption. The strongest growth lies in cross-border B2 B payments, where providers embedding stablecoins into corporate settlement flows can capture significant volume and float. Long-term defensibility comes from regulatory licences, banking partners and cross-border corridors. OSL holds or has acquired licences in Hong Kong, Japan, Australia, Bermuda and Indonesia, and is expanding into Europe, Brazil, Southeast Asia and Africa through acquisitions and licence applications. With OSL Pay and Stable X, we embed stablecoin settlement into bank accounts and card networks, support 150+ digital assets, and provide 24/7 fiat–stablecoin conversion. As a regulated pioneer with a startup mindset, we believe the future of payments will be driven by real adoption and scalable deployment, not technology narratives. We welcome builders who are passionate about crypto and payments to join us in shaping compliant, global payment infrastructure.

title: Paid ads qa auditor - global
description:
Confira a vaga para Paid ads qa auditor - global em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Are you obsessive about catching what others miss? Do you notice inconsistencies without being told where to look? Do you get satisfaction from identifying errors before they become problems? Final question: when faced with a challenge, do you get excited or run away? If that sounds like you, you may be the perfect fit for our Paid Ads QA role. At Crisp, we're on a mission to help 10,000 law firms each grow their revenue by $10,000,000 over the next 10 years, creating a $10 billion impact in the legal industry. Our Paid Ads team is responsible for executing paid media campaigns that power our law firm clients' brand awareness and growth across major digital platforms. These campaigns are deployed across hundreds of client accounts and multiple platforms simultaneously. This role exists to ensure those campaigns are executed accurately, consistently, and in alignment with internal standards and client intent. This is a non-client-facing, audit-focused role that requires extreme attention to detail, strong system thinking, and the discipline to identify and document discrepancies with zero tolerance for preventable error. However, it is not a "task-ing" role, or a role where you'll be constantly told what to do - you'll be expected to self-sufficiently spot and correct errors, but most importantly, get ahead of them before even happening, including improving existing systems. ** IMPORTANT: TO APPLY ** You will be evaluated and vetted based on your ability to follow instructions: Follow this Willo link (recorded interview platform), and answer the few questions on there, first. Then reply to the ad, stating you've completed the Willo, and we will be in touch. Key Responsibilities Include: Campaign Audit & Validation Audit paid advertising campaigns across Meta, Google Ads, Linked In, Tik Tok, streaming platforms, and others Verify that the correct creative assets, ad copy, and campaign structures are deployed on the correct client accounts Ensure campaigns align with intended funnel stages and approved execution parameters Execution Accuracy & Cross-Account Integrity Identify discrepancies such as: Incorrect assets deployed to the wrong client Mismatched ad copy or campaign configurations Inconsistent implementation across platforms Ensure campaign execution matches internal direction and client-specific setup Budget & Pacing Verification Audit campaign budgets to ensure alignment with approved allocations Identify risks of underdelivery or overspend Validate that budget adjustments and reallocations are executed correctly Tracking, Links & Technical QA Verify accuracy and functionality of: URLs and landing pages UTM parameters and tracking links Pixel and tag implementation (where applicable) Identify gaps in tracking integrity and flag inconsistencies Instruction Fidelity & Change Validation Compare campaign execution against: Internal strategy direction Client Success Manager requests Campaign updates or pivots Ensure requested changes are implemented accurately and completely Audit Documentation & Communication Document audit findings clearly, with supporting context and evidence Categorize issues based on severity (e.g., minor discrepancy vs. critical error) Communicate findings in a structured format that enables efficient resolution Audit Operations (Evolving Scope) This role may operate across a range of audit models depending on business needs, including: Audit Cadence: Pre-launch validation Post-launch verification Ongoing daily, weekly, or periodic audits Audit Coverage: Full account audits Targeted sampling across accounts Audit Depth: Surface-level validation (assets, placements, links) Deeper audits (budget pacing, tracking, structural accuracy) Ownership Scope: Identifying and flagging discrepancies Recommending corrective actions Supporting enforcement of quality standards Our requirements are pretty straightforward. To qualify you must: Be highly detail-oriented — you catch inconsistencies others miss Think in structured processes, checklists, and systems Be proactive in identifying issues and asking clarifying questions Be comfortable operating with incomplete information and making sound judgments Have strong written communication skills Be tech-savvy and able to learn new platforms quickly Be comfortable working in a fast-paced, high-volume environment Preferred Experience: Experience auditing or QA-ing digital campaigns (launches, changes, tracking) Familiarity with UTM structures, tracking links, and link verification Experience working with dashboards or reporting tools Experience using project management or task tracking tools (Asana, Monday, etc.) Nice to Have: Salesforce or CRM familiarity Experience with Supermetrics or similar data connectors Familiarity with Google Looker Studio or similar dashboards Experience documenting processes or building SOPs Experience in a fast-paced, multi-client environment Platform Exposure (Preferred, Not Required): Meta Ads Manager Google Ads Google Tag Manager (GTM) Tik Tok Ads Linked In Ads Trade Desk Why Our Work Matters: Lawyers go to law school to learn how to practice law, but law school doesn't teach them how to run a business. In a world where the best cases often go to the best marketers, legal expertise alone isn't enough. That's where Crisp comes in. We partner with committed, growth-minded law firms that care deeply about their teams, clients, and communities. Often, it's a David vs. Goliath scenario, where the most dedicated attorneys lack the resources of their larger competitors. Our work levels the playing field by giving law firms access to world-class marketing execution that helps them stand out, build authority, and grow sustainably. About Crisp: Crisp has been recognized on the Inc. 5000 (Fastest Growing Private Companies in the U. S. – 2024, 2022, 2021, 2020, 2019, 2018, 2017), as well as Atlanta's Top 100 Fastest Growing Private Companies (2025, 2024, 2023, 2022, 2021, 2020, 2019, 2018, 2017, 2016) and Atlanta's Best Places to Work (2024, 2023, 2022). Crisp () is the nation's fastest-growing law firm growth company. We've helped thousands of attorneys — from solo and small firms to large practices — build their brand, differentiate themselves from competitors, attract better cases, and earn millions in new revenue. Crisp has been featured in Forbes, Inc., Avvo, ABA Journal, The Trial Lawyer, Huffington Post, and The Wall Street Journal. OUR BOOK: The Game Changing Attorney (available on Amazon and Barnes & Noble) OUR PODCAST: The Game Changing Attorney Podcast Why You Should Work Here: You will work inside a structured, high-performance marketing operation You will contribute to campaigns running at scale across hundreds of accounts You will play a direct role in improving execution accuracy and system reliability You will be trusted to identify and surface critical issues This is not a role for someone looking for easy work or vague expectations. This is a role for someone who takes pride in enforcing standards, identifying errors, and ensuring systems operate correctly. ** IMPORTANT: TO APPLY ** You will be evaluated and vetted based on your ability to follow instructions: Follow this Willo link (recorded interview platform), and answer the few questions on there, first. Then reply to the ad, stating you've completed the Willo, and we will be in touch.

Advantage: Experience in software development. Knowledge of cloud infrastructure and services (AWS, Azure, OCI, Google Cloud). Advantage: Experience with supply chain, distribution, and interface technologies.

This role requires both strong trading capability and infrastructure expertise, including building and optimizing FX trading systems, hedging engines, and liquidity connectivity with banks, brokers, and OTC counterparties. Key Responsibilities FX Trading & Liquidity Management Manage proprietary and flow-driven FX trading positions across Emerging Market currencies, with a focus on African (e.g., NGN, KES, ZAR, GHS) or LATAM (e.g., BRL, MXN, COP, ARS) markets. Source and maintain deep liquidity relationships with banks, brokers, and OTC desks across relevant regions. Execute spot, forwards, NDFs, swaps, and OTC trades to optimize execution quality and manage currency exposure. Monitor market developments, capital controls, and liquidity dynamics across EM FX markets. Hedging Strategy & Risk Management Design and implement FX hedging strategies to manage corporate or client-driven exposures. Optimize hedging efficiency across multiple liquidity venues including banks, ECNs, OTC desks, and crypto liquidity pools where relevant. Develop models for dynamic hedging, inventory risk management, and spread optimization. Monitor risk limits, Pn L, and exposure across currency books. Trading Infrastructure & Systems Work closely with engineering and product teams to build and enhance FX trading and hedging infrastructure, including: Automated hedging engines Liquidity aggregation systems Smart order routing Pricing and risk management tools Integrate connectivity with banks, ECNs, and liquidity providers via APIs or FIX protocols. Improve execution automation, latency optimization, and real-time exposure monitoring. Market Development Identify and onboard new liquidity providers and OTC trading partners across emerging markets. Build pricing frameworks for illiquid currency pairs and support new corridor launches. Contribute to the development of scalable FX infrastructure supporting global payments and settlement flows. Requirements Experience 5–10+ years of FX trading experience in Emerging Markets. Strong experience trading African or LATAM currencies, such as: Africa: NGN, KES, ZAR, GHS, EGP LATAM: BRL, MXN, COP, CLP, ARS Experience working at: Global banks EM FX trading firms Payment / fintech companies Crypto exchanges or market makers Proven experience executing OTC and institutional-sized FX trades. Technical Expertise Deep understanding of: FX market microstructure in illiquid markets NDF markets and offshore hedging Capital controls and FX regulatory frameworks Hands-on experience building or optimizing: FX trading systems Hedging engines Liquidity aggregation platforms Familiarity with FIX connectivity, API-based trading systems, and algorithmic execution. Skills Strong quantitative and analytical capabilities. Ability to operate in high-volatility and fragmented liquidity environments. Strong network within EM FX liquidity providers and OTC trading desks. Excellent communication and cross-functional collaboration skills. Preferred Qualifications Experience supporting high-volume cross-border payment flows or treasury operations. Experience trading EM FX through both traditional banks and alternative liquidity sources. Familiarity with stablecoin / crypto liquidity markets in emerging economies. Background in building or scaling FX market-making operations. Strong analytical and problem solving skills Ability to operate across global teams and fast paced environments Vision & Mission OSL is the first SFC-licensed digital asset platform in Hong Kong and a Pay Fi innovator. Through stablecoin payments, cross-border settlement and global licensing, we are building the next-generation payments network. Stablecoins have become everyday money across emerging markets and are widely viewed as blockchain's "killer app," with industry focus shifting from token issuance to real-world consumer and enterprise payment adoption. The strongest growth lies in cross-border B2 B payments, where providers embedding stablecoins into corporate settlement flows can capture significant volume and float. Long-term defensibility comes from regulatory licences, banking partners and cross-border corridors. OSL holds or has acquired licences in Hong Kong, Japan, Australia, Bermuda and Indonesia, and is expanding into Europe, Brazil, Southeast Asia and Africa through acquisitions and licence applications. With OSL Pay and Stable X, we embed stablecoin settlement into bank accounts and card networks, support 150+ digital assets, and provide 24/7 fiat–stablecoin conversion. As a regulated pioneer with a startup mindset, we believe the future of payments will be driven by real adoption and scalable deployment, not technology narratives. We welcome builders who are passionate about crypto and payments to join us in shaping compliant, global payment infrastructure.

title: Personal trainers — capte novos alunos através dos desafios do acadenutri
description:
Confira a vaga para Personal trainers — capte novos alunos através dos desafios do acadenutri em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Descrição da vaga Se você é personal trainer e quer aumentar sua base de alunos, essa oportunidade é para você. O Acadenutri é uma plataforma que conecta profissionais de educação física a pessoas que estão buscando acompanhamento, treino e melhora da qualidade de vida. Como funciona: • Centenas de pessoas entram na plataforma por meio dos nossos desafios de 7 e 14 dias, aumentando a demanda por acompanhamento profissional. • Os profissionais parceiros do Acadenutri podem captar novos alunos através desses desafios e monetizar diretamente seus atendimentos. • Além das ferramentas de acompanhamento profissional, os profissionais recebem acesso completo às ferramentas da plataforma: — aplicativo para alunos — sistema administrativo para anamneses, avaliações físicas, criação de treinos e gestão de atendimentos — acompanhamento de treinos — recursos de atendimento e organização • Para participar da plataforma, é necessário possuir uma assinatura ativa do Acadenutri. Após a ativação, os profissionais recebem acesso à comunidade oficial dos desafios para networking, suporte e oportunidades de atendimento. • Profissionais com plano anual participam dos desafios sem custo adicional. Modelo: Modelo de atuação baseado em autonomia profissional e atendimentos independentes através da plataforma. Para quem é: • Personal trainers que querem mais alunos • Profissionais com perfil proativo • Interesse em atendimento online ou presencial Como fazer parte: • Baixar o aplicativo Acadenutri • Criar seu perfil profissional • Completar seu perfil profissional na plataforma Buscamos profissionais comprometidos, humanizados e interessados em crescer junto com a plataforma. Se você acredita que treino vai além da estética e pode transformar vidas, queremos conhecer você. O Acadenutri está construindo uma rede integrada entre saúde, treino e acompanhamento profissional personalizado. Estamos expandindo nossa rede de profissionais parceiros neste momento.

title: Bookkeeper
description:
Nova oportunidade para Bookkeeper em rio branco. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Join Aerial Core - the back office that keeps pace with your ambition Aerial Core is a modern, tech-enabled back-office partner that supports growing businesses through accounting, finance, and people operations services. We've intentionally broken the mold of traditional accounting firms by placing relationships, collaboration, and innovation at the center of how we work. At Aerial Core, we believe accounting should be more than compliance, it should be strategic, insightful, and human-driven. Our people-first culture values trust, independence, and efficiency, empowering every team member to do their best work while helping clients thrive. We're now looking for a tech-savvy, detail-oriented Bookkeeper to join our remote team. Please be informed that this is a contractor position and we will require your CNPJ, this is the perfect opportunity for professionals who value autonomy, flexibility and performance based rewards. You'll work directly with clients, manage their day-to-day financial operations, and leverage technology to deliver accurate, timely, and strategic bookkeeping support. What You'll Do Handle full-cycle bookkeeping for assigned clients, including AP/AR, bank reconciliations, and month-end close. Maintain accurate financial data using Quick Books or other cloud-based accounting tools. Prepare clear, insightful financial reports that help clients make better decisions. Communicate with clients and team members through Slack, Zoom, and Google Workspace. Use Asana and Everhour to track projects, deliverables, and timelines. Proactively identify ways to improve processes, automate tasks, and increase efficiency. Prepare necessary documentation and reports for internal and external audit processes. Ensure compliance with accounting standards and Aerial Core's quality expectations. What We're Looking For Fluent in English Proven experience in bookkeeping or accounting Flexibility around working hours, with the understanding that some tasks may require availability during US business hours (mainly Pacific Time) Strong attention to detail, organization, and accuracy Excellent communication skills and ability to manage multiple clients independently Comfortable working in a fast-paced, remote-first environment using digital tools. Nice to Have Experience with Asana and Everhour or any other workflow automation tools Familiarity with CRMs or project management systems such as Asana Prior experience working with startups or small businesses Why You'll Love Working With Us At Aerial Core, we do things differently: Trust and Independence: You are your own boss. We trust your expertise and give you the freedom to manage your time and workload. Efficiency and Innovation: We embrace technology and encourage experimentation. If you find a better way to work, we'll support it. Collaboration and Growth: We win as a team. Our culture is built on helping each other, learning together, and celebrating shared success. Performance-Driven Rewards: Your efforts directly impact your earnings. You'll receive a retainer contract of R$3,300 with the option to qualify for more contracts. Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere, anytime as long as deadlines are met and excellence is maintained. The Aerial Core Way Relationships over Transactions: We build lasting relationships by deeply understanding our clients and delivering real value. Strategic Thinking & Judgment: We go beyond the surface, identifying root causes and providing actionable insights. Open Communication: We value transparency and see mistakes as opportunities for growth. Excellence & Accountability: We aim for 10/10 work — delivered early, reviewed thoroughly, and executed with care. Ready to do accounting differently? Join a modern, digital-first team where your independence, innovation, and impact truly matter.

title: Líder técnico
description:
Empresa está contratando Líder técnico em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Lidere arquitetura e execução em um projeto raro de IA industrial aplicada Contratação PJ | Manaus/AM | presencial com possibilidade híbrida | projeto inicial de 12 meses, com provável extensão. Sobre a oportunidade: Esta vaga é para quem gosta de liderar pelo exemplo e construir sistemas que saem do Power Point para operar no mundo real. A GETTER procura um líder técnico com profundidade suficiente para discutir arquitetura, orientar trade-offs, acelerar execução entre squads e manter padrão de entrega num projeto que mistura IA, visão computacional, integrações, produto operacional em contexto industrial crítico e de escala global. Aqui, liderança técnica significa entrar nos problemas, discutir arquitetura, acelerar execução e elevar o padrão do sistema. O que você vai construir: direção técnica do projeto; padrões de integração; critérios de qualidade; cadência entre pesquisa, engenharia e produto. Responsabilidades-chave: priorizar risco técnico; revisar arquitetura; orientar times; apoiar decisões de build/buy; garantir consistência entre componentes. Sucesso 30/90/180d: 30d mapear riscos e dependências; 90d estabilizar fluxo técnico e previsibilidade das entregas; 180d reduzir retrabalhoe elevar previsibilidade de entrega. Must-have: liderança hands-on; arquitetura; inglês; integração; qualidade de software; comunicação com múltiplos perfis. Nice-to-have: IA industrial; Digital Twin; cloud; sistemas distribuídos. Stack: arquitetura de sistemas, APIs, mensageria, cloud, observabilidade. Screening questions: Já liderou squad técnico multidisciplinar?; Continua confortável codando/revisando com profundidade?; Já tomou decisões de arquitetura em ambiente com dados/IA?; Aceita presencial em Manaus? Teste curto: Um case realista de arquitetura envolvendo IA, integrações e operação industrial. Avaliamos capacidade de estruturar sistemas, discutir trade-offs e transformar ambição técnica em execução pragmática. Fluxo/SLA/pessoas: padrão; painel final com liderança executiva + produto + arquitetura. Contrato PJ: R$ 12k–17k + upside conforme senioridade, evolução e impacto no projeto. O tipo de desafio que você vai enfrentar Sistemas operando em tempo real em ambiente industrial Integração entre IA, visão computacional, dashboards e operação Trade-offs entre performance, custo, robustez e escalabilidade Arquitetura para ambientes críticos e conectividade imperfeita Evolução contínua de modelos e produto em operação viva Construção de software orientado a impacto físico e operacional Sobre a GETTER A GETTER S. A. é uma empresa brasileira de IA industrial em crescimento acelerado, especializada em elevar performance, qualidade e segurança por meio de visão computacional, IA generativa e automação de processos. Em seu portfólio público, a empresa apresenta o SAFETY, focado em segurança e ergonomia com alertas e dashboards; o PLUS, focado em contagem de produção, inspeção de qualidade e aumento de produtividade via IA; e o Menthor, assistentevirtual treinado com os dados reais da operação e integrado a documentos, ERP e bancos de dados. A proposta da GETTER é transformar dados operacionais em consciência, decisão e ação no mundo físico. Sobre o Projeto O escopo envolve visão computacional, modelos de IA, Digital Twin 3 D, LLMs, geração automática de instruções, modelos preditivos, dashboards operacionais e integrações com o ecossistema fabril. A oportunidade é especialmente aderente para pessoas que gostam de construir software e IA conectados ao mundo físico, com impacto direto em produtividade, segurança, decisão operacional e melhoria contínua.

title: Analista de departamento pessoal

title: Forward deployed engineer (golang)
description:
Nova oportunidade para Forward deployed engineer (golang) em palmas. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Location: Brazil Remote Department: Engineering Employment Type: Contract (B2 B) Contract Length: 6 months About YLD: Our goal is to help our clients keep moving forward. We work with them to build the skills and capabilities they need to stay ahead of the competition, and we know our success only happens when they succeed. We're a team of curious, talented people, and we're committed to making YLD a place where great people want to work, grow, and stay. We're a remote-first consultancy specialising in software engineering, product design, and data. Our teams are based across London, Lisbon, and Porto, and we create digital solutions that continue to deliver value long after our work is done. About the role: As a Forward Deployment Engineer at YLD, you'll be part of a client team building innovative products. We're looking for someone curious, passionate, driven, and enthusiastic. You should be skilled in problem-solving and experienced in designing scalable, resilient, and fault-tolerant architectures. You're also an effective communicator and a strong team player. Together with your team, you'll thrive in a fast-paced engineering environment, delivering outstanding results and exciting projects. Your day-to-day responsibilities can look like this: Design, build, and maintain robust backend and infrastructure systems using Golang and Java with contributions across the broader engineering stack Work closely with client teams in collaborative working sessions, explaining technical decisions and translating complex engineering concepts clearly Deploy and manage cloud infrastructure across AWS and GCP using Kubernetes (EKS/GKE), Terraform, and Flux Actively leverage AI-powered tools and workflows to accelerate development, improve code quality, and drive engineering best practices Preferred skills: Strong backend and infrastructure engineering background, with hands-on Golang and Java experience; Experience developing or integrating decentralised systems, data infrastructure, or distributed technologies; Solid command of cloud infrastructure: AWS, GCP, Kubernetes (EKS/GKE), Terraform, and Flux; Actively and meaningfully using AI tools in day-to-day coding practice (not just awareness, but advanced, habitual use); Familiarity with Tiger Beetle, Yugabyte DB, or Red Panda; Experience in fintech, core banking, or regulated financial services environments; Open to occasional travel to London. You should apply if you are: Proactive: You take ownership and move things forward without waiting to be asked; A strong communicator: you express technical ideas clearly, in writing and in client-facing conversations, with full professional fluency in English; Confident presenting: you bring a polished, engaged attitude to working sessions and stakeholder interactions; Focused on quality: you care about doing things properly and hold yourself to a high standard; Pragmatic: you make sensible trade-offs and deliver results in ambiguous, fast-moving environments; A creative problem solver: you approach hard engineering challenges with curiosity and ingenuity; Collaborative: you thrive on working within cross-functional, distributed teams and value others' input. What you'll get in return: The chance to work with a forward-thinking, ethical, and fun group of people and to develop and grow your skills in a fast-moving business Our typical recruitment process: 1st Interview with someone from the Talent team (30/45 mins) Technical Interview with our Senior Developers (1h30) Final chat with our Client Partner (30/45 mins) Get a glimpse of what it's like working at YLD! Check out our Linked In page We're an equal-opportunity employer and value diversity in all its forms. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, pregnancy or maternity, age, marital status, or disability. We also offer a remote-first working environment, with flexible working and work–life balance as standard for all employees.

title: Advanced after effects youtube video editor
description:
Nova oportunidade para Advanced after effects youtube video editor em rio branco. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

IMPORTANT: In order to apply, complete the test in After Effects (99% won't do it)! Copy and paste this link into your browser to get started: CVideo Editing Test2026 If you just use Linked In's \"Easy Apply\" you will not be considered for this role. Overview: We are 100 C (), an 8-person You Tube agency based in the United States that creates and grows You Tube channels for business owners. We need a new ADVANCED You Tube editor experienced in After Effects to take over for one of our well-established clients. About the role: We do all of our video editing (except for color grading and sound) in After Effects, so we're looking for a video editor who is skilled with the software. Your role will be handling all the video editing for one of our well-established clients. Your job will include everything necessary to make professional You Tube videos, such as: Color grading Trimming Audio post production Planning the appropriate visuals for each video Finding footage and imagery that match our clients' branding Using AI effectively to generate custom visuals Laying out media Importing and using motion graphic templates Creating custom animations Creating AI avatars (we'll show you how) Finding and editing appropriate music Finding and editing appropriate sound effects Strategic editing (understanding what to cut, what to include, and how to structure it for maximum engagement) Here is a reel of our work to give you an idea of the type of video editing we do: ZYachn4 Our Values: It's important that you are in alignment with our values. If this doesn't sound like you, do NOT apply: Quality First - We are a PREMIUM agency, so it's important that you're driven to constantly do your best work and take your skills to the next level. If you're just looking for a job that is easy to do and doesn't require you to think carefully about your editing, this role is NOT for you. High Accountability - You want to take responsibility for your successes AND your failures. If we call you out for doing poor-quality work or delivering late, you have the emotional maturity to take ownership for it and use that to drive you to do better next time. Directness - We don't beat around the bush. If you do great work, we praise you and let you know. Similarly, if something is bad, we tell you it's bad. If you can't take direct criticism, this role is NOT for you. Independence - You are good at solving your own problems. We are here to help, and will go out of our way to train you and make you feel comfortable in your role, but you should be eager to own this position and do it well without us needing to constantly push you. Additional Requirements: Below is a list of additional requirements for the job, please read through it carefully before applying: Advanced English proficiency Available the equivalent of full-time (at least 40 hours per week) Willing to work on weekends when necessary Available to start within the next two weeks Advanced After Effects skills: 3 D, Rotoscoping, Masking, Motion tracking, Keying, Expressions Have a "design eye": the ability to create and follow aesthetic branding guidelines Professional, meaning you deliver professional-grade work on time Highly responsive The Offer: If hired, we will provide free copies of all the plugins we use ($500 in tools), pay for your Magnific (formerly Freepik) and Envato accounts, and teach you how to edit videos in After Effects the same way we do. Your starting pay will be $1,500-$2,500 USD per month depending on your skill level. Once you show us that you can complete the work without needing much feedback, we will increase your monthly base by $500 USD. You can also earn a performance bonus of $500 USD every month. So you have potential to be making as much as $3,500 USD/mo within months of starting (if you're good). The Test: In order to evaluate candidates, we have developed a test of your After Effects video editing skills, below are instructions and links to all the files you will need to complete it: In order to apply, please copy and paste the link below into your browser to take a quick test in After Effects. It includes all the materials you will need to complete it, along with step-by-step instructions: CVideo Editing Test2026 If you just use Linked In's \"Easy Apply\" you will not be considered for this role. The deadline to submit your finished video is Friday, May 29th. If your submission is good, we will reach out to schedule an interview. If you have any questions about the test, the position, or our company, please contact Cyan on Linkedin or email him here:

description:

About the Role We are seeking a Manager in Accounting Advisory & Financial Reporting to join our growing team. This role is ideal for an experienced accounting professional with expertise in IFRS, US GAAP, and technical accounting matters, particularly in advising businesses through reporting and compliance challenges. The ideal candidate will have experience in Big Four accounting firms, audit, and accounting advisory services, as well as exposure to multiple industries such as manufacturing, infrastructure, Saa S, retail, and professional services. This role offers an excellent opportunity to gain high-level advisory experience while working with senior leadership and supporting clients through complex accounting matters. Key Responsibilities Provide technical accounting advisory services, including IFRS and US GAAP conversions, financial statement preparation, and complex transaction analysis. Assist in advisory engagements related to financial reporting, internal controls, and accounting policy implementations. Support CFOs, Controllers, and Finance teams with regulatory compliance, GAAP conversions, and implementation of new accounting standards. Conduct research on technical accounting issues and provide recommendations for best practices. Assist in M& A transactions by supporting purchase accounting, due diligence, and post-merger financial reporting. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to improve financial reporting and accounting processes. Mentor and guide junior professionals, ensuring quality service delivery and knowledge sharing. Qualifications & Experience 7+ years of experience in accounting advisory, financial reporting, or external audit. Big Four or global advisory firm experience is preferred. Strong knowledge of IFRS, US GAAP, and other international accounting frameworks. CPA, Chartered Accountant, or equivalent certification is required (or in progress). Exposure to multiple industries (e.g., Saa S, manufacturing, retail, infrastructure) is a plus. Strong problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to manage multiple projects. Excellent communication and client management skills. Bilingual proficiency in Portuguese, Spanish, or English is a plus.
