title: Emerging market trader
description:
Nova oportunidade para Emerging market trader em palmas. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Role Overview We are seeking a highly skilled Emerging Markets FX Trader with deep expertise in African/LATAM/Asian currencies to join our global trading & liquidity team. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience managing illiquid and restricted FX markets, executing OTC and interbank trades, and designing robust hedging and liquidity frameworks to support high-volume cross-border payment flows. This role requires both strong trading capability and infrastructure expertise, including building and optimizing FX trading systems, hedging engines, and liquidity connectivity with banks, brokers, and OTC counterparties. Key Responsibilities FX Trading & Liquidity Management Manage proprietary and flow-driven FX trading positions across Emerging Market currencies, with a focus on African (e.g., NGN, KES, ZAR, GHS), LATAM (ARS, BRL, MXN) and/or Asian (IDR, VDN, etc.) on markets. Source and maintain deep liquidity relationships with banks, brokers, and OTC desks across relevant regions. Execute spot, forwards, NDFs, swaps, and OTC trades to optimize execution quality and manage currency exposure. Monitor market developments, capital controls, and liquidity dynamics across EM FX markets. Hedging Strategy & Risk Management Design and implement FX hedging strategies to manage corporate or client-driven exposures. Optimize hedging efficiency across multiple liquidity venues including banks, ECNs, OTC desks, and crypto liquidity pools where relevant. Develop models for dynamic hedging, inventory risk management, and spread optimization. Monitor risk limits, Pn L, and exposure across currency books. Trading Infrastructure & Systems Work closely with engineering and product teams to build and enhance FX trading and hedging infrastructure, including: Automated hedging engines Liquidity aggregation systems Smart order routing Pricing and risk management tools Integrate connectivity with banks, ECNs, and liquidity providers via APIs or FIX protocols. Improve execution automation, latency optimization, and real-time exposure monitoring. Market Development Identify and onboard new liquidity providers and OTC trading partners across emerging markets. Build pricing frameworks for illiquid currency pairs and support new corridor launches. Contribute to the development of scalable FX infrastructure supporting global payments and settlement flows. Requirements Experience 5–10+ years of FX trading experience in Emerging Markets. Strong experience trading African currencies, such as: Africa: NGN, KES, ZAR, GHS, EGP Experience working at: Global banks EM FX trading firms Payment / fintech companies Crypto exchanges or market makers Proven experience executing OTC and institutional-sized FX trades. Technical Expertise Deep understanding of: FX market microstructure in illiquid markets NDF markets and offshore hedging Capital controls and FX regulatory frameworks Hands-on experience building or optimizing: FX trading systems Hedging engines Liquidity aggregation platforms Familiarity with FIX connectivity, API-based trading systems, and algorithmic execution. Skills Strong quantitative and analytical capabilities. Ability to operate in high-volatility and fragmented liquidity environments. Strong network within EM FX liquidity providers and OTC trading desks. Excellent communication and cross-functional collaboration skills. Preferred Qualifications Experience supporting high-volume cross-border payment flows or treasury operations. Experience trading EM FX through both traditional banks and alternative liquidity sources. Familiarity with stablecoin / crypto liquidity markets in emerging economies. Background in building or scaling FX market-making operations. Strong analytical and problem solving skills Ability to operate across global teams and fast paced environments Vision & Mission OSL is the first SFC-licensed digital asset platform in Hong Kong and a Pay Fi innovator. Through stablecoin payments, cross-border settlement and global licensing, we are building the next-generation payments network. Stablecoins have become everyday money across emerging markets and are widely viewed as blockchain's "killer app," with industry focus shifting from token issuance to real-world consumer and enterprise payment adoption. The strongest growth lies in cross-border B2 B payments, where providers embedding stablecoins into corporate settlement flows can capture significant volume and float. Long-term defensibility comes from regulatory licences, banking partners and cross-border corridors. OSL holds or has acquired licences in Hong Kong, Japan, Australia, Bermuda and Indonesia, and is expanding into Europe, Brazil, Southeast Asia and Africa through acquisitions and licence applications. With OSL Pay and Stable X, we embed stablecoin settlement into bank accounts and card networks, support 150+ digital assets, and provide 24/7 fiat–stablecoin conversion. As a regulated pioneer with a startup mindset, we believe the future of payments will be driven by real adoption and scalable deployment, not technology narratives. We welcome builders who are passionate about crypto and payments to join us in shaping compliant, global payment infrastructure.

title: Data annotator
description:

This role focuses on side-by-side (SBS) evaluation of outputs from different AI models across real-world scenarios. You will play a key role in improving how AI systems understand and communicate across languages and cultures. This is not a translation role. It is an evaluation and analysis role requiring strong judgment and attention to detail. Language Requirement Fluency in English + at least one of the following languages: Chinese (Simplified and/or Traditional) Japanese Korean Italian German French What You'll Work On You will evaluate AI responses across scenarios such as: General-purpose Q& A Web search results File-based and image-based responses Image and file generation tasks Single-turn and multi-turn conversations Responsibilities Perform side-by-side (SBS) comparisons of AI-generated responses Evaluate outputs based on: Accuracy Relevance Clarity Instruction-following Identify nuances in tone, meaning, and cultural context across languages Apply detailed, scenario-specific annotation guidelines Maintain consistency and high-quality evaluations Required Qualifications Professional fluency in English + at least one target language listed above Prior experience with side-by-side (SBS) labeling or annotation Strong analytical thinking and attention to detail Ability to quickly understand and apply structured evaluation frameworks Preferred Qualifications Background in linguistics, translation, or localization Experience in: AI evaluation Data annotation Search relevance or content quality analysis Compensation We offer competitive compensation aligned with local markets and experience. Estimated hourly range: R$75 – R$85 BRL Estimated monthly equivalent (full-time): R$12,000 – R$13,600 BRL Actual compensation will be determined based on experience, skills, and internal equity. Training & Qualification All new hires will complete a structured onboarding program, including: Training sessions and practice exercises Calibration against quality benchmarks Qualification review before moving into production work Benefits & Employment Structure This role is hired through an Employer of Record (EOR) partner, ensuring full compliance with local labor laws and payroll requirements. Employees receive locally compliant benefits, which may include: Statutory benefits (e.g., paid leave, 13th salary where applicable) Social security and healthcare contributions Additional benefits aligned with local market practices Why Blueprint? Work on cutting-edge AI systems Be part of a global, multilingual team Build highly transferable AI evaluation skills Contribute directly to improving real-world AI experiences Equal Opportunity Employer Blueprint Technologies is an equal opportunity employer. We consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, color, age, disability, gender identity, sexual orientation, religion, national origin, or any other protected status.

title: Senior oil & gas regulatory & severance tax accountant
description:
Confira a vaga para Senior oil & gas regulatory & severance tax accountant em rio branco. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Location: Brazil (100% Remote) Experience Level: Mid to Senior (5+ years) Industry: Oil & Gas (Unconventional Onshore) Role Summary We are seeking a highly analytical Senior Regulatory & Severance Tax Accountant to join our integrated Revenue team. The primary focus of this role is to ensure the integrity of severance tax reporting for Texas and Louisiana operations. You will be responsible for identifying, troubleshooting, and resolving reporting discrepancies that lead to state-issued penalties. This is a technical, hands-on role requiring deep experience in SAP PRA (CA/VL modules) and the ability to bridge the gap between transactional data and state regulatory compliance. Responsibilities Severance Tax Compliance: Lead the end-to-end severance tax reporting process for Texas and Louisiana, ensuring all volumes and values are reported accurately and timely to the respective state agencies. Error Detection & Troubleshooting: Proactively identify reporting errors by comparing state-level data against internal production and valuation records. Utilize the Valuation Control Report (VCR) and specific SAP T-Codes to diagnose root causes of variances. PPA Analysis: Analyze Prior Period Adjustments (PPAs) before posting to understand the ripple effect on the General Ledger (GL), production volumes, and pricing. Ensure all adjustments are justified and accurately reflected in amended filings. Penalty Reduction: Serve as the lead in reducing state-issued penalties through meticulous data validation and the timely filing of amended returns (e.g., Texas G-10/P-5, Louisiana O3). Process Improvement: Troubleshoot systemic process failures and, as needed, document standardized workflows to serve as guides for broader transactional teams. Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work as one team with the Revenue Accounting group to ensure that valuation formulas and owner payment setups are consistent with regulatory requirements. Requirements Minimum of 2 years of hands-on experience in the Check Input (CA) and Valuation (VL) modules. Must have experience booking company-operated revenues and navigating sub-ledger details. At least 5+ years of experience, including experience in Upstream Oil & Gas accounting, ideally focused on unconventional, onshore assets. Proven experience with US (ideally Texas and Louisiana )severance tax regulations, including high-cost gas exemptions and state disposition reporting. Ability to perform deep-dive reconciliations across production, revenue, and tax data sets to identify complex transactional errors. Advanced/Fluent English (written and spoken) is required for coordination with US-based stakeholders. A diagnostic mindset - able to look at a reporting error and trace the logic back through the SAP PRA system to the source data. Capable of managing complex reporting deadlines and independent research in a fully remote environment. Technical Requirements ERP: SAP PRA (CA, VL modules), S/4 HANA (preferred). Reporting Tools: Advanced Excel (Power Query/Pivot), Power BI, VCR Analysis.

We're looking for trusted advisors. What We're Looking For Essential: Existing relationships with high-net-worth individuals Cultural fluency - you genuinely understand the communities you'd serve Professional working proficiency in English (written and verbal) Comfortable with performance-based compensation Integrity - you'd rather lose a deal than mislead someone Highly Desirable: Experience in real estate, immigration, wealth management, or financial services Backgrounds that often do well: Business owners and entrepreneurs Private bankers and wealth managers Lawyers and accountants serving affluent clients Real estate professionals in investment or luxury markets Community leaders and well-connected professionals What You Get Full training and certification on our programmes — no cost to you Access to our curated property portfolio (60+ vetted developments across Athens) Psychological messaging framework and conversation guides designed for high-stakes, trust-based advisory — not generic sales scripts CRM system for pipeline management Branded marketing materials and property documents ready to share with clients Direct support from our Athens headquarters — legal coordination, transaction management, and immigration filing handled for you As we grow together, you'll receive warm leads from our marketing campaigns alongside your own network Our Values Freedom — The right to become who you are capable of becoming, unconstrained by the circumstances of your birth. Integrity — Not a character trait, but an infrastructure. We engineer trustworthiness into every process. Partnership — We build relationships, not transactions. We stay with clients long after the permit is approved.

title: Enfermeiro
description:

Vaga: Enfermeiro(a) — Programa Enfermeiro sem Fronteiras Salário: R$14.500,00 (2.500 euros — inicial) + benefícios Localidade: Alemanha (Berlim, Munique ou outras cidades com demanda hospitalar — a definir conforme colocação) Programa: Enfermeiro sem Fronteiras, da Sprache& Wissen Como funciona? Você participa de um processo seletivo e, se aprovado(a), se inscreve para estudar alemão por até 2 anos na maior escola online de alemão da América Latina, até atingir o nível B2 (final do intermediário). Antes de iniciar seus estudos, você recebe um contrato com garantia de emprego na Alemanha, com cláusulas específicas e seguras — desde que cumpra os requisitos do programa. Se a S& W não conseguir sua colocação após você atingir o B2, o valor investido é devolvido integralmente. Durante todo o período de estudo, você conta com mentoria direcionada da Sprache& Wissen. Quem é a Sprache& Wissen? A Sprache& Wissen (S& W) é uma empresa brasileira fundada por dois irmãos mineiros: um administrador formado pelo CEFET-MG e uma professora de alemão doutora pela UFMG. O grupo educacional administra as marcas Clube de Alemão, Punkify e Vale-idiomas. A S& W é a maior escola online de alemão da América Latina, com a meta de capacitar 100 mil brasileiros até 2030 nos idiomas alemão e inglês. Possui mais de 500 mil seguidores nas redes sociais e satisfação de 98,9%. Principais atividades (na Alemanha): Cuidado direto ao paciente em ambiente hospitalar ou clínico Administração de medicamentos e acompanhamento de tratamentos Documentação clínica e comunicação com equipe multidisciplinar em alemão Participação em plantões conforme escala do empregador Requisitos: Diploma de Enfermagem (bacharelado) reconhecido no Brasil Idade máxima de 36 anos (requisito do programa de visto alemão) Disponibilidade para estudar alemão por até 2 anos até o nível B2, com flexibilidade de horários Comprometimento com a carga horária do curso e as etapas do programa Documentação em dia para solicitação de visto (passaporte válido ou possibilidade de emitir) Diferenciais: Conhecimento prévio de alemão (qualquer nível) Experiência em UTI, emergência ou centro cirúrgico Experiência internacional ou intercâmbio Inglês intermediário ou avançado Sobre o período de estudos (home office): O curso de alemão é 100% online — você estuda do Brasil enquanto se prepara Mentoria gratuita em grupo durante toda a jornada até o B2 Flexibilidade para conciliar com seu emprego atual Etapas do processo: Inscrição e triagem inicial Entrevista com o time da S& W Aprovação de ficha e documentações Assinatura do contrato com garantia de emprego Matrícula no curso de alemão (até o nível B2) Match com recrutador alemão Colocação profissional na Alemanha

title: Forward deployed engineer (golang)
description:
Empresa está contratando Forward deployed engineer (golang) em rio branco. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Location: Brazil Remote Department: Engineering Employment Type: Contract (B2 B) Contract Length: 6 months About YLD: Our goal is to help our clients keep moving forward. We work with them to build the skills and capabilities they need to stay ahead of the competition, and we know our success only happens when they succeed. We're a team of curious, talented people, and we're committed to making YLD a place where great people want to work, grow, and stay. We're a remote-first consultancy specialising in software engineering, product design, and data. Our teams are based across London, Lisbon, and Porto, and we create digital solutions that continue to deliver value long after our work is done. About the role: As a Forward Deployment Engineer at YLD, you'll be part of a client team building innovative products. We're looking for someone curious, passionate, driven, and enthusiastic. You should be skilled in problem-solving and experienced in designing scalable, resilient, and fault-tolerant architectures. You're also an effective communicator and a strong team player. Together with your team, you'll thrive in a fast-paced engineering environment, delivering outstanding results and exciting projects. Your day-to-day responsibilities can look like this: Design, build, and maintain robust backend and infrastructure systems using Golang and Java with contributions across the broader engineering stack Work closely with client teams in collaborative working sessions, explaining technical decisions and translating complex engineering concepts clearly Deploy and manage cloud infrastructure across AWS and GCP using Kubernetes (EKS/GKE), Terraform, and Flux Actively leverage AI-powered tools and workflows to accelerate development, improve code quality, and drive engineering best practices Preferred skills: Strong backend and infrastructure engineering background, with hands-on Golang and Java experience; Experience developing or integrating decentralised systems, data infrastructure, or distributed technologies; Solid command of cloud infrastructure: AWS, GCP, Kubernetes (EKS/GKE), Terraform, and Flux; Actively and meaningfully using AI tools in day-to-day coding practice (not just awareness, but advanced, habitual use); Familiarity with Tiger Beetle, Yugabyte DB, or Red Panda; Experience in fintech, core banking, or regulated financial services environments; Open to occasional travel to London. You should apply if you are: Proactive: You take ownership and move things forward without waiting to be asked; A strong communicator: you express technical ideas clearly, in writing and in client-facing conversations, with full professional fluency in English; Confident presenting: you bring a polished, engaged attitude to working sessions and stakeholder interactions; Focused on quality: you care about doing things properly and hold yourself to a high standard; Pragmatic: you make sensible trade-offs and deliver results in ambiguous, fast-moving environments; A creative problem solver: you approach hard engineering challenges with curiosity and ingenuity; Collaborative: you thrive on working within cross-functional, distributed teams and value others' input. What you'll get in return: The chance to work with a forward-thinking, ethical, and fun group of people and to develop and grow your skills in a fast-moving business Our typical recruitment process: 1st Interview with someone from the Talent team (30/45 mins) Technical Interview with our Senior Developers (1h30) Final chat with our Client Partner (30/45 mins) Get a glimpse of what it's like working at YLD! Check out our Linked In page We're an equal-opportunity employer and value diversity in all its forms. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, pregnancy or maternity, age, marital status, or disability. We also offer a remote-first working environment, with flexible working and work–life balance as standard for all employees.

title: Sr ai engineer - brazil
description:
Nova oportunidade para Sr ai engineer - brazil em palmas. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Senior AI Engineer PITZ | Remote | Reports to CTOA trillion-dollar industry still runs on phone calls. We're building the intelligence that replaces it. PITZ is the infrastructure layer for the global automotive aftermarket. A mechanic speaks — in Spanish, Portuguese, or English, in a noisy shop — and our system diagnoses the failure, identifies the exact part, selects the supplier, underwrites credit, and executes the order. No screen. No typing. No human in the loop. We're live in Mexico and Brazil. Entering the US this year. And we need someone to build the brain behind all of it. Why this role existsWe're not hiring a cog for an AI team. There is no AI team yet. You'd be the first dedicated AI hire. You'll work directly with the CEO to design and build the entire intelligence layer — voice pipeline, recommendation engine, credit scoring, and the data flywheel that makes everything compound. If you deliver, you become Head of AI within 12 months. Not as a title bump — because you'll have built the thing from scratch and no one will know it better than you. This is a role for someone who's been a Senior ML Engineer or AI Lead somewhere and knows they're ready for more — but hasn't had the chance to prove it because there's always someone above them. Here, there's no one above you. Just the problem and the product. What you'll buildThe voice-to-action pipeline. Mechanic speech in noisy shops → intent extraction → diagnostic prediction → SKU mapping from millions of parts → order execution. Three languages. Regional slang. Background noise. Real world, not a lab. The recommendation engine. Right part, right seller, right price, right delivery. This is where margin lives. Every percentage point of improvement moves real revenue. The credit scoring models. Behavioral underwriting for mechanics with no credit history. Turn operational data — order frequency, payment patterns, voice engagement — into financial signals. The data flywheel. Every interaction makes the system smarter. You design the architecture that turns daily transactions into compounding intelligence. US market integrations. Connect PITZ to Identifix, ALLDATA, OBD platforms, Parts Tech, Mitchell1. Adapt models for the US vehicle fleet and English-speaking mechanics. What you bring3-5 years building ML/AI systems in production. Not notebooks. Not demos. Systems that real users interact with daily and that break in interesting ways. NLP or voice experience. You've worked with speech recognition, intent extraction, text classification, or conversational AI. Bonus if it was in noisy, multilingual, or domain-specific environments. Full-stack ML instincts. You can train a model, build the data pipeline, optimize inference, deploy it, and monitor it. You don't wait for a platform team — you are the platform team. Builder mentality. You've worked in startups or fast-moving environments. You ship fast. You make decisions with 70% of the data. You'd rather build something imperfect today than plan something perfect for next quarter. Fluent English required. Spanish or Portuguese strongly preferred. You'll work with mechanics, ops teams, and partners across three countries. RequirementsTimezone: Must be available during US/Lat Am business hours (UTC-3 to UTC-8). This is a real-time collaboration role, not async. Commitment: This is a full-time, dedicated position. If you're currently juggling multiple roles — this isn't a fit. We need 100%. Travel: Periodic travel to Mexico City and São Paulo. You'll visit workshops, hear mechanics, and see the product in action. If you've never left your desk to watch a user interact with your model — this will change that. What makes this differentAt most companies, a Senior AI Engineer optimizes a model inside a product someone else designed. Here, you design the product. The intelligence layer IS the product. There's no PM handing you a spec. There's no VP of AI telling you the roadmap. You figure out what to build, you build it, and you see it run a real supply chain the next day. You'll work with proprietary data that doesn't exist anywhere else — millions of real mechanic-to-system interactions mapped to parts, orders, payments, and outcomes. Your models get better not because of more compute, but because of more reality. And if you prove you can own this — you lead the team we build around it.

title: Sr. compliance onboarding specialist
description:
Empresa está contratando Sr. compliance onboarding specialist em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

About the Role We are looking for a highly motivated and detail-oriented Senior Compliance Onboarding Specialist to join our growing team at Velafi. In this role, you will be instrumental in managing and enhancing the onboarding and KYC (Know Your Customer) processes for our clients across multiple jurisdictions, with a strong focus on Brazil and Latin America. You will collaborate closely with Sales, Operations, and Compliance teams to design efficient, scalable onboarding frameworks that deliver a seamless customer experience while maintaining strict adherence to regulatory requirements. This position is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced fintech environment and is passionate about balancing compliance excellence with business enablement. Key Responsibilities Contribute to the development, implementation, and continuous improvement of onboarding controls, policies, and procedures to ensure efficiency, scalability, and regulatory compliance. Act as the subject matter expert for onboarding clients operating in Brazil, ensuring alignment with Brazilian local AML/CTF regulations and industry best practices. Perform detailed reviews and analysis of B2 B customer documentation, including Customer Risk Assessments and Customer Due Diligence to support informed onboarding decisions. Partner with Sales, Operations, and other internal stakeholders to provide clear guidance on compliance requirements, enabling smooth client onboarding and expansion into new markets. Advise internal teams on AML risks and regulatory considerations when entering new industries or geographic regions. Conduct background checks, adverse media screenings, and ongoing monitoring of clients and prospects to identify and mitigate potential risks. Support the Compliance function in applying regulatory frameworks across LATAM jurisdictions, ensuring compliant operations in Brazil matters. What We're Looking For Bachelor's degree in Law, Finance, Business Administration, or a related field, with a strong foundation in Compliance. 3+ years of hands-on experience in Compliance, preferably within fintech, digital banking, payments, or financial services environments. Strong knowledge of KYC, AML, CDD, and CRA frameworks Solid understanding of Brazilian AML/CTF regulations Familiarity with international regulatory standards, including BSA, USA PATRIOT Act, and OFAC Ability to evaluate complex customer structures, identify risks, and make sound compliance decisions. Excellent interpersonal skills with the ability to work cross-functionally and communicate complex regulatory concepts clearly. Fluent in Spanish (English is a strong plus). Proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable operating in a dynamic, fast-growing environment with evolving regulatory landscapes.

title: Web3 & al investment analyst
description:

title: Hardware engineer
description:
Nova oportunidade para Hardware engineer em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Hardware Electronics Engineer Be a founding member of Quectel's new LATAM hub in Manaus Location Manaus, Amazonas, Brazil Role Hardware Electronics Engineer – LATAM Level Mid-Level (1-3 years of experience) Type Full-Time, On-Site Languages Portuguese & English required · Spanish a plus About Quectel Quectel is one of the world's leading suppliers of cellular Io T modules, antennas, and connectivity services, with more than 4,000 professionals across 8 R& D centers and 50+ sales offices worldwide. Our technology powers everything from smart meters and connected cars to industrial robots and point-of-sale terminals — quietly enabling billions of devices to talk to the cloud. A New Chapter: Quectel in Manaus This is something special. Quectel is launching a brand-new operation in Manaus, Brazil — and we're building the founding team right now. Hosted at ICT Manaus (Instituto Centro de Pesquisa e Desenvolvimento em Tecnologia de Software), an accredited Science, Technology and Innovation Institution under SUFRAMA's CAPDA framework, this new setup will become Quectel's regional engine for R& D, customer enablement, and ANATEL certification across Latin America. Joining now means more than taking a job — it means shaping a team, a culture, and a way of working from day one. Your fingerprints will be on everything we build here. Learn more about Quectel: Company website — Our history & global footprint — LATAM in action — Furukawa Electric Lat Am customer story (Brazil) Follow us on Linked In The Role We're hiring the founding hardware engineer for Quectel's brand-new Manaus operation. You'll be the first technical point of contact — and the technical voice — for customers across Latin America who are building tomorrow's connected products on Quectel modules: automotive telematics, smart energy, industrial Io T, connected payments, and more. Because this is a new setup, you won't be slotting into someone else's playbook. You'll define how we review designs, how we work with ANATEL labs, how we support customers, and how we train the next engineers who join the team. You'll work hands-on with hardware, sit across the table from customer engineering teams, and partner with Quectel's global R& D centers to bring solutions home for the LATAM market. \"Joining a brand-new operation means you're not just doing the work — you're deciding how the work gets done. That's rare, and it's the reason engineers stay.\" What You'll Do Partner with LATAM customers to understand their products, then design hardware architectures and recommend the right Quectel solutions. Review schematics and PCB layouts in Altium, Cadence, or PADS — and turn your feedback into better, more reliable designs. Get hands-on at the bench: power supply analysis, signal integrity, oscilloscope work, debugging interface and certification issues. Be the trusted technical voice for our LATAM customers — answering tough questions and solving complex problems alongside our global engineering teams. Lead technical discussions with customers and certification labs, including ANATEL homologation activities. Write the application notes, design guidelines, and FAQs that help customers ship faster. Train internal FAE and Sales teams across the region — your expertise will scale across LATAM. Support the project team with BOM preparation for fast, accurate customer quotations. What You Bring Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics, Computer Engineering, or a related field. 3–5 years of hardware design or hardware support experience — bonus if you've worked in customer-facing or FAE roles. Solid grasp of hardware fundamentals: CPU, memory, PMU, system interfaces. Strong skills in power supply design, power sequencing, charging, and power consumption analysis. Comfortable with serial interfaces — I2 C, SPI, UART, USIM — for integration and debug. Confident with bench tools: power supplies, multimeters, oscilloscopes. Hands-on with at least one EDA tool (Altium Designer, Cadence, or PADS). Fluent in English and Portuguese; Spanish is a plus. Bonus Points For Experience designing PCBA end-to-end. Deep knowledge of USB 2.0/3.0, USB hub architecture, USB Type-C. Experience with high-speed interfaces: MIPI DSI/CSI, PCIe, SDIO. RF testing experience across cellular (2 G/3 G/4 G/5 G) and Wi-Fi 802.11. Background in PC, mobile, server, or FWA system integration. Prior ANATEL homologation experience. Team leadership or technical mentoring experience. The Tech You'll Work With Quectel's full product portfolio — cellular (5 G/LTE/LPWA), GNSS, smart modules, and antennas. Quectel services — including device certification work for ANATEL and other regional bodies. See it in action — Quectel customer stories from automotive, smart metering, agribusiness, and more. Why You'll Love Working Here Founding-team energy — you're not joining an established office, you're building one. The processes, the culture, the technical playbook — you'll help write it. Real impact from day one — your decisions and designs ship inside products used by millions across LATAM. Backed by a global leader — startup feel, but with the technology, customers, and resources of a 4,000-person publicly-listed Io T company behind you. Direct line to global R& D — work side-by-side with our R& D centers in China, Europe, and North America while staying rooted in Manaus's growing tech ecosystem. Cutting-edge technology — 5 G, LPWA, AI at the edge, smart camera modules, and the next generation of connected devices. Career growth on a fast curve — early team members typically grow into senior technical or leadership roles as the operation scales. Customer-facing exposure — directly shape how leading LATAM brands build their connected products. Competitive package — attractive compensation, benefits, and the stability of a global market leader. Compensation & Benefits Competitive base salary aligned with LATAM market benchmarks. Performance bonus / sales commission structure (role dependent). Flexible meal and grocery vouchers (meal allowance / food allowance). Health insurance with no co-pay. Life insurance. Paid time off. International travel opportunities — HQ visits and global trade shows. Ready to Apply? If this sounds like your kind of challenge, we'd love to hear from you. Send your CV (in English) along with a short note about what excites you most about the role. We review applications on a rolling basis. Apply via: | Browse open roles: Quectel is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to building an inclusive team where everyone can do their best work.

Our technology powers everything from smart meters and connected cars to industrial robots and point-of-sale terminals — quietly enabling billions of devices to talk to the cloud. This is a founding-team role at Quectel's brand-new Manaus operation. You'll own the smart-module software story for the LATAM region: drivers, peripheral bring-up, multimedia and camera frameworks, and the customer-facing engineering work that turns Quectel modules into shipping products. Doing that as part of a founding team, where you shape how things get built? Even better.\" What You'll Do Own software development and maintenance for assigned LATAM customer projects on Quectel smart modules. Design and develop camera algorithms — image processing, enhancement, optimization. Bring up and integrate camera and image processing features into customer applications. Run camera testing and tuning across lighting conditions to deliver great image quality. Debug peripheral bring-up issues: MIPI LCD, sensors, MIPI camera, audio/video codecs. Strong C, C++, and Java programming skills. Solid Linux internals and system programming knowledge; RTOS exposure is a plus. Experience with the embedded software development lifecycle. Hands-on experience with Android applications, HAL, and multimedia frameworks (GStreamer, Cam X, Open CV, Open GL). Linux device driver development and peripheral bring-up experience (MIPI LCD, sensors, MIPI camera, audio/video codecs). Comfort with hardware/software integration and debugging. Day-to-day experience with Git and Agile workflows. Strong problem-solving skills and customer-friendly communication. Fluent in English and Portuguese; Spanish is a plus. Bonus Points For AI / machine learning experience for image analysis. Familiarity with Qualcomm camera frameworks (Cam X / Chi-CDK). Prior FAE or customer-engineering experience in the LATAM region. The Tech You'll Work With Quectel's smart module portfolio — Android, Linux, and Yocto-based platforms supporting cameras, displays, audio, GNSS, Wi-Fi/BT, and 5 G. Read the deep-dive: \"What is a smart module?\" by a Quectel product manager. Qualcomm camera frameworks (Cam X/Chi-CDK), GStreamer, Open CV, Open GL, and AI/ML at the edge. Why You'll Love Working Here Founding-team energy — you're not joining an established office, you're building one. The processes, the culture, the technical playbook — you'll help write it. Real impact from day one — your decisions and designs ship inside products used by millions across LATAM. Backed by a global leader — startup feel, but with the technology, customers, and resources of a 4,000-person publicly-listed Io T company behind you. Direct line to global R& D — work side-by-side with our R& D centers in China, Europe, and North America while staying rooted in Manaus's growing tech ecosystem. Cutting-edge technology — 5 G, LPWA, AI at the edge, smart camera modules, and the next generation of connected devices. Career growth on a fast curve — early team members typically grow into senior technical or leadership roles as the operation scales. Customer-facing exposure — directly shape how leading LATAM brands build their connected products. title: Professor de francês
description:
Confira a vaga para Professor de francês em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Faça parte da comunidade de professores que está transformando o ensino de idiomas no Brasil! Onde os influencers do Brasil fazem suas aulas particulares! A Idioma Independente, referência em inovação no ensino de idiomas, está buscando pessoas proativas, com perfil proativo e fluência em um segundo idioma, que querem ter sucesso no âmbito profissional, para se credenciar como professores e fazer parte da nossa comunidade engajada. Aqui, você não será apenas mais um perfil online: você será parte de uma rede colaborativa com mais de 400 professores e 4.000 alunos que vivenciam nossa metodologia transformadora hoje, além de mais de 1000 professores e 10.000 alunos que já fizeram parte desta história. Nos últimos 12 meses tivemos mais de 22 mil alunos interessados em fazer aulas conosco. Professores novos têm lotado suas agendas em até 30 dias, quando são comprometidos, se comunicam de forma eficaz e tem agenda no horário da noite disponível. *Esta não é uma vaga CLT* O que oferecemos? Capacitação intensiva para melhoria no ensino de aulas de acordo com a nossa metodologia inovadora Acesso exclusivo a uma plataforma com mais de 400 vídeos de treinamento, baseada em uma metodologia que já entregou resultados incríveis, com vídeos totalmente atualizados. Mentorias semanais com especialistas experientes, que já treinaram mais de 1500 profissionais. Plataforma exclusiva para acompanhamento das aulas. Participação no nosso processo de captação de alunos, com possibilidade de ganhos adicionais relevantes, bastando você se interessar. Descontos exclusivos em cursos de idiomas e viagens com a nossa comunidade. Possibilidade de desenvolvimento e mentoria para ser um empreendedor de sucesso (se você quiser). Um banco de aulas com mais de 800 aulas para facilitar o seu processo de construção de aulas. Certificações dos treinamentos feitos dentro da comunidade que garantem que você obterá mais resultados juntos aos seus alunos e que agregam na sua carreira como professor independente. Como saber se você é a pessoa certa para fazer parte da maior comunidade de professores independentes do Brasil? Se você tem grandes ambições para impactar a educação no Brasil, acredita que o ensino de idiomas precisa de inovação, quer otimizar sua agenda de aulas e, ainda, gostaria de crescer como empreendedor, este é o lugar certo para você. Necessário: Maior de 18 anos, fluente em Português e outro idioma. Disponibilidade de ao menos 20 horas semanais para treinamentos, aulas e ações práticas Esta é uma necessidade para obter os maiores retornos que a comunidade pode te proporcionar. Possibilidade de participar em capacitações durante a semana, no turno da manhã ou tarde. Independência para executar atividades, espírito de colaboração e vontade de contribuir para uma comunidade. O diferencial? Aqui você é mais que um professor. Você será parte de uma comunidade de professores no ensino de idiomas, onde o trabalho colaborativo é a base para alcançar resultados de mercado altamente competitivos. Esta não é uma vaga CLT, mas sim uma oportunidade de empreender e ser dono do seu crescimento com total suporte e estrutura de uma empresa inovadora. Você cria laços e relações de confiança com pessoas que realmente se esforçam para te ajudar no seu desenvolvimento, devido ao modelo de negócio inovador que proporciona relações colaborativas e efetivas. Se você tem vontade de fazer diferente e de vivenciar algo novo na sua história profissional, a ii com certeza é o seu lugar. Faça parte da mudança no ensino de idiomas. Junte-se à Idioma Independente e transforme sua carreira e a vida de milhares de alunos! O que eu faço? Recebo capacitação para dar a melhor aula experimental da sua vida Recebo capacitação em nossa metodologia, aprendendo como transformar a vida de muitos alunos, entregando resultado para eles/as Recebo treinamentos e capacitações recorrentes com mentores experientes e especializados Organizo e escolho a minha agenda e os horários que gostaria de ter alunos/as Preparo aulas para os meus alunos/as Dou as aulas para os meus alunos/as Se você quiser ir além, também será possível, basta você se engajar na comunidade e aprender mais sobre todas as áreas do seu negócio. QUANTO EU RECEBO POR ISSO? Se você for somente professor, se dedicando 40h na semana a aulas, você poderá receber até R$4.000,00 por mês. Se você quiser aprender sobre diferentes áreas e se engajar na comunidade, você pode construir uma renda mensal de até R$6.000,00 por mês em aproximadamente 1 ano. Se você realmente quiser crescer e se desenvolver, se dedicando de forma integral junto da comunidade é possível chegar até R$12.000,00 por mês em 2 anos. Tudo isso só dependerá de você, se quiser aprender mais sobre as partes comerciais e sobre como se tornar um mentor/a de professores. Seja diferente, seja independente

Aqui, você não será apenas mais um perfil online: você será parte de uma rede colaborativa com mais de 400 professores e 4.000 alunos que vivenciam nossa metodologia transformadora hoje, além de mais de 1000 professores e 10.000 alunos que já fizeram parte desta história. Nos últimos 12 meses tivemos mais de 22 mil alunos interessados em fazer aulas conosco. Professores novos têm lotado suas agendas em até 30 dias, quando são comprometidos, se comunicam de forma eficaz e tem agenda no horário da noite disponível. *Esta não é uma vaga CLT* O que oferecemos? Participação no nosso processo de captação de alunos, com possibilidade de ganhos adicionais relevantes, bastando você se interessar. Descontos exclusivos em cursos de idiomas e viagens com a nossa comunidade. Possibilidade de desenvolvimento e mentoria para ser um empreendedor de sucesso (se você quiser). Um banco de aulas com mais de 800 aulas para facilitar o seu processo de construção de aulas. title: Analista em infraestrutura de tempo e sincronização pleno
description:
Empresa está contratando Analista em infraestrutura de tempo e sincronização pleno em rio branco. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Job Description A NTT DATA Inc. é uma empresa multinacional de tecnologia que integra, dentre seus serviços, o desenvolvimento de software, segurança, cloud e, principalmente, infraestrutura de TI. Estamos, segundo o Great Place to Work, dentre as melhores empresas de Tecnologia para se trabalhar no Brasil. Temos uma cultura de trabalho inclusiva e prezamos muito pela liberdade de melhorar processos, pela flexibilidade e pelo respeito às pessoas! Analista em Infraestrutura de Tempo e Sincronização Pleno Formato: Remoto Operação - Atuação em Escala (Folguista) Buscamos uma pessoa para atuar como Analista em Infraestrutura de Tempo e Sincronização, responsável pela administração técnica, configuração e manutenção evolutiva dos serviços de data e hora da organização, garantindo alta precisão, performance e confiabilidade do sincronismo em ambientes distribuídos e críticos. Quais serão suas responsabilidades? Administrar, configurar e operar os serviços de data e hora (NTP/PTP) para redes locais e distribuídas; Analisar e tratar falhas de sincronismo identificadas em fluxos complexos, interagindo com outras equipes de TIC; Elaborar, configurar e manutenir scripts ou programas de automação para geração de relatórios de conformidade temporal; Documentar a topologia dos servidores de hora e os procedimentos de configuração de estratos (Strata); Garantir a performance da solução e a precisão das informações entregues aos clientes da rede. O que esperamos que você possua? Experiência sólida na administração de protocolos de sincronismo (NTP v3/v4 e conceitos de PTP); Domínio em automação via scripts (Bash, Python ou Power Shell) para monitoração e relatórios; Profundo conhecimento em infraestrutura de rede e sistemas operacionais de servidores. Certificações: RHCSA - Red Hat Certified System Administrator Comp TIA Network+ Benefits O que nós oferecemos? Vaga remota Contratação modelo CLT Seu equipamento de trabalho Vale-transporte Vale-refeição/alimentação Auxílio home-office Plano de saúde e odontológico para você e sua família Seguro de vida em grupo Participação nos Lucros e Resultados (PLR) anual Convênio farmácia Totalpass (convênio academia) Cesta maternidade e licença paternidade estendida Day off de aniversário Oportunidade de participar de ações sociais Incentivo a educação e treinamentos Uma cultura de trabalho inclusiva, onde juntos fazemos grandes coisas! Para entender como tratamos os seus dados pessoais, por favor, acesse nosso Aviso de Privacidade de Recrutamento.

title: Data analyst
description:
Confira a vaga para Data analyst em rio branco. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

About The Role You'll join the Reporting & Analytics team at Pride Global — a high-impact, cross-functional group responsible for delivering data-driven insights across our global staffing operations. This role sits at the center of how the business makes decisions. You'll be responsible for building the reporting layer that powers executive dashboards, client presentations, and operational insights across the US, Canada, UK, and Brazil. This is not just a dashboarding role. You'll translate complex workforce, financial, and market data into clear, actionable narratives used by senior leadership and global business heads. We need someone who can take ambiguous business questions, structure them into analytical problems, and deliver high-quality reporting solutions end-to-end — from data modeling to final presentation. What You'll Do Design and develop Power BI dashboards used in executive-level reporting and client-facing presentations Build self-service reporting solutions that allow business stakeholders to explore data independently Create clean, intuitive, and visually effective dashboards optimized for both desktop and mobile consumption Develop and manage Power BI datasets, workspaces, and deployment pipelines across Dev / UAT / Prod Model data using star and snowflake schemas, applying best practices in DAX and Power Query (M) Integrate and transform data from multiple sources — ATS, VMS/MSP platforms, SQL databases, Excel, Share Point, and HR/ERP systems Partner with business leaders to understand reporting needs and translate them into structured analytical outputs Present insights and guide stakeholders through dashboards, explaining trends, limitations, and opportunities Support recurring reporting cycles (weekly, monthly, quarterly) with accurate and timely delivery Define and standardize key business metrics (headcount, spend, fill rates, aging, profitability, etc.) Implement data quality checks, anomaly detection, and validation rules within reporting layers Document data models, metric definitions, and reporting logic to ensure long-term scalability and governance What We're Looking For Must have (3–5 years of experience): Strong hands-on experience with Power BI (DAX, Power Query, data modeling, RLS) Solid SQL skills (joins, aggregations, query optimization, working with relational databases) Experience building reporting solutions for operational, workforce, or business performance data Proven ability to design clean, executive-level dashboards with clear storytelling and minimal noise Experience managing Power BI Service (workspaces, refresh schedules, access control, deployments) Ability to translate business needs into analytical solutions and communicate insights effectively Strong English communication skills (you'll work with global stakeholders daily) Nice to have: Experience in staffing, workforce, or HR analytics Familiarity with Microsoft Fabric, Azure Data Factory, or similar cloud data platforms Basic experience with Python or R for data preparation or automation Exposure to data governance practices (metric standardization, data lineage, documentation) Experience working in cross-functional environments (finance, operations, delivery teams)

title: Golang developer
description:
Nova oportunidade para Golang developer em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Specific Asks 8+ years of experience with atleast the last 2-3 years focused on Golang Sr developer Ability to pick action items and work proactively. Work independently Excellent communication skills JD: 8+ Years of Software Development Experience Able to apply functional and object-oriented paradigms Able to apply the SOLID principles Able to explain REST principles and design APIs that follow them Experience with SOA, micro-services, and/or distributed architectures Able to architects systems and teaches others about appropriate software design patterns with eye towards scale and reliability Stays abreast of cross-industry/domain technology solutions and able to advocate for new frameworks and technologies within their scope of influence. Demonstrated ability designing and interacting with complex persisted data models Demonstrated ability to own a technical roadmap Able to both identify and improve poor performing code or database queries You are interested in continually learning and mastering new skills Able to communicate complex ideas and concepts simply and concisely You are willing to monitor and own the production services the team is responsible for and capable of leading multiple teams in troubleshooting Able to diagnose the most challenging production issues and implement the observability to provide this ability. Able to lead efforts across enterprise technical teams to drive complex enterprise issues to root cause - along with a plan and measurable progress for resolution. You are empathic and enjoy learning from and mentoring other engineers Nice to Haves Open source software and dependency management Object/Document data storage technologies Caching and in-memory database technologies Asynchronous/Multi-threaded Programming Patterns Message queuing technologies/strategies\

title: Recruiter
description:
Confira a vaga para Recruiter em rio branco. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Apesar de já termos recebido muitas aplicações, não deixe de se candidatar. Focamos em talentos muito específicos e não iremos entrevistar qualquer perfil. Se você acredita ter 100% de fit conosco, se candidate. Regime: PJ | Full Remote | Tempo integral Sobre a Review All Somos uma consultoria especializada em recrutamento e seleção para o ecossistema de startups e empresas de tecnologia. Atualmente, atendemos mais de 50 clientes — desde early-stage e empresas seed-invested até startups Series A/B/C/D e grandes multinacionais. 2025 foi um ano histórico para nós: Crescemos 155% Mais que dobramos nosso time de operações Principais responsabilidades Gerenciar de 8 a 16 processos seletivos simultâneos (tech, produto e negócios), grande parte em nível executivo Conduzir o recrutamento end-to-end Alinhar perfil diretamente com cliente final e área de pessoas Sourcing ativo (Linked In Recruiter, job boards, networking) Triagem de currículos e entrevistas técnicas e comportamentais Apresentação de shortlist e negociação de oferta Acompanhamento de onboarding Ser ponto único de contato para stakeholders (tech leads, PMs, diretores e founders), garantindo clareza de expectativas Requisitos Formação: valorizamos muito mais experiência prática do que diploma. Experiência: não importa se você tem 6 meses ou 10 anos de recrutamento — buscamos talentos diferenciados. É necessário: Experiência com executive/tech search Gestão simultânea de 8 a 16 vagas sênior/gerenciais Foco em qualidade (não buscamos "impressoras de currículo") Mentalidade estratégica + entrega rápida e efetiva Pacote de remuneração Salário Fixo PJ Variável mensal extremamente agressivo Se você tiver interesse em conhecer mais detalhes sobre a oportunidade, candidate-se à vaga. Você será direcionado à nossa página exclusiva, onde poderá saber mais sobre nossa política de variável, benefícios, o passo a passo para participar do processo seletivo e concorrer a uma posição em nosso time.

title: Ruby on rails developer
description:
Confira a vaga para Ruby on rails developer em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Senior Software Engineer I, L3 Messaging Team (Remote) We're recruiting a Senior Software Engineer I to own the technical direction of a mission-critical messaging platform serving hundreds of healthcare organizations across the United States. THE ROLE Our client is a fast-growing, mission-driven organization transforming patient engagement at scale. They've built the leading platform powering communications for underserved populations, with proven impact reaching millions. Now they're looking for a seasoned backend engineer to lead their Messaging Team technical direction and mentor the next generation of engineering talent. You'll own complex features end-to-end, drive architectural decisions that shape how millions of patient communications are delivered, and share team lead responsibilities with your peers. This is a highly visible, technically autonomous role with direct impact on health equity outcomes. WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR 5+ years hands-on backend engineering with Ruby on Rails at scale Deep experience building, maintaining, and scaling APIs and distributed systems Advanced SQL skills and comfort working with large, complex datasets Proven ability to independently own complex projects end-to-end and mentor junior engineers Data-driven mindset you rely on evidence, not intuition Excellent communicator (especially in fully remote environments) Passionate about mission-driven work and advancing health equity BONUS POINTS Experience with Twilio, RCS, or MMS messaging platforms Familiarity with healthcare compliance (TCPA, consent workflows, carrier regulations) Tech stack: React, Postgre SQL, Google Cloud, Sidekiq Event-driven architecture or high-throughput message delivery pipelines WHAT YOU'LL DO Own and drive the technical direction of key messaging platform features Design and build backend messaging systems (delivery pipelines, consent management, scheduling orchestration, API integrations) Mentor L2 engineers, lead technical design discussions, and set engineering standards Contribute to architectural decisions that shape messaging infrastructure at scale Participate in on-call rotations (Pager Duty) and help improve team processes Work cross-functionally with Product, Customer Success, and Data teams YOUR IMPACT Month 1: Master the platform architecture and contribute to technical design discussions Month 3: Independently deliver complex features with meaningful impact on patient outcomes Month 6: Be recognized as a technical leader driving strategic initiatives across the engineering department

title: Full stack developer
description:
Confira a vaga para Full stack developer em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Job Offer: Full Stack Developer (Angular + Java Microservices) Location: São Paulo (mandatory residence). 100% remote work, with occasional on-site meetings when required Contract type: Permanent Employment type: Full-time About the role From SOTEC Consulting – ASTEK Group, we are looking for a Full Stack Developer with strong experience in high-performance, real-time data-driven environments to join an international project within a demanding and collaborative technology ecosystem. This role combines advanced frontend development in Angular with backend capabilities in Java (Spring Boot or similar), contributing to scalable solutions, API integrations, and features focused on user experience and real-time data processing. Responsibilities • Develop advanced frontend applications using Angular in complex, high-traffic environments. • Implement real-time data features (e.g., dynamic grids such as ag-Grid). • Develop backend services in Java using microservices architecture (Spring Boot or equivalent frameworks). • Design and implement RESTful APIs and handle JSON data structures. • Contribute to the design and improvement of UX/UI interfaces and reusable components. • Use AI tools to support UX design, code refactoring, template generation, and vulnerability remediation. • Implement responsive and adaptive design principles. • Collaborate in Agile/Scrum environments. • Work with version control systems (Git). Mandatory requirements • +8 years of experience in frontend development with Angular. • Strong experience in Java backend development, especially with microservices (Spring Boot or similar). • Proficiency in Type Script, Java Script, HTML5, and CSS3. • Experience integrating RESTful APIs and working with JSON data. • Experience implementing real-time data features (e.g., ag-Grid). • Experience using AI tools in development (UX, templates, refactoring, vulnerability detection/removal). • Familiarity with responsive and adaptive design principles. • Experience with Git or other version control systems. • Minimum English level B2 (mandatory). • Must be based in São Paulo (project requirement). Nice to have • Experience with state management libraries (Ng Rx, Akita). • Knowledge of containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes). • Experience with data visualization libraries (D3.js, Chart.js). • Exposure to Agile/Scrum methodologies. • Experience in financial services or other real-time, data-intensive industries. • Knowledge or experience with UX/UI design tools (Figma, Adobe XD). • Spanish language is a plus. What we offer • Participation in high-impact international technology projects. • Collaborative and multidisciplinary team culture. • Continuous training and professional development plans. • Additional benefits depending on the project and profile. Why join SOTEC / ASTEK? Being part of SOTEC Consulting means joining a company with 30 years of experience in the IT sector, backed by the strength of the ASTEK Group. This integration gives you access to large-scale international projects, working with global teams and multicultural environments that foster your professional growth. SOTEC is an equal opportunity employer, committed to diversity and inclusion regardless of race, gender, religion, age, sexual orientation, marital status, disability, nationality, or gender identity. We actively strive to avoid any form of bias. Take the next step in your career and join projects that are transforming the digital landscape. Apply now!

title: Backend team lead (php/laravel)
description:
Nova oportunidade para Backend team lead (php/laravel) em boa vista. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Backend Team Lead (PHP/Laravel) Location: Brazil (Remote) Our trusted high-growth healthcare technology partner is seeking a talented Backend Team Lead (PHP/Laravel) to join their dynamic team. This innovative company is dedicated to revolutionizing the healthcare industry through cutting-edge technology solutions. Position Overview As a Backend Team Lead, you will play a key role in leading the backend development team while contributing to the development and implementation of scalable and robust software solutions that support the company's mission and goals. You will guide and support the backend team while working closely with cross-functional teams to design, build, and maintain innovative applications and platforms that drive business success and improve patient outcomes. Primary Responsibilities Team Leadership: Lead and support the backend engineering team, ensuring effective collaboration, task distribution, and delivery of high-quality software. Platform Development: Spearhead the development and optimization of our EHR platform using PHP/Laravel, ensuring high performance, reliability, and scalability. Database Development: Creating database schemas that represent and support business processes. API Development and Integration: Develop and maintain APIs for internal and external use, facilitating seamless integration with other healthcare systems and third-party services. Security Compliance: Ensure the platform's compliance with healthcare industry standards, including HIPAA, by implementing and maintaining robust security measures and data protection protocols. Additional Responsibilities Mentor backend developers, providing guidance on best practices in backend development, code review, and team collaboration. Support the team in resolving technical challenges and ensure consistent development standards across the team. Stay abreast of new technology trends and evaluate their application to continually innovate and enhance the platform. Participate in an agile development environment, contributing to team coordination and iterative delivery processes, ensuring timely delivery of high-quality software. Competencies / Requirements Technical Expertise: Strong proficiency in PHP/Laravel and My SQL. Familiarity with version control tools, preferably Git. Experience: At least 6+ years of experience in backend development, with a proven track record of developing and maintaining scalable web applications. Previous experience leading or mentoring developers is required. Experience in the healthcare sector or EHR platforms is highly desirable. Problem-Solving Skills: Ability to tackle complex problems, think analytically, and develop innovative solutions. Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills, capable of effectively collaborating with cross-functional teams and stakeholders. Attention to Detail: A strong focus on code quality, adherence to design specifications, and a commitment to creating a user-friendly, secure, and efficient platform. Benefits Competitive salary to recognize and reward your achievements. Flexible work environment. Opportunities for professional and personal growth.
