title: Sr data engineer
description:
Empresa está contratando Sr data engineer em rio branco. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Location: Remote in Brazil We have an open position for a Senior Data Engineer for our client's Technology team. Great opportunity to join an impactful Sustainability & ESG startup. Main Activities: Maintain and evolve data pipelines, ensuring efficiency and accuracy. Work closely with the business to translate problems into analytical solutions with defined outcomes. Perform in‐depth data analysis using SQL and other exploratory tools on platforms such as Postgres and Big Query. Propose solutions to business requirements, offering multiple implementation options. Write scripts to validate loaded data. Act as a mentor to the team, actively collaborating, teaching, and contributing to the technical development and growth of the group. Requirements: Minimum of 5 years of experience with Python. Experience with Spark. Strong experience writing SQL and working with data‐manipulation practices on platforms such as Postgres and Big Query. Knowledge of distributed computing and data‐engineering practices, including architecture and handling large volumes of data. Experience developing and optimizing ETL pipelines, including validation scripts and anomaly detection. Excellent analytical skills to solve complex problems and ensure data quality. Effective communication skills to collaborate with multidisciplinary teams and convey technical concepts. English Preferred About the hiring company: A Brazilian startup that develops technological solutions for measuring the social and environmental impacts of companies and organizations. Their platforms were created to simplify the ESG journey, providing a granular view of impact data with detailed and auditable analyses aligned to the main disclosure standards and frameworks recognized in the market.

title: Arte finalista (pleno/sênior)- banco de talentos
description:
Nova oportunidade para Arte finalista (pleno/sênior)- banco de talentos em palmas. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Quem somos: A Studio Rx é uma empresa de produção global digital, criada para as necessidades exclusivas das marcas de saúde. Como Hub de produção da IPG Health, o Studio RX apoia a rede global de agências do grupo, tendo como pilares principais a qualidade e eficiência. O que buscamos: Estamos em busca de um arte-finalista capaz de trabalhar com rapidez, eficiência e mantendo grande atenção aos detalhes. O profissional deve ser altamente organizado e conseguir trabalhar em mais de um projeto ao mesmo tempo. Entre as atividades, a principal será fazer ajustes e alterações de cor, formato, texto, imagens e preparação dos arquivos para impressão (com sangria, marcas de corte e ficha técnica). O candidato precisa ter um conhecimento avançado no Adobe In Design já que 95% do trabalho será feito nele, e o nível de inglês para escrita e interpretação de texto também precisa ser avançado. A atividade diária principal será receber artes prontas das agências dos EUA para executar ajustes (no In Design) conforme comentários (em inglês) feitos no PDF. Além disso, será necessário também montar facas especiais e fazer o envio dos arquivos para a gráfica. Num primeiro momento o profissional estará sob supervisão para garantir o entendimento e fluxo de funcionamento do estúdio, mas com o passar do tempo a idéia é ganhar autonomia para realizar as tarefas mais cotidianas e recorrentes sem muita supervisão. Pré-Requisitos: Experiência comprovada no segmento impresso e em todos os detalhes que o meio exige (marcas de corte, sangría, margens de segurança, dobras, vinco, cores CMYK, facas especiais, e fichas técnicas); Graduação em Design Gráfico, Desenho Industrial ou áreas correlatas. Experiência de pelo menos 5+ anos na função como designer gráfico no ramo impresso. Domínio dos software In Design e illustrator; Inglês avançado (com comprovação via teste ao vivo na segunda etapa do processo); Disponibilidade para trabalhar das 10h as 19h ou das 13h as 22h. Será um diferencial se você tiver: Ter atuado ativamente com fechamento de arquivos, arte-final e preparação de arquivos para impressão. Conhecimento em softwares de gestão de tarefas como Monday ou Trello (aqui utilizamos Work Front); Está preparado(a) para cultivar novas experiências em um time que joga junto e valoriza o melhor de cada um(a)? #VEMSERSTUDIORX -- Consideramos todas as aplicações para nossas vagas sem distinção de gênero, orientação sexual, etnia, cultura, origem, religião, deficiência, idade etc. Acreditamos na construção de um mundo mais diverso, com mais representatividade e livre de preconceitos. Aqui você encontra um ambiente diverso, colaborativo e inclusivo que promove o desenvolvimento por meio das conexões humanas!

title: Médico endocrinologista (rqe)
description:
Nova oportunidade para Médico endocrinologista (rqe) em rio branco. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

*OPORTUNIDADE PARA MÉDICO ENDOCRINOLOGISTA (com RQE) NA TELADOC HEALTH\" Junte-se à Nossa Equipe de Saúde Digital! A Teladoc Health, líder global em saúde digital e inovação em cuidados de saúde, está buscando Médicas e Médicos Especialistas em Endocrinologia! Se você é um profissional comprometido com a excelência no atendimento ao paciente e deseja fazer parte de uma revolução na prestação de serviços de saúde, esta é a oportunidade que você estava esperando. *SOBRE A TELADOC HEALTH:* A Teladoc Health está na vanguarda da transformação da saúde, oferecendo acesso rápido, conveniente e confiável a serviços de saúde através de nossa plataforma digital. Nossa missão é tornar o cuidado de saúde acessível a todos, em qualquer lugar e a qualquer momento. Combinando tecnologia de ponta e conhecimento médico, estamos moldando o futuro da saúde e proporcionando impacto positivo na vida de milhões de pessoas. *O QUE PROCURAMOS:* Você será responsável por realizar consultas por vídeo e telefone, por intermédio de plataforma do empregador, atendendo na modalidade de consultas de especialidade em Endocrinologia, de forma ética, com abordagem biopsicossocial do processo saúde-adoecimento, integrando ações de prevenção, promoção, proteção, recuperação e educação em saúde buscando alcançar os melhores resultados clínicos; DESCRIÇÃO DAS ATIVIDADES: Fornecer atendimento médico especializado em Endocrinologia de forma remota, através de consultas e avaliações realizadas por meio de plataformas digitais de comunicação. Experiência e conhecimento para o diagnóstico, tratamento e acompanhamento de pacientes com doenças e distúrbios Endocrinológicos. Realizar consultas em Telemedicina sendo capaz de conduzir anamnese virtual para coletar queixas e histórico médico, realizar exame clínico e avaliações à distância, interpretar resultados de exames laboratoriais e de imagem, elaborar diagnósticos precisos, propor medidas terapêuticas e orientações de cuidado, reconhecer sinais de risco e gravidade em Endocrinologia e critérios para encaminhar ao atendimento presencial. Atuar de forma a priorizar a prática médica centrada na pessoa. Elaborar planos de tratamento individualizados, levando em consideração as necessidades específicas de cada paciente. Ser hábil na prescrição de medicamentos adequados para tratar doenças Endocrinológicas. Monitorar o progresso dos pacientes ao longo do tratamento em telemedicina. Realizar ajustes no plano de tratamento, conforme necessário, com base na resposta do paciente ao tratamento. Desenvolver atividades integrais de saúde, incorporando prevenção e promoção de saúde para dar as respostas mais adequadas às necessidades de saúde apresentadas. Atender com elevado grau de qualidade, sendo resolutivo na grande maioria das orientações acerca dos principais problemas de saúde em Endocrinologia. Considerar os valores e preferências pessoais do paciente conjuntamente às melhores evidências científicas e à experiência de manejo clínico para efetivamente promover a melhor prática clínica e os melhores desfechos em saúde para cada indivíduo. Exercer uso racional de recursos em saúde visando a segurança do paciente e a prevenção quaternária, evitando sobrediagnóstico e sobretratamento, que expõe os indivíduos a maiores riscos do que benefícios em saúde. Estimular a participação e a autonomia dos indivíduos e familiares, fortalecendo a aderência a tratamentos e medidas de autocuidado. Documentar todas as interações e informações relevantes dos pacientes em prontuários eletrônicos seguros e confidenciais. Ter capacidade de crítica de sua própria atividade médica, considerando-a em seus aspectos científicos, éticos e sociais para aprimoramento contínuo. Manter-se bem-informado e atualizado, ampliando sua própria competência em relação a conhecimentos sobre riscos em saúde e sobre as medidas mais eficientes para eliminar ou reduzir os riscos relevantes. Respeitar, cumprir e fazer cumprir os ditames do Código de Ética Médica, bem como a Legislação vigente e os regulamentos internos formais da Instituição. REQUISITOS Formação Acadêmica: Obrigatório: GRADUAÇÃO EM MEDICINA RESIDÊNCIA MÉDICA OU ESPECIALIZAÇÃO EM ENDOCRINOLOGIA. Certificações: Registro ativo no Conselho Regional de Medicina (CRM); Certificado de Título de Especialista - RQE (emitido pelo Conselho respectivo) em Endocrinologia. Certificado Digital Ativo reconhecido pela Infraestrutura de Chaves Públicas Brasileira (ICP-Brasil). Experiência: Experiência em atividades relacionadas à atuação em atendimento médico em Endocrinologia, sendo desejável experiência prévia em Telemedicina e Atenção Primária à Saúde; Conhecimentos Específicos para a função: Prestar orientações personalizadas a indivíduos e suas famílias com conhecimentos para o diagnóstico, tratamento e acompanhamento de pacientes com doenças e distúrbios Endócrinos e metabólicos.. Competências Comportamentais: Comprometimento com os pacientes, com ideais e valores da empresa, apresentando postura ética, pontualidade, capacidade de integração com equipe multiprofissional. Outros Requisitos Importantes: Conhecimentos e Habilidades em computação: uso do Pacote Office (Excel, Word, Power Point, Gráficos) e Internet. Familiaridade com tecnologias de telemedicina e uso de plataformas de comunicação virtual é um diferencial desejável. Local de Trabalho: REMOTO IMPORTANTE: MODELO DE CONTRATAÇÃO: Contratação em regime de Prestador de Serviços por contrato Pessoa Jurídica, necessário fazer parte como representante legal ou sócio de um CNPJ ativo. REMUNERAÇÃO E AGENDAMENTOS: a negociar durante processo seletivo. Esta descrição de cargo/atuação tem caráter informativo e pode ser ajustada conforme a necessidade da empresa ou instituição que oferece a oportunidade de trabalho em telemedicina para Médico Clínico/Generalista Residente em Endocrinologia.

title: Software engineer
description:
Confira a vaga para Software engineer em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Software Engineer Contract Length: 3-6 month (likely to extend) Location: Remote (Will work US CT Working Hours) Start Date: ASAP A fast-growing AI and Io T software company is building predictive intelligence platforms for the residential infrastructure and home services industry. Their technology combines connected devices, machine learning, and data-driven software to help service providers proactively identify and prevent equipment failures before they happen. They're looking for a Software Engineer to help shape and scale their next-generation web platform across customer experiences, operational tooling, and AI-powered dashboards. This is a high-ownership role within a small, high-calibre engineering team. They want someone who enjoys building products from scratch, understands systems and architecture, and can operate autonomously in a fast-moving startup environment. Key Experience Needed Experience building and scaling modern web applications Strong Type Script and modern web architecture experience Experience building products from 0→1 through to scale Experience with scalable frontend systems and design systems Product-focused mindset with strong user and business understanding Comfortable working across Product, Design, Backend, and AI teams Able to work autonomously in fast-moving environments Strong understanding of scalability, performance, and engineering best practices Python/backend experience is highly desirable Experience with AI, Io T, or data-heavy products is beneficial Key Responsibilities Lead the architecture and technical direction of the web platform Build scalable customer-facing products, internal tooling, and AI dashboards Develop shared frontend frameworks and platform infrastructure Collaborate closely with Product, Design, AI, and Backend teams Improve scalability, performance, and developer workflows Help shape engineering standards and technical direction Contribute hands-on across architecture, development, and problem solving Mentor engineers and help elevate engineering quality Software Engineer Contract Length: 3-6 month (likely to extend) Location: Remote (Will work US CT Working Hours) Start Date: ASAP

title: Talent acquisition specialist
description:
Confira a vaga para Talent acquisition specialist em rio branco. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Talent Acquisition Specialist About Us: We are a dynamic global specialist in talent research, intelligence, and pipelining. Since its founding in 2011, it's grown to serve internal talent acquisition teams—including more than 70 Fortune 500 companies —through offices spanning the UK, US, India, Singapore, Dubai, Hong Kong, and beyond. We blend data-driven insight and proactive sourcing to streamline recruitment, delivering seamless access to ready now candidates and curated pipelines for future roles. Its recent acquisition of Armstrong Craven further strengthens our global reach and research capabilities, offering clients unmatched flexibility and depth in talent solutions The Role: We have partnered with a global FMCG powerhouse which has a reputation for innovation and development. As part of this contract we are looking for a passionate Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist. If you're excited by new challenges, solving complex problems, and learning every step of the way, you might be the perfect fit. In this role, you'll have the opportunity to drive impactful projects and collaborate with bright minds. What You'll Do: Manage autonomously the different talent acquisition solutions to source, engage, attract, and secure the right talent for the organization within a highly scientific environment Partner with hiring managers to understand hiring needs, execute effective sourcing, engagement, screening, and behavioural-based interviews that deliver a diverse range of candidates and provide an outstanding candidate experience Possess strong ability to screen, assess, interview, and build relationships within different talent communities in a timely and professional manner Build and maintain market intelligence and a network of talent and potential candidates through previous experience, pro-active research, and ongoing relationships; conduct in-depth interviews of potential candidates, demonstrating ability to anticipate manager requirements through high interview-to-offer ratios Display confidence to work with metrics and reporting to establish recruitment updates and insight to ensure hiring is effective and can clearly demonstrate successes versus areas of focus Generate and recommend ideas and strategies related to recruitment that will contribute to the enhancement of hiring processes, implementing changes and new procedures, and fine-tuning standard recruiting processes that fit within the client's mission Contribute to or lead projects designed to implement change initiatives and enhance delivery Articulate in writing a plan with deliverables, timelines, formal tracking, and reporting results Promote continuous improvement of talent acquisition methods and processes What we are looking for: Passion for talent acquisition with an extensive track record of recruiting hard to fill roles Expert understanding of talent networks and recruitment landscapes in Brazil and South America Ability to execute sourcing activities, including but not limited to employer brand promotion, talent engagement and attraction, supporting events and meet-ups, and quality candidate pipeline generation with a significant proportion of direct and passive sourcing Who You Are: Someone who is not satisfied with "just good enough" and is always looking to improve, adapt, and innovate A natural collaborator who loves sharing ideas and learning from others Excellent communicator, both verbally and in writing, able to share complex ideas in a simple, relatable way Fluent in English and Portuguese Are You Still Curious? If you've read this far, then chances are you've got a curious mind—just like us. So, what are you waiting for? Take the leap and apply today. We can't wait to see where your curiosity leads you—and how it will shape the future of the client.

title: Data engineer
description:
Confira a vaga para Data engineer em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Since 1995, Red Oak Technologies has been a trusted partner in the tech industry, delivering innovative talent solutions that drive progress. We specialize in quickly acquiring and efficiently matching top-tier professional talent with clients in immediate need of highly skilled contract, permanent or project management based resources. Remote work is allowed for candidates located within Brazil and are able to work US (CST ) time zone Title: Data Engineer Remote but candidate location in Brazil Overview : Our client is looking for Data Engineers that have Python/Sql and are able to cloud code correctly. Design and implement cloud-based data solutions on platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand data requirements and deliver actionable insights. Ensure data quality, integrity, and security across all systems. Strong proficiency in Python and SQL. Hands-on experience with cloud platforms and cloud-native data services. Knowledge of data modeling, ETL/ELT processes, and data warehousing. Familiarity with data governance, security, and compliance standards. Excellent problem-solving and communication skills. Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Data Science, or related field preferred. Preferred Skills: Experience working within large-scale customer support or service environments. Familiarity with big data tools and frameworks (e.g., Spark, Hadoop). Knowledge of machine learning integration is a plus.

title: Senior golang engineer
description:
Nova oportunidade para Senior golang engineer em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

We are hiring on behalf of our client, a global leader in the meal kit delivery industry that helps millions of customers cook healthy, homemade meals without the stress of meal planning or grocery shopping. As part of Zoolatech's distributed engineering team, you will join the Market Innovation team - a fast-moving internal innovation group focused on building and delivering new product initiatives across multiple domains and services. Unlike traditional product teams, this team operates across different repositories, architectures, and backend ecosystems, taking ownership of complex discovery-driven projects from investigation to MVP delivery. By joining Zoolatech, you will work closely with senior engineering leadership and global stakeholders in a highly autonomous environment that values ownership, adaptability, strong communication, and engineering curiosity. Responsibilities Investigate and understand existing backend services and distributed systems Design and implement backend solutions primarily using Golang Work on MVP delivery from technical discovery through implementation Collaborate with engineers and stakeholders across multiple domains and teams Communicate technical findings and proposed solutions clearly Adapt quickly to new codebases, services, and technologies Contribute to scalable and maintainable backend architecture Skills Required Strong commercial experience with Golang Strong background in backend development, microservices, and distributed systems Experience building event-driven architectures using messaging technologies such as Kafka, Rabbit MQ, or AWS SQS/SNS Solid understanding of testing practices, including unit and end-to-end testing Strong knowledge of relational databases Ability to quickly understand and navigate unfamiliar codebases and services Strong problem-solving and backend investigation skills Good communication skills and ability to work independently English level sufficient for direct communication with international teams Nice to Have Experience with Python Familiarity with Mongo DB, Elasticsearch, Graph QL, or JVM languages Experience working in fast-paced MVP or startup-like environments Engagement Model: Direct Independent Contractor (Please read carefully) This is an independent contractor opportunity based on a direct contractual relationship between Zoolatech and the individual service provider. To facilitate this direct partnership, we engage with professionals who are registered and operate as a sole proprietorship, private entrepreneur, or an equivalent self-employment status in your country. Please note, our model does not accommodate contracts through third-party intermediaries such as agencies, incubators, or umbrella companies. The essential requirement is your ability to enter into a service agreement and invoice Zoolatech directly. This is not an offer of direct employment Please note that only candidates whose profiles closely match our requirements will be contacted.

title: Manager - accounting advisory & financial reporting (capital markets)
description:
Nova oportunidade para Manager - accounting advisory & financial reporting (capital markets) em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

About the Role We are seeking a Manager in Accounting Advisory & Financial Reporting to join our growing team. This role is ideal for an experienced accounting professional with expertise in IFRS, US GAAP, and technical accounting matters, particularly in advising businesses through reporting and compliance challenges. The ideal candidate will have experience in Big Four accounting firms, audit, and accounting advisory services, as well as exposure to multiple industries such as manufacturing, infrastructure, Saa S, retail, and professional services. This role offers an excellent opportunity to gain high-level advisory experience while working with senior leadership and supporting clients through complex accounting matters. Key Responsibilities Provide technical accounting advisory services, including IFRS and US GAAP conversions, financial statement preparation, and complex transaction analysis. Assist in advisory engagements related to financial reporting, internal controls, and accounting policy implementations. Support CFOs, Controllers, and Finance teams with regulatory compliance, GAAP conversions, and implementation of new accounting standards. Conduct research on technical accounting issues and provide recommendations for best practices. Assist in M& A transactions by supporting purchase accounting, due diligence, and post-merger financial reporting. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to improve financial reporting and accounting processes. Mentor and guide junior professionals, ensuring quality service delivery and knowledge sharing. Qualifications & Experience 7+ years of experience in accounting advisory, financial reporting, or external audit. Big Four or global advisory firm experience is preferred. Strong knowledge of IFRS, US GAAP, and other international accounting frameworks. CPA, Chartered Accountant, or equivalent certification is required (or in progress). Exposure to multiple industries (e.g., Saa S, manufacturing, retail, infrastructure) is a plus. Strong problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to manage multiple projects. Excellent communication and client management skills. Bilingual proficiency in Portuguese, Spanish, or English is a plus.

title: Senior it technical recruiter – latam based
description:
Empresa está contratando Senior it technical recruiter – latam based em boa vista. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Aptonet Inc. is seeking experienced Senior IT Technical Recruiters to join our world-class recruiting team. This role is based in Latin America (LATAM) and will focus on sourcing, screening, and placing top technical talent. You will recruit LATAM-based candidates for U. S.-based companies and also support U. S.-based recruiting efforts for our U. S. clients. Our recruiting team builds the foundation of our clients' success by connecting them with extraordinary talent who share our vision and values. What We Look For 3-5+ years of full-cycle recruiting experience, ideally in an agency setting or a high-growth tech environment. Proven experience recruiting for diverse Information Technology roles. Understanding of technology trends and a passion for working with technical professionals. Strong ability to multi-task, manage multiple roles, and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment. Excellent communication skills – both written and verbal – in English; Spanish and/or Portuguese is a plus. High level of professionalism, integrity, and customer service focus. Proficiency with tools such as Microsoft Word, Excel, Outlook, and modern ATS systems. What You'll Be Doing Manage the end-to-end recruitment process, including sourcing, screening, interviews, feedback, offers, and onboarding. Build strong pipelines of both LATAM and U. S.-based technical candidates using creative sourcing strategies. Leverage a variety of sourcing tools, including internet research, Boolean search strings, Linked In, ATS mining, and cold calling. Evaluate applicants by comparing qualifications to job requirements and conducting initial screening interviews. Post job advertisements across relevant platforms such as Linked In, Dice, Career Builder, and niche tech sites. Partner closely with hiring managers and internal teams to understand role requirements and deliver top candidates quickly. Maintain data accuracy in the ATS and track recruiting metrics for reporting and continuous improvement. Develop scalable recruiting processes to support the growth of our recruiting operations in LATAM and the U. S. Act as a trusted representative of Aptonet, promoting our values and delivering a high-quality experience to both candidates and clients.

title: Analista de integração de sistemas
description:
Nova oportunidade para Analista de integração de sistemas em rio branco. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Analista de Integração | CLT | 100% Home Office Sobre nós A Control i D é uma indústria brasileira, especializada no desenvolvimento de relógio de ponto, controle de acesso e equipamentos para automação comercial. Aqui você terá a chance de criar soluções que conectam +300 mil dispositivos Io T e impactam +1 milhão de usuários ativos, em um ambiente que valoriza inovação e liberdade tecnológica. Resumo da posição Na posição de Analista de Integração você será responsável por auxiliar nossos clientes na integração de nossas soluções, seja envolvendo a operação de nossos equipamentos pela sua API, Driver ou DLL, seja envolvendo o uso da API do RHID ou i DSecure Cloud, primando pela celeridade e na excelência no atendimento das demandas de suporte de integração. Também atuará junto à Engenharia no reporte de problemas e abertura de bugs, além de auxiliar na validação e execução de testes funcionais de novos recursos e releases de firmware. Requisitos • Ensino superior cursando ou completo em áreas correlatas (Engenharia da Computação, Análise e Desenvolvimento de Sistemas, etc); Conhecimentos gerais da API de Controle de Acesso, i DSecure Cloud, Ponto (REP i DClass e RHID); • Conhecimentos gerais de ESC/POS para suporte com Print i D/Print i D Touch; • Habilidades com SQL, lógica e linguagens de programação (Python, PHP, Java, C#/. Net, etc), para dar assistência em dúvidas de programação e integração. Benefícios CLT, 100% home office VR ou VA de R$ 32/dia útil Plano de Saúde Amil sem desconto em folha (apenas taxa de coparticipação. OBS - válido apenas para o titular) Seguro de vida em grupo Totalpass PLR de até 1 salário em função da categoria do sindicato Acesso ao pacote de cursos do Linked In Learning de forma gratuita (com direito a emissão de certificados)

title: Designer (pleno/sênior) - banco de talentos
description:
Confira a vaga para Designer (pleno/sênior) - banco de talentos em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Quem somos: A Studio Rx é uma empresa de produção global digital, criada para as necessidades exclusivas das marcas de saúde. Como Hub de produção da IPG Health, o Studio RX apoia a rede global de agências do grupo, tendo como pilares principais a qualidade e eficiência. O seu papel: Como Designer Pleno, você será responsável pela execução técnica de diversas peças de marketing para múltiplos canais (Digital e Impresso). Também deverá trabalhar de forma colaborativa e proativa com os diretores de arte e designers em um ambiente de trabalho multifacetado, com ritmo acelerado e orientado a prazos. Suas responsabilidades: Criação, desdobramento e ajustes de materiais digitais e impressos com base em conceitos aprovados (. PSDs em camadas,. INDD, arquivos PDF interativos e preparação de arquivos digitais de acordo com as especificações do desenvolvedor). Realizar redimensionamentos e adaptações de peças digitais e impressas. Redesenhar materiais com base em Guias de Marca e estilo. Criar arquivos finais e documentos que estejam prontos para impressão. Executar as demandas de acordo com o direcionamento de prioridades e garantir que a execução é feita no tempo necessário com a maior assertividade possível, diminuindo rodadas de ajustes. Participar de treinamentos para entender processos e metodologias de trabalho. Requisitos necessários: Bacharelado em Design Gráfico, Desenho Industrial ou áreas correlatas. + de 2 anos atuando na área de Design. Conhecimento completo de Adobe in Design, Ilustrador e Photoshop. Aqui você encontra um ambiente diverso, colaborativo e inclusivo que promove o desenvolvimento por meio das conexões humanas! title: Médico endocrinologista (rqe)
description:
Empresa está contratando Médico endocrinologista (rqe) em boa vista. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

*OPORTUNIDADE PARA MÉDICO ENDOCRINOLOGISTA (com RQE) NA TELADOC HEALTH\" Junte-se à Nossa Equipe de Saúde Digital! A Teladoc Health, líder global em saúde digital e inovação em cuidados de saúde, está buscando Médicas e Médicos Especialistas em Endocrinologia! Se você é um profissional comprometido com a excelência no atendimento ao paciente e deseja fazer parte de uma revolução na prestação de serviços de saúde, esta é a oportunidade que você estava esperando. *SOBRE A TELADOC HEALTH:* A Teladoc Health está na vanguarda da transformação da saúde, oferecendo acesso rápido, conveniente e confiável a serviços de saúde através de nossa plataforma digital. Nossa missão é tornar o cuidado de saúde acessível a todos, em qualquer lugar e a qualquer momento. Combinando tecnologia de ponta e conhecimento médico, estamos moldando o futuro da saúde e proporcionando impacto positivo na vida de milhões de pessoas. *O QUE PROCURAMOS:* Você será responsável por realizar consultas por vídeo e telefone, por intermédio de plataforma do empregador, atendendo na modalidade de consultas de especialidade em Endocrinologia, de forma ética, com abordagem biopsicossocial do processo saúde-adoecimento, integrando ações de prevenção, promoção, proteção, recuperação e educação em saúde buscando alcançar os melhores resultados clínicos; DESCRIÇÃO DAS ATIVIDADES: Fornecer atendimento médico especializado em Endocrinologia de forma remota, através de consultas e avaliações realizadas por meio de plataformas digitais de comunicação. Experiência e conhecimento para o diagnóstico, tratamento e acompanhamento de pacientes com doenças e distúrbios Endocrinológicos. Realizar consultas em Telemedicina sendo capaz de conduzir anamnese virtual para coletar queixas e histórico médico, realizar exame clínico e avaliações à distância, interpretar resultados de exames laboratoriais e de imagem, elaborar diagnósticos precisos, propor medidas terapêuticas e orientações de cuidado, reconhecer sinais de risco e gravidade em Endocrinologia e critérios para encaminhar ao atendimento presencial. Atuar de forma a priorizar a prática médica centrada na pessoa. Elaborar planos de tratamento individualizados, levando em consideração as necessidades específicas de cada paciente. Ser hábil na prescrição de medicamentos adequados para tratar doenças Endocrinológicas. Monitorar o progresso dos pacientes ao longo do tratamento em telemedicina. Realizar ajustes no plano de tratamento, conforme necessário, com base na resposta do paciente ao tratamento. Desenvolver atividades integrais de saúde, incorporando prevenção e promoção de saúde para dar as respostas mais adequadas às necessidades de saúde apresentadas. Atender com elevado grau de qualidade, sendo resolutivo na grande maioria das orientações acerca dos principais problemas de saúde em Endocrinologia. Considerar os valores e preferências pessoais do paciente conjuntamente às melhores evidências científicas e à experiência de manejo clínico para efetivamente promover a melhor prática clínica e os melhores desfechos em saúde para cada indivíduo. Exercer uso racional de recursos em saúde visando a segurança do paciente e a prevenção quaternária, evitando sobrediagnóstico e sobretratamento, que expõe os indivíduos a maiores riscos do que benefícios em saúde. Estimular a participação e a autonomia dos indivíduos e familiares, fortalecendo a aderência a tratamentos e medidas de autocuidado. Documentar todas as interações e informações relevantes dos pacientes em prontuários eletrônicos seguros e confidenciais. Ter capacidade de crítica de sua própria atividade médica, considerando-a em seus aspectos científicos, éticos e sociais para aprimoramento contínuo. Manter-se bem-informado e atualizado, ampliando sua própria competência em relação a conhecimentos sobre riscos em saúde e sobre as medidas mais eficientes para eliminar ou reduzir os riscos relevantes. Respeitar, cumprir e fazer cumprir os ditames do Código de Ética Médica, bem como a Legislação vigente e os regulamentos internos formais da Instituição. REQUISITOS Formação Acadêmica: Obrigatório: GRADUAÇÃO EM MEDICINA RESIDÊNCIA MÉDICA OU ESPECIALIZAÇÃO EM ENDOCRINOLOGIA. Certificações: Registro ativo no Conselho Regional de Medicina (CRM); Certificado de Título de Especialista - RQE (emitido pelo Conselho respectivo) em Endocrinologia. Certificado Digital Ativo reconhecido pela Infraestrutura de Chaves Públicas Brasileira (ICP-Brasil). Experiência: Experiência em atividades relacionadas à atuação em atendimento médico em Endocrinologia, sendo desejável experiência prévia em Telemedicina e Atenção Primária à Saúde; Conhecimentos Específicos para a função: Prestar orientações personalizadas a indivíduos e suas famílias com conhecimentos para o diagnóstico, tratamento e acompanhamento de pacientes com doenças e distúrbios Endócrinos e metabólicos.. Competências Comportamentais: Comprometimento com os pacientes, com ideais e valores da empresa, apresentando postura ética, pontualidade, capacidade de integração com equipe multiprofissional. Outros Requisitos Importantes: Conhecimentos e Habilidades em computação: uso do Pacote Office (Excel, Word, Power Point, Gráficos) e Internet. Familiaridade com tecnologias de telemedicina e uso de plataformas de comunicação virtual é um diferencial desejável. Local de Trabalho: REMOTO IMPORTANTE: MODELO DE CONTRATAÇÃO: Contratação em regime de Prestador de Serviços por contrato Pessoa Jurídica, necessário fazer parte como representante legal ou sócio de um CNPJ ativo. REMUNERAÇÃO E AGENDAMENTOS: a negociar durante processo seletivo. Esta descrição de cargo/atuação tem caráter informativo e pode ser ajustada conforme a necessidade da empresa ou instituição que oferece a oportunidade de trabalho em telemedicina para Médico Clínico/Generalista Residente em Endocrinologia.

title: Senior golang engineer
description:
Empresa está contratando Senior golang engineer em boa vista. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

We are hiring on behalf of our client, a global leader in the meal kit delivery industry that helps millions of customers cook healthy, homemade meals without the stress of meal planning or grocery shopping. As part of Zoolatech's distributed engineering team, you will join the Market Innovation team - a fast-moving internal innovation group focused on building and delivering new product initiatives across multiple domains and services. Unlike traditional product teams, this team operates across different repositories, architectures, and backend ecosystems, taking ownership of complex discovery-driven projects from investigation to MVP delivery. By joining Zoolatech, you will work closely with senior engineering leadership and global stakeholders in a highly autonomous environment that values ownership, adaptability, strong communication, and engineering curiosity. Responsibilities Investigate and understand existing backend services and distributed systems Design and implement backend solutions primarily using Golang Work on MVP delivery from technical discovery through implementation Collaborate with engineers and stakeholders across multiple domains and teams Communicate technical findings and proposed solutions clearly Adapt quickly to new codebases, services, and technologies Contribute to scalable and maintainable backend architecture Skills Required Strong commercial experience with Golang Strong background in backend development, microservices, and distributed systems Experience building event-driven architectures using messaging technologies such as Kafka, Rabbit MQ, or AWS SQS/SNS Solid understanding of testing practices, including unit and end-to-end testing Strong knowledge of relational databases Ability to quickly understand and navigate unfamiliar codebases and services Strong problem-solving and backend investigation skills Good communication skills and ability to work independently English level sufficient for direct communication with international teams Nice to Have Experience with Python Familiarity with Mongo DB, Elasticsearch, Graph QL, or JVM languages Experience working in fast-paced MVP or startup-like environments Engagement Model: Direct Independent Contractor (Please read carefully) This is an independent contractor opportunity based on a direct contractual relationship between Zoolatech and the individual service provider. To facilitate this direct partnership, we engage with professionals who are registered and operate as a sole proprietorship, private entrepreneur, or an equivalent self-employment status in your country. Please note, our model does not accommodate contracts through third-party intermediaries such as agencies, incubators, or umbrella companies. The essential requirement is your ability to enter into a service agreement and invoice Zoolatech directly. This is not an offer of direct employment Please note that only candidates whose profiles closely match our requirements will be contacted.

title: Gerente de loja -gerente de loja | sumaúma park shopping | manaus/ am
description:
Empresa está contratando Gerente de loja -gerente de loja | sumaúma park shopping | manaus/ am em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

A Natura tem por essência a paixão pela cosmética e pelas relações. E é esse cuidado, o nosso jeito de ser e fazer que Só Podia ser a Natura. Fazemos com que os mais de 200 milhões de consumidores que entram nas nossas lojas, se sintam especiais e desfrutem da nossa consultoria de beleza. Se você quer ser Gerente de Loja Natura e fazer parte do dia a dia, da autoestima e dos momentos das pessoas e ainda desenvolver talentos na melhor empresa de beleza PARA o mundo, essa é a sua chance! Confira nossas vagas e venha, do seu jeito, prosperar com a gente! Gerente de Loja - SUMAÚMA PARK SHOPPING Endereço: Avenida Noel Nutels, 1762, no bairro Cidade Nova, zona norte de Manaus - AM, CEP O que estamos buscando? Estamos em busca de um profissional para liderar nossa equipe e operações de loja com cuidado e atenção. Seu papel será fundamental para fidelizar nossos clientes e atrair novos consumidores para a nossa marca. Conectando-se com nossos valores, você garantirá uma experiência diferenciada tanto para os clientes quanto para sua equipe. Procuramos alguém com vívida experiência em gestão de pessoas e resultados, que valorize o desenvolvimento profissional e reconheça o poder da diversidade para gerar valor. O que você vai fazer por aqui? Responsável pelo processo de recrutamento e seleção dos nossos talentos; Responsável pelos processos de gestão de pessoas do seu time de vendedores(as) (controle de ponto, escala de trabalho e etc.); Desenvolver a equipe através de reuniões e treinamentos, mantendo-a motivada e alinhada com a empresa; Aplicar avaliação de desempenho da equipe; Realizar a gestão de indicadores e melhoria de performance dos resultados; Responsável pelo fluxo de caixa da loja; Implementar e manter o Visual Merchandising de acordo com as diretrizes do Marketing da Natura; Responsável pela receita da loja e gestão do inventário; Realizar reuniões mensais de resultado; Conhecer e disseminar a Visão e a Missão da Empresa; Responsável por cumprir com as políticas, regras e normas de Segurança do Trabalho e Saúde ocupacional de seu local ou processo de trabalho; Obedecer todos os regulamentos e procedimentos de trabalho da empresa; Identificar oportunidades de melhoria. Quais conhecimentos e vivências você vai precisar para compartilhar com a nossa rede? Ensino superior cursando ou concluído; Experiência com gestão de indicadores e melhoria contínua; Excel ou ferramentas semelhantes; Vivência com gestão de pessoas e experiência como líder de equipe; Desejável conhecimento em atendimento consultivo; Disponibilidade para trabalhar domingos alternados (1x1); Experiência em vendas e com entrega de resultados; Conhecimento de marketing e VM; Experiência com facilitação de conteúdos; Experiência em operação de loja. Nossos Benefícios Vale Refeição Vale Transporte Assistência médica + seguro de vida Assistência psicológica gratuita Gympass Vale-presente Natura no seu aniversário Produtos Natura com 40% off

title: Veterinary radiologist
description:
Empresa está contratando Veterinary radiologist em rio branco. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Veterinary Radiologist - Remote About Signal PET Signal PET is a pioneering technology company reshaping veterinary medicine through AI-powered radiograph interpretation. Our mission is to provide fast, accurate, and accessible diagnostic insights to veterinarians around the world. Role Overview We are seeking experienced Veterinary Radiologists based in Brazil to join us. In this 100% remote role, you will review AI-assisted radiographic studies, validate findings, and support clinical quality initiatives. This is a unique chance to combine your clinical expertise with innovative technology on a global scale. Key Responsibilities Review and interpret routine small-animal radiographic studies. Validate the accuracy of AI-generated reports. Provide expert insights and feedback on reported cases. Collaborate with veterinarians and fellow radiologists worldwide. Participate in quality control and system enhancement projects. Stay informed on developments in diagnostic imaging and veterinary AI. Qualifications Médico Veterinário with specialization in Diagnóstico por Imagem or Radiologia Veterinária. M. V., MSc or M. V., Ph D preferred. 5+ years of experience in small animal diagnostic imaging. Strong diagnostic and communication skills. Proficient in English (written and spoken). Self-motivated, reliable, and detail-oriented. Comfortable working independently and remotely. What We Offer Fully remote role (Brazil-based). Supportive, international team and culture. Full training provided—no prior AI experience required. A meaningful opportunity to shape the future of veterinary diagnostics. *** IMPORTANT NOTICE *** This role has had to be re-advertised due to candidates not responding to Linked In messages sent to arrange interviews. Please ensure that you check your Linked In messages daily and respond promptly. Failure to respond may result in your application not being considered further. We appreciate your cooperation and look forward to hearing from responsive candidates.

title: Desenvolvedor full stack júnior
description:

title: Web3 & al investment analyst
description:
Empresa está contratando Web3 & al investment analyst em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Web3 DXB is a Dubai-based investment and research platform focused on identifying and scaling high-potential opportunities at the intersection of blockchain, artificial intelligence, and next-generation digital infrastructure. We combine deep market insight with an agile, thesis-driven approach to back transformative technologies shaping the future of finance and the internet. As we expand our investment activities, we are looking for a highly analytical and forward-thinking Web3 & AI Investment Analyst to join our team. This is a fully remote position (Poland-based), offering direct exposure to early-stage deals, market research, and high-impact investment decisions across Web3 and AI. This role is ideal for someone who lives at the edge of innovation — tracking narratives, identifying asymmetric opportunities, and translating complex trends into actionable investment insights. What You'll Be Doing Conduct deep-dive research on Web3 and AI sectors, including protocols, startups, and emerging technologies. Analyze market trends, narratives, and macro developments across crypto and AI ecosystems. Evaluate investment opportunities, including token projects, early-stage startups, and infrastructure plays. Build investment theses and present insights to internal stakeholders. Monitor portfolio performance and track key metrics across projects. Collaborate with internal teams on strategy, deal flow, and market positioning. Stay ahead of industry developments, identifying early signals and high-potential opportunities. What We're Looking For2–4+ years of experience in investment analysis, research, venture capital, or crypto/AI markets. Strong understanding of blockchain, De Fi, tokenomics, and Web3 ecosystems. Solid knowledge or strong interest in artificial intelligence and its investment landscape. Exceptional analytical and research skills with the ability to synthesize complex information. Experience evaluating startups, token models, or market opportunities. Ability to think independently and form high-conviction investment views. Fluent English with strong written communication skills. High level of curiosity, ownership, and performance orientation. Why Join Web3 DXBCompetitive compensation: BRL 560,000 – 770,000 + performance-based bonuses. Remote-first: Fully remote (Poland-based) with flexible working hours. Direct investment exposure: Work on real deals and high-impact decisions. High-growth environment: Operate at the intersection of Web3 and AI — two of the fastest-growing sectors globally. Meritocratic culture: Your ideas and insights directly influence outcomes. Long-term upside: Be part of a team shaping the future of decentralized and intelligent systems. If you're passionate about Web3, AI, and investing, and want to operate where innovation meets capital, we'd love to connect.

title: Fx trader
description:
Confira a vaga para Fx trader em rio branco. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Role Overview We are seeking a highly skilled Emerging Markets FX Trader with deep expertise in African and/or Latin American currencies to join our global trading & liquidity team. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience managing illiquid and restricted FX markets, executing OTC and interbank trades, and designing robust hedging and liquidity frameworks to support high-volume cross-border payment flows. This role requires both strong trading capability and infrastructure expertise, including building and optimizing FX trading systems, hedging engines, and liquidity connectivity with banks, brokers, and OTC counterparties. Key Responsibilities FX Trading & Liquidity Management Manage proprietary and flow-driven FX trading positions across Emerging Market currencies, with a focus on African (e.g., NGN, KES, ZAR, GHS) or LATAM (e.g., BRL, MXN, COP, ARS) markets. Source and maintain deep liquidity relationships with banks, brokers, and OTC desks across relevant regions. Execute spot, forwards, NDFs, swaps, and OTC trades to optimize execution quality and manage currency exposure. Monitor market developments, capital controls, and liquidity dynamics across EM FX markets. Hedging Strategy & Risk Management Design and implement FX hedging strategies to manage corporate or client-driven exposures. Optimize hedging efficiency across multiple liquidity venues including banks, ECNs, OTC desks, and crypto liquidity pools where relevant. Develop models for dynamic hedging, inventory risk management, and spread optimization. Monitor risk limits, Pn L, and exposure across currency books. Trading Infrastructure & Systems Work closely with engineering and product teams to build and enhance FX trading and hedging infrastructure, including: Automated hedging engines Liquidity aggregation systems Smart order routing Pricing and risk management tools Integrate connectivity with banks, ECNs, and liquidity providers via APIs or FIX protocols. Improve execution automation, latency optimization, and real-time exposure monitoring. Market Development Identify and onboard new liquidity providers and OTC trading partners across emerging markets. Build pricing frameworks for illiquid currency pairs and support new corridor launches. Contribute to the development of scalable FX infrastructure supporting global payments and settlement flows. Requirements Experience 5–10+ years of FX trading experience in Emerging Markets. Strong experience trading African or LATAM currencies, such as: Africa: NGN, KES, ZAR, GHS, EGP LATAM: BRL, MXN, COP, CLP, ARS Experience working at: Global banks EM FX trading firms Payment / fintech companies Crypto exchanges or market makers Proven experience executing OTC and institutional-sized FX trades. Technical Expertise Deep understanding of: FX market microstructure in illiquid markets NDF markets and offshore hedging Capital controls and FX regulatory frameworks Hands-on experience building or optimizing: FX trading systems Hedging engines Liquidity aggregation platforms Familiarity with FIX connectivity, API-based trading systems, and algorithmic execution. Skills Strong quantitative and analytical capabilities. Ability to operate in high-volatility and fragmented liquidity environments. Strong network within EM FX liquidity providers and OTC trading desks. Excellent communication and cross-functional collaboration skills. Preferred Qualifications Experience supporting high-volume cross-border payment flows or treasury operations. Experience trading EM FX through both traditional banks and alternative liquidity sources. Familiarity with stablecoin / crypto liquidity markets in emerging economies. Background in building or scaling FX market-making operations. Strong analytical and problem solving skills Ability to operate across global teams and fast paced environments Vision & Mission OSL is the first SFC-licensed digital asset platform in Hong Kong and a Pay Fi innovator. Through stablecoin payments, cross-border settlement and global licensing, we are building the next-generation payments network. Stablecoins have become everyday money across emerging markets and are widely viewed as blockchain's "killer app," with industry focus shifting from token issuance to real-world consumer and enterprise payment adoption. The strongest growth lies in cross-border B2 B payments, where providers embedding stablecoins into corporate settlement flows can capture significant volume and float. Long-term defensibility comes from regulatory licences, banking partners and cross-border corridors. OSL holds or has acquired licences in Hong Kong, Japan, Australia, Bermuda and Indonesia, and is expanding into Europe, Brazil, Southeast Asia and Africa through acquisitions and licence applications. With OSL Pay and Stable X, we embed stablecoin settlement into bank accounts and card networks, support 150+ digital assets, and provide 24/7 fiat–stablecoin conversion. As a regulated pioneer with a startup mindset, we believe the future of payments will be driven by real adoption and scalable deployment, not technology narratives. We welcome builders who are passionate about crypto and payments to join us in shaping compliant, global payment infrastructure.

title: Ai implementation lead (technical pm for agents & agentic / automated systems)
description:
Empresa está contratando Ai implementation lead (technical pm for agents & agentic / automated systems) em rio branco. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Zaigo builds custom AI systems for founder-led, middle-market companies — the kind of businesses with messy operations, real revenue, and legacy software in place. They are thinking about how to leverage AI but don't know where to start. We turn manual workflows and inefficiencies into production AI systems, fast. We are hiring an AI Implementation Lead to own client delivery end-to-end inside a pod structure. You will run 5–10 client accounts at once, with 2–3 senior AI engineers reporting into your pod, and you will be the person the client trusts to get things shipped. Think of this as a principal-level role at a consulting firm: a senior partner sets the strategy and owns the relationship at the top, you own the execution and the day-to-day client trust, and your engineers do the heavy build. You are the person who keeps everything moving, makes the calls, and ships. What you'll actually do Own the client. You'll run discovery calls, scope the work, set expectations, give status updates, manage scope creep, and be the steady hand the client calls when something is on fire. Many of our clients are non-technical executives running real businesses — you need to be able to translate \"we have this messy thing happening in our operations\" into a concrete AI system, in plain English, without jargon. Architect the solution. On a discovery call, you should be able to sketch out a working solution in real time: \"Okay, this is a RAG problem with a chat layer on top, we'll use these 5 specialized agents to handle X, Y, and Z, output formatted to your Excel template, and we'll integrate with your existing CRM via API calls.\" You don't need to write the production code, but you need to know enough to confidently scope it, pick the right framework, point to the right open-source repo, and know roughly what's hard vs. easy. Run the pod. Translate the scoped solution into engineering tasks, hand it off cleanly, unblock the engineers, and review the work. You can't read every line of AI-generated code — nobody can anymore. You're evaluating whether the output is directionally right, whether the UX makes sense, whether the architecture will hold up, and whether it actually solves the client's problem. Strong product intuition matters more than line-by-line review. Prototype when needed. You're a player-coach. You should be comfortable opening Cursor or Claude Code to validate an approach, build a quick demo for a client call, or prototype a tricky workflow before handing it to engineers. You're not shipping production code as your main job, but you can build. Juggle. You'll have ~10 active projects across 5–10 clients at any time. Deadlines slip, priorities shift, clients change their minds. You stay calm, communicate proactively, and keep everything moving. Who you are You have at least 5–8 years of experience in some combination of technical product management, solutions engineering, technical consulting, forward-deployed engineering, or running your own thing. You may have been a founder. You may have been a PM at a fast company who got tired of waiting for engineers and started vibe coding your own stuff. You're technically literate in a hands-on way: you can vibe code, you know the major agentic frameworks (Claude Agent SDK, Vercel AI SDK etc.), you understand RAG architectures, you know when to use a vector DB vs. a graph DB vs. just dumping things into context, you've shipped things using AI tools. You communicate exceptionally well in English, both written and verbal. You're comfortable on a Zoom call with a 62-year-old CEO who has never heard of Loom and explaining to him, patiently, what we're building and why it matters for his business. You have founder-grade ownership. You don't say \"that wasn't in the ticket.\" You don't wait for someone to tell you what to do next. You see the gap, you close it. This role is for you if You can take a messy business problem and produce a clear, shippable architecture for it within a single call. You like running a lot of things at once and you don't drop balls. You're excited about AI-assisted building and you use these tools every day already. You want to work alongside experienced founders and senior engineers, with real ownership and real client exposure, in a fast-growing company. This role is not for you if You want to write production code all day. You're a pure project manager who needs a PRD and a Jira board to function. You're uncomfortable on the phone with non-technical executives. You need a manager to tell you what to prioritize this week. You avoid ambiguity. Location Fully remote. We're focused on candidates based in Brazil with strong daily overlap with U. S. Eastern Time. How to apply To apply, please email (not DM) the following directly to and copy : Your resume A short Loom video (5–10 minutes max, must be a Loom link) walking us through one technical or operational project you personally owned In the Loom, cover: The business problem you were solving Your specific role The technical workflow or architecture at a high level The biggest challenge you solved How you organized and managed delivery We strongly prefer candidates who can explain complex technical systems clearly, concisely, and in plain English. Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.

title: Ai development orchestrator
description:
Empresa está contratando Ai development orchestrator em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Location: Remote Type: Full-Time Reports to: CEO Stack: Type Script, Python, React (Next.js App Router), Node, Postgre SQL, Supabase (Auth + RLS + Edge Functions + Realtime + Storage), Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Anthropic SDK, MCP, Bash, Git Stage: Revenue-generating Saa S, active production users Start: Immediate The Company Fabri Holdings is a dynamic and forward-thinking company that values innovative solutions and creativity. With a commitment to excellence and collaboration, the company provides comprehensive services tailored to the needs of its diverse clientele. Fabri Holdings fosters an inclusive and supportive work culture, encouraging employees to achieve their full potential. We are currently hiring for a partner company that is the operating system for founders building personal brands. They help B2 B founders turn expertise into organic content engines that generate revenue without ads, agencies, or 10-hour content days. They have served 18,000+ founders and built a $15 M/year business on organic content alone. They are now building the platform that powers our done-for-you delivery at scale. The Role You are the engineering quality gate. You direct AI agents through focused task briefs, review every commit, and catch what the AI misses. You think in systems; the agents think in code. Multiple LLMs are run against the same problem; the strongest output is selected. Your job is to ensure what ships is correct, secure, performant, and architecturally sound. Every uncertain decision goes through structured review before approval. The validation layer is non-negotiable. What You Do Review every AI-generated commit. Not \"does it run\" - \"what happens under concurrent load, what happens when an edge function cold-starts, what RLS policy is silently leaking across tenants.\" Architect features as single-task agent briefs: What / Why / Done When / Watch Out For. Scoped, focused, clear. Own the test pipeline. Vitest unit + Deno tests for edge functions + Playwright E2 E. Evaluate whether tests prove behavior or inflate coverage. Diagnose, the agents fix, you verify. Refactor when AI-generated code drifts. Keep the codebase coherent. Own production stability. Read Supabase logs, trace edge functions through RLS, identify root cause, direct the fix. Scale architecture for 10x growth without rewrites. Must-Haves Daily production AI workflow. You ship features where AI wrote the code and you validated it. Not autocomplete. Not casual. Multi-agent, multi-model, structured review. You are the reviewer; the AI is the author. Supabase in production. Postgre SQL with RLS, Auth (email + magic link + OAuth), Edge Functions (Deno), Realtime, Storage. You have been burned by race conditions and you know how to write RLS that is both secure AND performant. Type Script primary. Strict mode. Zod at system boundaries. You understand why compile-time types and runtime validation are different problems. React in production. Next.js App Router, server components, complex state, real-time UIs, large component libraries (shadcn/ui or equivalent). You understand re-renders, memoization, and bundle size as engineering concerns. Python comfort. Our sync engines and integration scripts are Python. You can read, debug, and ship in it. Third-party API integration in production. Stripe, Hub Spot, Calendly, Fathom, social APIs. Webhook verification, idempotency, retries, graceful degradation when an upstream is down. Edge function fluency. Deno or equivalent serverless. Cold starts, execution limits, no in-memory state across invocations. Code review depth. You catch security holes, race conditions, tests that pass without testing, RLS that leaks, cache that serves stale data after mutation. This is 60% of the role. Strong Signals Built or customized AI agent workflows: Claude Code skills, CLAUDE.md configurations, memory persistence, multi-model comparison. Reviewed AI-generated PRs (not AI-assisted human code). Database-level access control in production. Real-time features: Supabase Realtime or Web Sockets, with subscription lifecycle and reconnection handling. OWASP Top 10 fluency. Product Saa S background, not agency or consultancy. Red Flags AI is autocomplete or boilerplate to you. Cannot explain architectural decisions in code shipped with AI assistance. Treats AI as infallible OR untrustworthy. Right stance: trust but verify. Overrides correct AI output on gut feel instead of validated review. Frontend-only or backend-only specialist. The review surface is full-stack. Consulting/body-shop background with no production ownership. No experience with real-time, data-heavy applications. Who This Person Is 3 to 7 years full-stack, weighted toward Type Script + Supabase (or equivalent Postgre SQL stack) and Python comfort. Not a 15-year veteran - we need someone agile and AI-native, not resistant. You understand a production system end-to-end: frontend, edge functions, database, auth, third-party integrations. You don't need to be the deepest expert in every layer. You need enough depth across all of them to catch when AI generates something architecturally wrong, and enough humility to validate before approving. How We Evaluate No 60-minute coding test. We evaluate thinking, reviewing, directing. Bug Triage. Real (sanitized) bug from our codebase. Walk us through diagnosis. Do you read the code? Ask the right questions? Understand what could go wrong beyond the immediate symptom? Cold Code Review. Unaudited file written by an AI agent. Tell us what you see: security, race conditions, RLS leak, stale cache, tests that pass without proving anything. Task Brief. We hand you a feature requirement. Write the brief you'd give an AI agent. Is it clear, scoped, and likely to produce good first-pass output? AI Workflow Conversation. Describe your current AI workflow in detail. What you trust, what you double-check, how you handle uncertainty. What We Offer A founding-level seat. Your judgment shapes the product. Direct CEO access. The most advanced AI development workflow you'll work in: multi-model agent orchestration, AI-generated codebase, structured validation, Claude Code skills + memory. Production impact day one. The product is live. Founders use it daily. Your work ships immediately. A product founders love: 18,000+ served, $15 M/year, organic-only. A process that values getting it right. Speed comes from AI; quality comes from you. To Apply or Refer Send a brief note describing your AI coding workflow and a link to something you've shipped. Include your React + Type Script + Supabase (or equivalent) experience. No cover letter. We read code and we read people.

title: Aem backend developer
description:

GUT is an award-winning global creative network powered by Globant. All services are provided within the framework of Globant's corporate governance, policies, and legal entities, as applicable in each jurisdiction.

title: Professor de inglês
description:
Confira a vaga para Professor de inglês em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Faça parte da comunidade de professores que está transformando o ensino de idiomas no Brasil! Onde os influencers do Brasil fazem suas aulas particulares! A Idioma Independente, referência em inovação no ensino de idiomas, está buscando pessoas proativas, com perfil proativo e fluência em um segundo idioma, que querem ter sucesso no âmbito profissional, para se credenciar como professores e fazer parte da nossa comunidade engajada. Aqui, você não será apenas mais um perfil online: você será parte de uma rede colaborativa com mais de 400 professores e 4.000 alunos que vivenciam nossa metodologia transformadora hoje, além de mais de 1000 professores e 10.000 alunos que já fizeram parte desta história. Nos últimos 12 meses tivemos mais de 22 mil alunos interessados em fazer aulas conosco. Professores novos têm lotado suas agendas em até 30 dias, quando são comprometidos, se comunicam de forma eficaz e tem agenda no horário da noite disponível. *Esta não é uma vaga CLT* O que oferecemos? Capacitação intensiva para melhoria no ensino de aulas de acordo com a nossa metodologia inovadora Acesso exclusivo a uma plataforma com mais de 400 vídeos de treinamento, baseada em uma metodologia que já entregou resultados incríveis, com vídeos totalmente atualizados. Mentorias semanais com especialistas experientes, que já treinaram mais de 1500 profissionais. Plataforma exclusiva para acompanhamento das aulas. Participação no nosso processo de captação de alunos, com possibilidade de ganhos adicionais relevantes, bastando você se interessar. Descontos exclusivos em cursos de idiomas e viagens com a nossa comunidade. Possibilidade de desenvolvimento e mentoria para ser um empreendedor de sucesso (se você quiser). Um banco de aulas com mais de 800 aulas para facilitar o seu processo de construção de aulas. Certificações dos treinamentos feitos dentro da comunidade que garantem que você obterá mais resultados juntos aos seus alunos e que agregam na sua carreira como professor independente. Como saber se você é a pessoa certa para fazer parte da maior comunidade de professores independentes do Brasil? Se você tem grandes ambições para impactar a educação no Brasil, acredita que o ensino de idiomas precisa de inovação, quer otimizar sua agenda de aulas e, ainda, gostaria de crescer como empreendedor, este é o lugar certo para você. Necessário: Maior de 18 anos, fluente em Português e outro idioma. Disponibilidade de ao menos 20 horas semanais para treinamentos, aulas e ações práticas Esta é uma necessidade para obter os maiores retornos que a comunidade pode te proporcionar. Possibilidade de participar em capacitações durante a semana, no turno da manhã ou tarde. Independência para executar atividades, espírito de colaboração e vontade de contribuir para uma comunidade. O diferencial? Aqui você é mais que um professor. Você será parte de uma comunidade de professores no ensino de idiomas, onde o trabalho colaborativo é a base para alcançar resultados de mercado altamente competitivos. Esta não é uma vaga CLT, mas sim uma oportunidade de empreender e ser dono do seu crescimento com total suporte e estrutura de uma empresa inovadora. Você cria laços e relações de confiança com pessoas que realmente se esforçam para te ajudar no seu desenvolvimento, devido ao modelo de negócio inovador que proporciona relações colaborativas e efetivas. Se você tem vontade de fazer diferente e de vivenciar algo novo na sua história profissional, a ii com certeza é o seu lugar. Faça parte da mudança no ensino de idiomas. Junte-se à Idioma Independente e transforme sua carreira e a vida de milhares de alunos! O que eu faço? Recebo capacitação para dar a melhor aula experimental da sua vida Recebo capacitação em nossa metodologia, aprendendo como transformar a vida de muitos alunos, entregando resultado para eles/as Recebo treinamentos e capacitações recorrentes com mentores experientes e especializados Organizo e escolho a minha agenda e os horários que gostaria de ter alunos/as Preparo aulas para os meus alunos/as Dou as aulas para os meus alunos/as Se você quiser ir além, também será possível, basta você se engajar na comunidade e aprender mais sobre todas as áreas do seu negócio. QUANTO EU RECEBO POR ISSO? Se você for somente professor, se dedicando 40h na semana a aulas, você poderá receber até R$4.000,00 por mês. Se você quiser aprender sobre diferentes áreas e se engajar na comunidade, você pode construir uma renda mensal de até R$6.000,00 por mês em aproximadamente 1 ano. Se você realmente quiser crescer e se desenvolver, se dedicando de forma integral junto da comunidade é possível chegar até R$12.000,00 por mês em 2 anos. Tudo isso só dependerá de você, se quiser aprender mais sobre as partes comerciais e sobre como se tornar um mentor/a de professores. Seja diferente, seja independente

title: English teacher with advanced portuguese skills
description:
Empresa está contratando English teacher with advanced portuguese skills em palmas. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Are you a Portuguese speaker who graduated as an English Teacher? We are looking for you! Teach fun English classes online via Zoom from the comfort of your own home! You can set your own hours and teach on the go as long as you have a solid color backdrop, a laptop, good Wi Fi, a webcam, and a microphone. If you love teaching, but dread prepping for lessons and grading, this is the perfect job for you. We provide our teachers with all the lesson materials so all you have to do is show up for class and do what you do best, which is teach! Whether you're looking for a second stream of income or a full-time job, we've got you covered. You can work as little as 16 hours a month up to as much as 30 hours a week. What is a typical day for an Online English Teacher at Latin Hire? You will be scheduled shifts two weeks in advance according to the availability you provide us and we also offer the flexibility of dropping shifts and picking up extra shifts. If you are busier one week, you can drop some of your shifts and have other teachers help you out or if you want to earn more $$ another week, you can pick up extra shifts and help other teachers out. When you are on shift, you log on to our platform and teach the lessons provided as well as write short feedback for the students after class. Simple as that! In short, here are some reasons why you will love working as an Online English Teacher with Latin Hire: Up to 30 hours of shifts available per week! You be your own boss and set your own schedule Work from anywhere (as long as you have good Wi Fi, workspace, computer, webcam, and microphone). Depending on the number of hours you decide to teach and on your schedule, you can earn up to USD 900+ per month. Minimum Requirements: Portuguese as a first language. C1 or C2 Level English Speaker University degree in English Teaching or related area. One year of experience in teaching English as a foreign language. Access to a computer with a reliable, high-speed (at least 2 MB) internet connection. Must pass a criminal background check. Teachers must provide at least ten (10) hours of weekly availability. Who we are: Established in 2003, Latin Hire recruits and manages teams of subject matter experts (SMEs) for online education companies. For over 20 years, our teams have played key roles in the backend of very successful educational startups.
