title: Full stack engineer (pleno) | node.js + react + php
description:
Empresa está contratando Full stack engineer (pleno) | node.js + react + php em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Quem somos? Somos uma healthtech de Ribeirão Preto (SP) que combate fraudes, desperdícios e inconsistências na saúde por meio da Carefy, uma plataforma de auditoria com inteligência artificial. Nossa missão é construir a infraestrutura de auditoria inteligente para um sistema de saúde mais eficiente, econômico e acessível — algo que já colocamos em prática ao apoiar dezenas de planos de saúde no país, como Hapvida, Porto Seguro Saúde e diversas Unimeds. Conheça os valores e como a gente trabalha na Carefy: Fazer acontecer: A gente executa, mesmo sem cenário perfeito. Jogar limpo: Somos transparentes, ética e claros em todas as relações. Desafio move a gente: Aqui, problema difícil não trava, motiva. Buscamos gente curiosa, fuçada e autodirigida, que vai atrás da resposta e faz acontecer. Aprender rápido: Errar faz parte do processo, repetir erro, não. A gente testa, ajusta e evolui com velocidade. Cliente no centro: Se não gera valor real para o cliente, a gente repensa. 2 é maior que 1: Acreditamos em colaboração de verdade, e você não estará sozinho. Feito é melhor que perfeito: A gente entrega, aprende com o uso e melhora rápido. Aqui não é lugar de burocracia ou preciosismo pela perfeição. Qual o desafio? Buscamos uma pessoa para atuar em um momento estratégico da nossa evolução tecnológica. Você terá o desafio duplo de manter e evoluir nossa base atual e, paralelamente, ser uma peça-chave na modernização da nossa arquitetura. Isso envolve a migração ativa de serviços legados para stacks modernas e a implementação de novos padrões de escalabilidade e isolamento de dados. O que você irá fazer no dia-a-dia? A missão dessa vaga é desenvolver e melhorar constantemente a nossa plataforma, garantindo a transição fluida entre tecnologias e mantendo a alta disponibilidade para nossos clientes. Desenvolvimento e Sustentação: Atuar na manutenção e evolução de sistemas existentes em PHP (Code Igniter), garantindo estabilidade e performance. Modernização e Migração: Desenvolver novos serviços, APIs e microsserviços utilizando Node.js (Java Script/Type Script), apoiando ativamente a migração do nosso legado. Arquitetura e Banco de Dados: Participar da modelagem e otimização de bancos de dados relacionais (My SQL). Frontend: Criar e dar manutenção em interfaces responsivas e dinâmicas utilizando HTML, CSS, Java Script (Vanilla e frameworks modernos). Qualidade e Segurança: Escrever código limpo, realizar code reviews, implementar testes (unitários e de integração) e aplicar boas práticas de segurança. Cloud e Dev Ops: Apoiar nas esteiras de CI/CD e interagir com infraestrutura em nuvem (GCP) com foco em eficiência e redução de custos. O que esperamos de você? Pra gente, o que realmente importa é ter match com a nossa cultura, mas, para essa vaga, temos algumas características que consideramos essenciais: Trabalho em equipe: Colaborar de forma transparente com outros desenvolvedores, arquitetos e liderança técnica. Flexibilidade e Adaptação: Transitar confortavelmente entre o legado (PHP) e a nova stack (Node.js), entendendo o valor de ambos para o negócio. Resolução de Problemas: Foco na causa raiz, trazendo soluções criativas tanto em código quanto em arquitetura. Gestão de tempo e Autonomia: Organizar suas entregas com qualidade, cumprindo prazos e destravando impedimentos de forma proativa. Quais são os requisitos? Experiência de 3+ anos em desenvolvimento de software; Experiência de 2+ anos com Node.js e Type Script em produção Experiência de 1+ anos com PHP em produção; Experiência de 2+ anos com Tecnologias Web em produção; Experiência de 2+ anos com Bancos de Dados Relacionais (My SQL), incluindo modelagem; Experiência com filas e mensageria (Rabbit MQ); Conhecimento de frameworks modernos como Nest JS e/ou Next.js; Conhecimento em padrões de arquitetura (Clean Architecture, SOLID); Conhecimento sólido em Git e versionamento de código; Vivência com metodologias ágeis (Scrum/Kanban); Habilidade para trabalhar de forma colaborativa. Será um diferencial: Experiência em migração de sistemas monolíticos/legados para microsserviços; Experiência na sustentação de aplicações escaláveis utilizando Kubernetes e Terraform; Familiaridade com pipelines de CI/CD (Bitbucket Pipelines, Git Hub Actions, Jenkins, etc.); Conhecimentos em Segurança da Informação (OWASP, OAuth2); Conhecimento prático na integração de LLMs (Open AI, Gemini, etc.) e no desenvolvimento de fluxos utilizando AI Agents. O que oferecemos? Modalidade Flexível: Híbrido (para residentes em Ribeirão Preto e região) ou 100% Remoto (para candidatos de outras localidades); Possibilidade de regime CLT ou PJ; 6 dias de folga anuais + folga de aniversário; Bônus de indicação; Bônus de equipe; Se CLT, convênio com Bradesco Saúde e Cartão Flash (VA e VR); Ambiente colaborativo e desafiador; Horários flexíveis; Autonomia para propor e implementar novas tecnologias! Faça parte da nossa revolução na saúde! Dúvidas? Fale com a gente:

title: Senior ml engineer | fully remote | b2b
description:
Confira a vaga para Senior ml engineer | fully remote | b2b em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Fullinfo is looking for a Senior Machine Learning Engineer who enjoys turning messy web data into structured, reliable company intelligence. This is not a research role, management track or career step for people who mainly want to move up. It is a hands on engineering role for someone who gets satisfaction from solving complex data problems properly. About us Fullinfo is a self funded software company building a B2 B company intelligence platform. We continuously crawl the open web and turn unstructured company websites, directories, registries and industry sources into clean, searchable company profiles. The result is a global database where users can search for specific company data and actually get the right answer. The product helps sales and marketing teams search across company data in a way that feels simple on the surface, but is technically complex underneath. Think natural language search, structured filters, company enrichment, relationship detection and reliable classification across many countries, industries and languages. Fullinfo currently works with a compact team of around 11 people, including backend engineers, frontend engineers, UX UI designers, Dev Ops and machine learning specialists. The team is small, international and focused on people who actually build, improve and ship the product. The culture is calm, direct and quality driven. People say what they do and do what they say. There is little room for ego, politics or vague ambition talk. The best fit is someone who is quietly driven, technically strong and genuinely interested in building something that works well. This is not the environment for people who constantly reinvent their profile, chase the next title or need a lot of structure around them. It is a strong fit for stable engineers who know their craft and like working with other people who take quality seriously. Role description As Senior Machine Learning Engineer, you will work on the intelligence layer at the heart of Fullinfo's product. Your work turns raw, noisy and unstructured web content into trustworthy data points. This includes things like industry classification, company maturity stage, tech stack, geography served, corporate hierarchy, entity matching and relationship detection. You will write Python, build and improve ML pipelines, integrate LLMs, evaluate model quality and make sure the system keeps producing accurate results at scale. The stack includes Python, Pandas, scikit learn, Transformers, boto3, AWS Lambda, Sage Maker, S3, ECS, Terraform, Go and Type Script. You will work closely with a small engineering team, but this is not a role where someone tells you every step to take. The direction is clear, the expectations are high, and the work needs to be done properly. You need to be comfortable figuring things out, validating assumptions and improving quality without needing constant confirmation. Your work includes: • Designing and improving models for classification, entity resolution and relationship detection • Working with noisy web scraped data across many languages and formats • Building ML pipelines that run reliably in production • Using LLMs for extraction, enrichment, validation and search related use cases • Working with embeddings, RAG, fine tuning and prompt engineering where it actually adds value • Defining evaluation metrics so model quality is measurable instead of based on gut feeling • Monitoring deployed models and improving them over time • Working with AWS services such as Lambda, Sage Maker, S3 and ECS • Collaborating with backend engineers on production systems and data flows This role is a strong fit for someone who enjoys deep technical problems more than status. Someone who would rather fix a broken classification result than talk about building a team under them. Requirements You bring: • At least 5 years of hands on ML engineering experience • Strong Python skills • Experience with libraries such as Pandas, scikit learn, Transformers and boto3 • Real production experience with ML on AWS • Experience with LLMs, embeddings, RAG, prompt engineering or fine tuning • Comfort working with large scale, messy and semi structured data • Experience with JSON, No SQL data and scraped web content • A strong eye for correctness and data quality • Business level English • The ability to work independently in a small remote team • A stable track record that shows depth, consistency and ownership Conditions • 12 month B2 B contract • Fully remote work (GMT -3), you are allowed to have a 3 hour overlap • Flat structure with direct communication • Production product with real users and real data problems • Strong technical challenge around ML, LLMs, search and company intelligence • Compensation based on senior contractor level The hiring process includes an intro call, a technical assignment and a final conversation with the engineering team. Interested? Apply trough the link and get in touch with our consultant Lars Fullinfo is exclusively partnering with Haystack People for this role. They will support you throughout the process and handle the initial screening, focusing on both your relevant experience and the soft skills that match Fullinfo's needs.

title: Software engineer ii - pleno | genai (clt) - remoto
description:
Empresa está contratando Software engineer ii - pleno | genai (clt) - remoto em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Estamos em busca de uma pessoa Software Engineer Pleno (Gen AI) para compor o time de Tecnologia e mudar vidas com a gente! O Gran é um ecossistema que une educação e tecnologia, que acelera e customiza o aprendizado para diferentes necessidades e momentos e que já impactou mais de 2 milhões de vidas. Temos a plataforma de educação mais acessada do Brasil e fomos eleitos a 5a empresa mais inovadora da América Latina. Hoje, temos 2 verticais principais: a de Cursos Preparatórios e a Gran Faculdade. Adotamos iniciativas tecnológicas para deixar a educação mais inclusiva. Por isso, temos atualmente vários produtos para fazer isso acontecer, como: os audiolivros – com técnicas avançadas de inteligência artificial, criamos um acervo com mais de 28 mil livros convertidos em 110 mil horas de áudio –; o Gerenciador de Estudos, que auxilia no planejamento diário; e os aplicativos para TV e celulares Android e i OS, que funcionam também no modo offline. Recursos tecnológicos e inovação nos acompanham desde sempre e, com o esforço do nosso time, fomos reconhecidos mundialmente pela Amazon Web Services com três cases de sucesso envolvendo Inteligência Artificial, boas práticas, inovação, inclusão e impacto. Acesse nossos cases clicando nos links abaixo: 20 mil horas de vídeo legendadas com mais de 92% de precisão; Recomendação de cursos utilizando Amazon Sage Maker; Audiolivros. Se interessou? Vem ser Gran Lover! Esta vaga está no nosso modelo de trabalho Gran Mundo, sendo 100% remoto. Todas as nossas vagas são no modelo de trabalho CLT. Quer saber mais sobre a gente? Clique AQUI para retornar para a página de carreiras. Responsabilidades e atribuições Aqui você vai: Desenvolver e otimizar pipelines de RAG: Construir sistemas de RAG avançados que consultem múltiplas fontes de dados, como PDFs e transcrições de vídeo, para garantir respostas precisas e com ampla cobertura de conteúdo. Automatizar a avaliação de qualidade: Implementar pipelines de \"LLM-as-a-Judge\" para auditar a qualidade das respostas da IA em escala. Construir a personalização da IA: Desenvolver e implementar sistemas de memória conversacional de longo prazo (usando frameworks como Lang Chain) para que o sistema possa se lembrar do contexto e do históricos de interações. Arquitetar sistemas de múltiplos agentes: Projetar e construir uma arquitetura de agentes especialistas, com um router inteligente que direciona as requisições para o agentes mais adequados. Trabalhar com LLMs: Utilizar e otimizar os mais recentes modelos de linguagem (GPT, Claude, etc.), aplicando técnicas de prompt engineering para maximizar a qualidade das respostas. Contribuir para a vetorização do conhecimento: Apoiar a iniciativa estratégica de \"IA Onipresente\", ajudando a estruturar e vetorizar todo o acervo acadêmico do Gran para torná-lo acessível à IA. Definir contratos de dados: Colaborar com o Desenvolvedores de software para definir as APIs e os contratos de dados necessários para servir os modelos de IA com eficiência e baixa latência. Requisitos e qualificações O que buscamos: Experiência em Engenharia de IA/ML, com foco em IA Generativa e LLMs. Conhecimento e experiência prática na construção e otimização de sistemas RAG. Domínio de Python e de frameworks de IA como Lang Chain, Llama Index e/ou Hugging Face. Experiência com bancos de dados vetoriais (ex: Open Search, Milvus, Weaviate) e de Grafos (ex. Neo4j, Falkordb) Compreensão de prompt engineering, técnicas de avaliação de LLMs e estratégias de redução de alucinação. Experiência com a utilização de serviços de cloud (preferencialmente AWS) para deploy e gerenciamento de soluções de IA. Diferenciais: Experiência na construção de sistemas de múltiplos agentes (multi-agent systems). Conhecimento de ferramentas de observabilidade para LLMs (ex: Lang Fuse). Experiência com \"LLM-as-a-Judge\" para avaliação automatizada. Vivência em projetos que envolvem a ingestão e o processamento de grandes volumes de dados para alimentar sistemas de IA. Informações adicionais Aqui você vai encontrar benefícios como: Saúde e Bem-Estar: Plano de Saúde e Odontológico Sul América com cobertura nacional, custeado em 100% pela empresa. Wellhub (Gympass) ou reembolso de academia. Aplicativo para agendamento de massagem. Convênio com Sesc, proporcionando acesso a atividades culturais e de lazer. Aplicativos Starbem, Avus e Auster: saúde, bem-estar e suporte completo, incluindo assistência psicológica, financeira e jurídica. Alimentação: Vale Refeição ou Vale Alimentação pagos no cartão i Food. Reconhecimento e Incentivos: Auxílio Home Office pago no cartão i Food. PLR de acordo com as regras vigentes. Licença maternidade e paternidade estendidas. Gran Pix - Programa de reconhecimento de projetos com premiações. Auxílio-Creche. Desenvolvimento Profissional: Bolsa de estudos integral para Graduação e Pós-Graduação na Gran Faculdade. Assinatura Ilimitada Gran Concursos gratuita. Gran Academy - Universidade Corporativa para desenvolvimento dos Gran Lovers. Políticas de incentivo ao estudo, promovendo o aprendizado contínuo. Benefícios Especiais: Kit onboarding e equipamentos disponibilizados pelo Gran. Vale Natal em dezembro. Kit Gran Baby, um presente para celebrar o nascimento de bebês na família. M. O. M - Momento Off Mamãe: 1 (um) dia de descanso adicional no ano, a ser definido junto com a liderança direta. Gran Kit Escolar - auxílio material escolar. Auxílio Inclusão - exclusivo para Pc D. Petlove – plano de saúde para os pets da família. Tempo para você: Day Off no aniversário. Seguro de vida. Local de trabalho: Trabalhe de qualquer lugar! Nós estamos em home office, e temos colaboradores espalhados por todo o Brasil! Jornada de Trabalho: 40h semanais Nós valorizamos a diversidade e todas as pessoas são bem-vindas nos nossos processos seletivos. Vem ser Gran Lover!!! A nossa comunicação é feita por e-mail e/ou Whats App. Por isso, não esqueça de deixar o seu cadastro atualizado e fique de olho na sua caixa de entrada e spam. Todo o processo do Gran é feito de forma online e enviamos feedback ao fim de todos os processos. Etapas do processo Cadastro Entrevista com time de Pessoas e Cultura Entrevista com Liderança Contratação DESPERTAR POTENCIAIS, MUDAR VIDAS E CRIAR NOVOS FUTUROS ;) Somos um ecossistema que une educação e tecnologia, que acelera e customiza o aprendizado para diferentes necessidades e momentos.

title: Annotation & review specialist(polish)
description:
Empresa está contratando Annotation & review specialist(polish) em boa vista. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Innodata (NASDAQ: INOD) is a leading data engineering company. With more than 2,000 customers and operations in 13 cities around the world, we are an AI technology solutions provider-of-choice for 4 out of 5 of the world's biggest technology companies, as well as leading companies across financial services, insurance, technology, law, and medicine. By combining advanced machine learning and artificial intelligence (ML/AI) technologies, a global workforce of subject matter experts, and a high-security infrastructure, we're helping usher in the promise of AI. Innodata offers a powerful combination of both digital data solutions and easy-to-use, high-quality platforms. Our global workforce includes over 5,000 employees in the United States, Canada, United Kingdom, the Philippines, India, Sri Lanka, Israel and Germany. About the Role Job Title: Annotation & Review Specialist Employment Type: Freelance / Project-Based Location: Remote (Work From Home) Work Hours: Flexible; minimum commitment of 4–5 hours per day Eligibility: Open to candidates with a High school or above degree Language Required : Polish We are seeking for detail-oriented and quality-focused individuals to join our team as Annotation & Review Specialists. This is a freelance, remote opportunity that offers flexible working hours. The role involves understanding cultural and linguistic nuances, reviewing and annotating data, and following detailed project-specific guidelines to enhance AI performance and accuracy. Key Responsibilities: Perform annotation tasks on images and videos as per project guidelines. Review annotated images and video content to ensure accuracy and quality standards are met. Provide clear and constructive feedback on annotations and identify areas requiring correction or improvement. Follow project instructions, workflows, and timelines consistently. Maintain high attention to detail while handling large volumes of data. Collaborate with the quality and project teams to improve annotation accuracy and efficiency. Required Skills & Qualifications High school or Bachelor's degree in mandatory. Ability to understand and follow detailed annotation guidelines. Basic computer proficiency and familiarity with online tools/platforms. Prior experience in annotation, data labeling, or quality review is an added advantage. What Makes This Role Exciting Fully remote opportunity, allowing you to work comfortably from home. Flexible working hours (4–5 hours per day) to suit your schedule. The chance to contribute to cutting-edge AI and Large Language Model (LLM) training initiatives, shaping the future of language technology. Note: For this role, you are required to complete the Internal assessment and English assessment within two (2) days from the date it is assigned to you.

title: Senior oil & gas regulatory & severance tax accountant
description:
Confira a vaga para Senior oil & gas regulatory & severance tax accountant em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Location: Brazil (100% Remote) Experience Level: Mid to Senior (5+ years) Industry: Oil & Gas (Unconventional Onshore) Role Summary We are seeking a highly analytical Senior Regulatory & Severance Tax Accountant to join our integrated Revenue team. The primary focus of this role is to ensure the integrity of severance tax reporting for Texas and Louisiana operations. You will be responsible for identifying, troubleshooting, and resolving reporting discrepancies that lead to state-issued penalties. This is a technical, hands-on role requiring deep experience in SAP PRA (CA/VL modules) and the ability to bridge the gap between transactional data and state regulatory compliance. Responsibilities Severance Tax Compliance: Lead the end-to-end severance tax reporting process for Texas and Louisiana, ensuring all volumes and values are reported accurately and timely to the respective state agencies. Error Detection & Troubleshooting: Proactively identify reporting errors by comparing state-level data against internal production and valuation records. Utilize the Valuation Control Report (VCR) and specific SAP T-Codes to diagnose root causes of variances. PPA Analysis: Analyze Prior Period Adjustments (PPAs) before posting to understand the ripple effect on the General Ledger (GL), production volumes, and pricing. Ensure all adjustments are justified and accurately reflected in amended filings. Penalty Reduction: Serve as the lead in reducing state-issued penalties through meticulous data validation and the timely filing of amended returns (e.g., Texas G-10/P-5, Louisiana O3). Process Improvement: Troubleshoot systemic process failures and, as needed, document standardized workflows to serve as guides for broader transactional teams. Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work as one team with the Revenue Accounting group to ensure that valuation formulas and owner payment setups are consistent with regulatory requirements. Requirements Minimum of 2 years of hands-on experience in the Check Input (CA) and Valuation (VL) modules. Must have experience booking company-operated revenues and navigating sub-ledger details. At least 5+ years of experience, including experience in Upstream Oil & Gas accounting, ideally focused on unconventional, onshore assets. Proven experience with US (ideally Texas and Louisiana )severance tax regulations, including high-cost gas exemptions and state disposition reporting. Ability to perform deep-dive reconciliations across production, revenue, and tax data sets to identify complex transactional errors. Advanced/Fluent English (written and spoken) is required for coordination with US-based stakeholders. A diagnostic mindset - able to look at a reporting error and trace the logic back through the SAP PRA system to the source data. Capable of managing complex reporting deadlines and independent research in a fully remote environment. Technical Requirements ERP: SAP PRA (CA, VL modules), S/4 HANA (preferred). Reporting Tools: Advanced Excel (Power Query/Pivot), Power BI, VCR Analysis.

title: Technology manager (licensed entities)
description:
Confira a vaga para Technology manager (licensed entities) em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

About Revolut People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day. As we continue our lightning-fast growth, 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work TM. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution. About the role Our Technology team builds the systems and experiences that keep Revolut moving forward. From the infrastructure behind our innovative app to the features used by millions of people around the world, they bring sharp thinking, speed, and a focus on meaningful impact to everything they do. We're looking for a Technology Manager to partner closely with local and global teams across Operations, Product, Risk, and Compliance on technology initiatives. You'll ensure local technology frameworks, systems, and governance align with both group standards and Brazilian regulatory expectations. Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch. What you'll be doing Overseeing the implementation and evolution of the local technology architecture Contributing to the execution of the IT and data strategy Collaborating with global teams on technology transformations and system migrations Supporting IT governance processes, including documentation and reporting for local regulatory requirements Coordinating with internal stakeholders on technology initiatives related to regulatory compliance Helping ensure systems are scalable, reliable, and aligned with group technology standards Supporting operational processes and technology frameworks required for regulated financial entities in Brazil What you'll need 5+ years of experience in technology, IT architecture, or technology governance within financial services or fintech Familiarity with regulatory and security requirements in Brazil, including cybersecurity, outsourcing, operational risk management, and data protection A bachelor's degree or equivalent in a relevant field, such as engineering, computer science, or information systems Great organisational and time management skills Knowledge of IT systems, infrastructure, or technology governance frameworks Solid analytical and problem-solving skills Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills Fluency in English Building a global financial super app isn't enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that's why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D& I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We're doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That's why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard-working team. Important notice for candidates: Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles. • Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don't use any third-party services or platforms for our recruitment. • Always double-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an@ domain. We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process. If anyone does ask you for this, it's a scam. Report it immediately. By submitting this application, I confirm that all the information given by me in this application for employment and any additional documents attached hereto are true to the best of my knowledge and that I have not wilfully suppressed any material fact. I confirm I have disclosed if applicable any previous employment with Revolut. I accept that if any of the information given by me in this application is in any way false or incorrect, my application may be rejected, any offer of employment may be withdrawn or my employment with Revolut may be terminated summarily or I may be dismissed. By submitting this application, I agree that my personal data will be processed in accordance with Revolut's Candidate Privacy Notice

description:

Senior Software Engineer I, L3 Messaging Team (Remote) We're recruiting a Senior Software Engineer I to own the technical direction of a mission-critical messaging platform serving hundreds of healthcare organizations across the United States. THE ROLE Our client is a fast-growing, mission-driven organization transforming patient engagement at scale. They've built the leading platform powering communications for underserved populations, with proven impact reaching millions. Now they're looking for a seasoned backend engineer to lead their Messaging Team technical direction and mentor the next generation of engineering talent. You'll own complex features end-to-end, drive architectural decisions that shape how millions of patient communications are delivered, and share team lead responsibilities with your peers. This is a highly visible, technically autonomous role with direct impact on health equity outcomes. WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR 5+ years hands-on backend engineering with Ruby on Rails at scale Deep experience building, maintaining, and scaling APIs and distributed systems Advanced SQL skills and comfort working with large, complex datasets Proven ability to independently own complex projects end-to-end and mentor junior engineers Data-driven mindset you rely on evidence, not intuition Excellent communicator (especially in fully remote environments) Passionate about mission-driven work and advancing health equity BONUS POINTS Experience with Twilio, RCS, or MMS messaging platforms Familiarity with healthcare compliance (TCPA, consent workflows, carrier regulations) Tech stack: React, Postgre SQL, Google Cloud, Sidekiq Event-driven architecture or high-throughput message delivery pipelines WHAT YOU'LL DO Own and drive the technical direction of key messaging platform features Design and build backend messaging systems (delivery pipelines, consent management, scheduling orchestration, API integrations) Mentor L2 engineers, lead technical design discussions, and set engineering standards Contribute to architectural decisions that shape messaging infrastructure at scale Participate in on-call rotations (Pager Duty) and help improve team processes Work cross-functionally with Product, Customer Success, and Data teams YOUR IMPACT Month 1: Master the platform architecture and contribute to technical design discussions Month 3: Independently deliver complex features with meaningful impact on patient outcomes Month 6: Be recognized as a technical leader driving strategic initiatives across the engineering department

Espera-se domínio de hierarquia visual, organização da informação, escolha adequada de visualizações, simplificação de conteúdos densos e capacidade de comunicar insights de forma intuitiva para diferentes públicos. Requerimentos & Skills: Experiência mínima de 4 anos em Design de Apresentações, com formação superior (bacharelado) em Design, Artes Visuais ou áreas correlatas; Domínio avançado de ferramentas de apresentação, incluindo Power Point, Google Slides, Keynote e Prezi, além de proficiência em ferramentas essenciais do dia a dia, como Word e Excel, para organização, edição e estruturação de conteúdos e dados Possuir conhecimento sólido em Design da Informação e Visualização de Dados, sendo capaz de transformar dados complexos em gráficos, dashboards, mapas e infográficos claros, estratégicos e visualmente atraentes. Espera-se domínio de hierarquia visual, organização da informação, escolha adequada de visualizações, simplificação de conteúdos densos e capacidade de comunicar insights de forma intuitiva para diferentes públicos. Conhecimento em animação e construção de apresentações interativas, utilizando transições e motion design para criar narrativas visuais fluidas, dinâmicas e envolventes Conhecimento em ferramentas de design e edição visual, como Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator e In Design) e/ou Figma, para criação e refinamento de assets gráficos, layouts e materiais de apoio Conhecimento de ferramentas de inteligência artificial (IA) aplicadas à automação e otimização de processos criativos, como Microsoft Copilot, Gemini, Claude, Gamma, Adobe Firefly e recursos de IA integrados ao Photoshop Forte repertório em design gráfico, com domínio de tipografia, teoria das cores, hierarquia visual, contraste, grids/alinhamentos e princípios de composição, além de olhar apurado para criar materiais limpos, sofisticados e profissionais; Excelentes habilidades de comunicação, colaboração e gerenciamento de projetos, com capacidade para atuar em múltiplas demandas simultaneamente; Inglês avançado/fluente. Está preparado(a) para cultivar novas experiências em um time que joga junto e valoriza o melhor de cada um(a)? #VEMSERSTUDIORX -- Consideramos todas as aplicações para nossas vagas sem distinção de gênero, orientação sexual, etnia, cultura, origem, religião, deficiência, idade etc. Acreditamos na construção de um mundo mais diverso, com mais representatividade e livre de preconceitos. Aqui você encontra um ambiente diverso, colaborativo e inclusivo que promove o desenvolvimento por meio das conexões humanas!

title: Rubber engineers, tyre industries
description:
Nova oportunidade para Rubber engineers, tyre industries em palmas. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Company DescriptionSUNSET TIRES CORPORATION LIMITED, established on July 18th, 1988, has a rich legacy in the import, export, and distribution of tires, tubes, wheels, and lubricants. Known for its commitment to quality and service, the company is a trusted leader in the tire industry. SUNSET TIRES has built a strong reputation by delivering premium products to clients worldwide, emphasizing reliability and innovation. Role DescriptionThis is a contract, remote role for Rubber Engineers specializing in the tire industry. Key responsibilities include designing, developing, and testing tire rubber formulations, ensuring quality and performance standards, analyzing raw materials, and modifying processes to meet client requirements. The role also involves collaborating with cross-functional teams to optimize product performance and manufacturing efficiency. Qualifications Expertise in Rubber Engineering, Polymer Science, and Material Development Strong knowledge of tire rubber formulations and testing methodologies Experience in technical analysis and process optimization Proficiency in industry-standard software and equipment for rubber testing and development Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work both independently and collaboratively Excellent written and verbal communication skills for reporting and cross-functional collaboration Bachelor's or higher degree in Polymer Engineering, Material Science, Chemical Engineering, or a related field Experience in the tire or rubber industry is highly preferred

title: Product owner
description:
Nova oportunidade para Product owner em palmas. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Product Owner – Client Onboarding & Customer Success Remote (Brazil-based) | Supporting UK & US stakeholders | 8,000 - 10,000 BRL We're proud to be partnering with an innovative, fast-growing Saa S business that is transforming how organisations deliver professional online auction experiences under their own brand. Following a period of impressive growth, our client is now looking to appoint a Product Owner – Client Onboarding & Customer Success to play a pivotal role in their next phase. This is a unique opportunity to sit at the intersection of product, clients, and operations—owning the journey from signed deal through to successful platform adoption. The Opportunity As Product Owner, you'll take the lead in ensuring new clients are seamlessly onboarded and set up for success from day one. Working closely with senior leadership, engineering, and customer success, you'll help clients quickly reach their first live auction and build long-term confidence using the platform. This is a hands-on, highly collaborative role where you'll: Guide clients through onboarding and implementation Translate real-world client needs into clear product requirements Support ongoing customer success and operational excellence Play a key role in product testing and continuous improvement What You'll Be Doing Owning the end-to-end onboarding journey from sales handover to go-live Acting as a trusted partner to clients, supporting early use and best practice Gathering and defining technical and operational requirements Collaborating with engineering to ensure smooth configuration and delivery Testing new features and ensuring releases are client-ready Feeding real client insight back into the product roadmap What We're Looking For Experience as a Product Owner, Product Manager, or Saa S Implementation specialist A strong track record in customer success, onboarding, or client-facing roles Ability to translate client needs into structured product requirements Comfortable working cross-functionally with technical and non-technical teams Highly organised, proactive, and confident managing multiple stakeholders Exposure to B2 B Saa S, Agile environments, or platform-based products would be highly advantageous. Why Apply? Join a scaling, globally-focused Saa S business at an exciting stage of growth Work directly with an experienced and passionate leadership team Have real influence over product direction and client success Fully remote role with international collaboration Be instrumental in shaping how clients experience and succeed with the platform If you're a product-minded professional who thrives on solving real client problems and driving meaningful outcomes, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Business operations sr analyst
description:
Confira a vaga para Business operations sr analyst em rio branco. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

What is Teachable? Teachable is trusted by creator-educators around the world to grow their impact and income. From online courses and communities to memberships and downloads, Teachable's digital learning products help creator-educators drive meaningful connection and sustainable revenue. With industry-best ecommerce tools, easily toggled on directly within the platform, creators can confidently maximize their earnings, while getting paid directly by their audience. Teachable's unmatched focus on the student learning experience also ensures creators can make a positive and influential impact on their communities—entirely on their own terms. Today, tens of thousands of creator-educators use Teachable to share their knowledge, reaching millions of students around the world. To learn more, visit . Are you ready to join a dynamic, cross-cultural team at an exciting turning point in our company's journey? Now part of the global Hotmart Company portfolio, whose platforms have helped creators earn more than $10 billion, Teachable continues to take the creator economy by storm as a true industry leader. Together, Teachable and Hotmart are delivering market-leading products that prioritize creator control and flexibility, alongside meaningful partnership and support from our team. If you have big ideas, relish the chance to challenge convention, and deeply believe in the power of creators to shape the future, we want you on our team! Your Mission We are seeking a highly analytical and strategic Customer Success Operations Sr Analyst to strengthen our Customer Success strategy and accelerate our go-to-market engine in a rapidly growing Saa S company. You will partner with CS, Finance, Product, Marketing, and Data teams to design scalable processes, implement effective incentives and structures, and ensure execution aligns with business priorities. This is a high-impact role with strong visibility and influence across the organization. Key Responsibilities: Partner with CS and executive leadership to define the go-to-market strategy—including segmentation, sales motions, and revenue growth priorities. Design and continuously refine quota-setting frameworks, territory models, and headcount planning to enable scalable growth. Develop compensation strategies and incentive structures that drive exceptional performance while aligning with company objectives. Build and manage strategic dashboards and frameworks to monitor CS productivity, NRR, Excel/Google Sheets as needed. Translate business questions into analytical projects, delivering actionable insights to guide product focus, market entry, and commercial efficiency. Drive operational rigor through annual/quarterly planning cycles, cross-functional alignment, and performance reviews. Identify and implement process improvements across tools, data flows, and CRM workflows (Hub Spot) to enhance efficiency at scale. Requirements: 3–4 years of experience in Customer Success Operations or Business Operations, preferably within a Saa S or technology company. Strong proficiency in Excel/Sheets and CRM tools (Hub Spot knowledge is a plus) Solid understanding of Saa S metrics and revenue motions (new business, upsell, retention). Excellent communication skills in English (both written and verbal). Proven ability to collaborate cross-functionally and independently lead complex initiatives. Comfortable presenting insights and recommendations to senior leadership. Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Economics, Business, or a related field. Why Join Us? Opportunity to work in a high-growth Saa S environment with global exposure. Direct impact on go-to-market strategy and revenue growth. Collaborative, data-driven, and entrepreneurial culture. Competitive compensation and benefits package. This is a role based in Brazil, and you'll collaborate closely with teams across the U. S. and Brazil. Your work will follow Brasilia Standard Time (BRT), and you'll be hired as a CLT contract employee with compensation in BRL.

title: Vendedor
description:
Confira a vaga para Vendedor em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

VAGA ABERTA – VENDEDOR CLOSER (EXECUTIVO DE VENDAS) Empresa: Target Agrotech Presencial (Contagem - MG) | PJ Fixo + Comissão agressiva + Bônus por metas Sobre a Target Agrotech A Target Agrotech é uma empresa inovadora no setor agrícola, focada em levar tecnologia, conhecimento e soluções práticas para o campo. Nosso objetivo é gerar transformação real através de cursos especializados e estratégias que impactam diretamente o resultado do cliente. Aqui, não "tentamos vender". Sua missão é entender o momento do cliente, identificar oportunidades e apresentar soluções personalizadas que realmente façam sentido. Responsabilidades • Conduzir reuniões com leads qualificados • Realizar diagnóstico consultivo • Apresentar soluções do nosso portfólio • Trabalhar objeções com foco em valor • Elaborar propostas comerciais • Gerenciar o pipeline no CRM • Acompanhar negociações até o fechamento • Garantir um bom relacionamento no pós-venda O que buscamos • Experiência com vendas, principalmente em fechamento • Habilidade em vendas consultivas • Forte poder de persuasão e negociação • Comunicação clara e segura • Perfil competitivo e orientado a metas • Conhecimento em SPIN Selling, Challenger ou Sandler Diferenciais • Experiência com vendas high ticket ou cursos • Vivência no agro ou tecnologia agrícola • Familiaridade com CRM • Formação em áreas correlatas Benefícios • Fixo + comissão realmente agressiva (sem teto) • Alto potencial de ganho (quanto mais vende, mais ganha) • Bônus por metas • Auxílio transporte incluso • Leads qualificados para foco em fechamento • Ambiente com crescimento real Importante Essa vaga é para quem quer performar em alto nível. Se você tem ambição, disciplina e quer ganhar bem de verdade com vendas, essa oportunidade é para você.

title: Médico oncologista genético (com rqe)
description:
Nova oportunidade para Médico oncologista genético (com rqe) em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

*OPORTUNIDADE PARA MÉDICO ONCOLOGISTA GENÉTICO NA TELADOC HEALTH\" Junte-se à Nossa Equipe de Saúde Digital! A Teladoc Health, líder global em saúde digital e inovação em cuidados de saúde, está buscando Médicos e Médicas Especialistas em Oncologia Genética! Se você é um profissional comprometido com a excelência no atendimento ao paciente e deseja fazer parte de uma revolução na prestação de serviços de saúde, esta é a oportunidade que você estava esperando. *SOBRE A TELADOC HEALTH:* A Teladoc Health está na vanguarda da transformação da saúde, oferecendo acesso rápido, conveniente e confiável a serviços de saúde através de nossa plataforma digital. Nossa missão é tornar o cuidado de saúde acessível a todos, em qualquer lugar e a qualquer momento. Combinando tecnologia de ponta e conhecimento médico, estamos moldando o futuro da saúde e proporcionando impacto positivo na vida de milhões de pessoas. *O QUE PROCURAMOS:* Você será responsável por realizar consultas por vídeo e telefone, por intermédio de plataforma do empregador, atendendo na especialidade de Oncologia Genética, de forma ética, com abordagem biopsicossocial do processo saúde-adoecimento, integrando ações de prevenção, promoção, proteção, recuperação e educação em saúde buscando alcançar os melhores resultados clínicos. *PAPEIS E RESPONSABILIDADES* Fornecer atendimento médico especializado em Oncologista Genético de forma remota, através de consultas e avaliações realizadas por meio de plataformas digitais de comunicação. Experiência e conhecimento para o diagnóstico, tratamento e acompanhamento de pacientes com doenças e distúrbios oncológicos. Realizar consultas em Telemedicina sendo capaz de: conduzir anmneses virtuais para coletar queixas e histórico médico, realizar exame clínico e avaliações à distância, interpretar resultados de exames laboratoriais e de imagem, elaborar diagnósticos precisos, propor medidas terapêuticas e orientações de cuidado, reconhecer sinais de gravidade em Nefrologia e critérios para encaminhar ao atendimento presencial. Habilidade em conduzir entrevistas detalhadas e observar sintomas e sinais da especialidade Nefrologia através de videochamadas. Atuar de forma a priorizar a prática médica centrada na pessoa. Elaborar planos de tratamento individualizados, levando em consideração as necessidades específicas de cada paciente. Ser hábil na prescrição de medicamentos adequados para tratar doenças de ordem Oncologista Genética. Monitorar o progresso dos pacientes ao longo do tratamento em telemedicina. Realizar ajustes no plano de tratamento, conforme necessário, com base na resposta do paciente ao tratamento. Desenvolver atividades integrais de saúde, incorporando prevenção e promoção de saúde para dar as respostas mais adequadas às necessidades de saúde apresentadas. Atender com elevado grau de qualidade, sendo resolutivo na grande maioria das orientações acerca de problemas de saúde em Oncologista Genética. Considerar os valores e preferências pessoais do paciente conjuntamente às melhores evidências científicas e à experiência de manejo clínico para efetivamente promover a melhor prática clínica e os melhores desfechos em saúde para cada indivíduo. Exercer uso racional de recursos em saúde visando a segurança do paciente e a prevenção quaternária, evitando sobrediagnóstico e sobretratamento, que expõe os indivíduos a maiores riscos do que benefícios em saúde. Estimular a participação e a autonomia dos indivíduos e familiares, fortalecendo a aderência a tratamentos e medidas de autocuidado. Documentar todas as interações e informações relevantes dos pacientes em prontuários eletrônicos seguros e confidenciais. Ter capacidade de crítica de sua própria atividade médica, considerando-a em seus aspectos científicos, éticos e sociais para aprimoramento contínuo. Manter-se bem informado e atualizado, ampliando sua própria competência em relação a conhecimentos sobre riscos em saúde e sobre as medidas mais eficientes para eliminar ou reduzir os riscos relevantes. Respeitar, cumprir e fazer cumprir os ditames do Código de Ética Médica, bem como a Legislação vigente e os regulamentos internos formais da Instituição. REQUISITOS Formação Acadêmica: Obrigatório: GRADUAÇÃO EM MEDICINA RESIDÊNCIA MÉDICA CONCLUÍDA OU ESPECIALIZAÇÃO EM ONCOLOGIA. Certificações: Registro ativo no Conselho Regional de Medicina (CRM); Certificado de Título de Especialista em Oncologia - RQE (Emitido pelo Conselho do respectivo Estado); Certificado Digital Ativo reconhecido pela Infraestrutura de Chaves Públicas Brasileira (ICP-Brasil); Experiência: Experiência em atividades relacionadas à atuação em atendimento médico em Oncologia sendo desejável experiência prévia em Telemedicina. Conhecimentos Específicos para a função: Competência em prestar orientações personalizadas a indivíduos e suas famílias com conhecimentos para o diagnóstico, tratamento e acompanhamento de pacientes com doenças e distúrbios nefrológicos. Competências Comportamentais: Comprometimento com os pacientes, com ideais e valores da empresa, apresentando postura ética, pontualidade, capacidade de integração com equipe multiprofissional. Outros Requisitos Importantes: Conhecimentos e Habilidades em computação: uso do Pacote Office (Excel, Word, Power Point, Gráficos) e Internet. Familiaridade com tecnologias de telemedicina e uso de plataformas de comunicação virtual é um diferencial desejável. Local de Trabalho: REMOTO Remuneração e Agendamentos: a combinar durante processo seletivo. IMPORTANTE: MODELO DE CONTRATAÇÃO: Contratação em regime de Prestador de Serviços por contrato Pessoa Jurídica, necessário fazer parte como representante legal ou sócio de um CNPJ ativo, bem como possuir CRM do respectivo CNPJ ativo. Esta descrição de cargo/atuação tem caráter informativo e pode ser ajustada conforme a necessidade da empresa ou instituição que oferece a oportunidade de trabalho em telemedicina para Médico Oncologista.

title: Senior backend developer kyc (100% remote worldwide)
description:
Confira a vaga para Senior backend developer kyc (100% remote worldwide) em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we're not just building products, we're pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world's most trusted stablecoin, USDT, relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But that's just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET, our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education: Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution: At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you're passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We've grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job As a senior Backend Developer, you will be a part of the team that works on the development and maintenance of the backend components of multiple services related to the platform. This includes: New Products and Features - Tether continuously strives to create innovative new features in order to provide the most professional experience for customers. These are developed and deployed using agile methodologies, to ensure the user experience remains the best in the industry. Scalability - all backend services that power Tether platform must remain effortlessly smooth, responsive, and real-time for customers as the platform continues to scale to accommodate new user growth. Security - Tether makes Security its most important feature. The Backend Development team is responsible for building all the API services and backend processes with the highest security principles and standard, in order to protect the safety of the entire user base. Responsibilities Work closely with developers, product managers, designers, and other stakeholders to translate requirements into clear, practical architectures. Improve existing core backend services written in Node JS Implement new solutions that interact with different core services through RPC calls Write complex database queries for compliance and financial purposes Requirements At least 5 years of experience working with Javascript/Nodejs. Familiar with microservices architecture Have actively participated in the development of a complex platform Good experience in interacting with databases (My SQL, Mongo DB) Ability to quickly learn new technologies Good understanding of security practices Preferred skills Experience with blockchain integration Comfortable with high-availability concepts Ruby and Rails experience Other technologies of interest: Message queues (Redis), Caches and Job Queues Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: Verify the recruiter's identity. All our recruiters have verified Linked In profiles. If you're unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over Whats App, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending or@ We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

title: Sr. compliance onboarding specialist
description:
Confira a vaga para Sr. compliance onboarding specialist em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

About the Role We are looking for a highly motivated and detail-oriented Senior Compliance Onboarding Specialist to join our growing team at Velafi. In this role, you will be instrumental in managing and enhancing the onboarding and KYC (Know Your Customer) processes for our clients across multiple jurisdictions, with a strong focus on Brazil and Latin America. You will collaborate closely with Sales, Operations, and Compliance teams to design efficient, scalable onboarding frameworks that deliver a seamless customer experience while maintaining strict adherence to regulatory requirements. This position is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced fintech environment and is passionate about balancing compliance excellence with business enablement. Key Responsibilities Contribute to the development, implementation, and continuous improvement of onboarding controls, policies, and procedures to ensure efficiency, scalability, and regulatory compliance. Act as the subject matter expert for onboarding clients operating in Brazil, ensuring alignment with Brazilian local AML/CTF regulations and industry best practices. Perform detailed reviews and analysis of B2 B customer documentation, including Customer Risk Assessments and Customer Due Diligence to support informed onboarding decisions. Partner with Sales, Operations, and other internal stakeholders to provide clear guidance on compliance requirements, enabling smooth client onboarding and expansion into new markets. Advise internal teams on AML risks and regulatory considerations when entering new industries or geographic regions. Conduct background checks, adverse media screenings, and ongoing monitoring of clients and prospects to identify and mitigate potential risks. Support the Compliance function in applying regulatory frameworks across LATAM jurisdictions, ensuring compliant operations in Brazil matters. What We're Looking For Bachelor's degree in Law, Finance, Business Administration, or a related field, with a strong foundation in Compliance. 3+ years of hands-on experience in Compliance, preferably within fintech, digital banking, payments, or financial services environments. Strong knowledge of KYC, AML, CDD, and CRA frameworks Solid understanding of Brazilian AML/CTF regulations Familiarity with international regulatory standards, including BSA, USA PATRIOT Act, and OFAC Ability to evaluate complex customer structures, identify risks, and make sound compliance decisions. Excellent interpersonal skills with the ability to work cross-functionally and communicate complex regulatory concepts clearly. Fluent in Spanish (English is a strong plus). Proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable operating in a dynamic, fast-growing environment with evolving regulatory landscapes.

title: Specialist ai engineer / builder (llm & healthcare) | remote job
description:
Confira a vaga para Specialist ai engineer / builder (llm & healthcare) | remote job em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

The Challenge Every year, the healthcare industry loses billions due to billing failures. We are building the missing link that closes this gap with AI. We are growing fast, with real operations, active customers, and new partners in the pipeline. We are looking for a builder who wants to help turn our current product into a platform with global scale. Why This Role Might Be for You Here, autonomy, ownership, and initiative are part of the daily routine. We are not looking for someone who already knows everything. Not knowing is part of the process. What matters to us is investigative curiosity, strong execution, and a genuine desire to learn. You will work across both execution and strategy: from writing code to helping shape product and technical decisions. This is a role for someone who can propose new models, spot revenue opportunities, and also dig into data manually when needed to make sure the solution is truly accurate. Speed, urgency, and attention to detail are essential to how we build. Key Responsibilities Your mission will be to help lead the evolution of our AI capabilities. Today: Execution and Precision Refine and optimize models already in production using AWS Bedrock, continuously improving accuracy and performance. Validate data, rules, and outputs manually when needed. In healthcare, data quality is non-negotiable. Monitor denial patterns and implement fast feedback loops so the system improves continuously. Tomorrow: Scale and Architecture Help evolve our infrastructure into a robust ecosystem using RAG pipelines and vector databases. Move from a centralized AI solution toward a network of specialized models by context and insurance payer. Contribute to fine-tuning proprietary models using our historical data to create a unique competitive advantage. What We're Looking For Investigative curiosity: You want to understand complex medical billing rules and are motivated to master a difficult domain. Healthcare experience is not required. Bias for action: You move fast, take initiative, and understand that speed matters in an early-stage company. Hands-on coding ability: Solid practical experience with Python or Go, plus experience working with LLM APIs such as Open AI, Anthropic, or AWS Bedrock. Builder mindset: You enjoy creating robust systems from scratch and care deeply about precision, reliability, and business impact. What We Offer Early-stage impact: Be one of the early team members in a fast-growing company and help shape both the architecture and the culture. High-level technical challenge: Work on real business problems using modern generative AI. Strong team: Work with ambitious, high-performing people who care about building something meaningful. Remote flexibility: 100% remote work, open to candidates based in Brazil. Long-term upside: Potential equity participation for people who help build the business with us. Legacy: Your work will leave a real mark on the product, the codebase, and the company's story.

title: Forward deployed engineer (golang)
description:

Location: Brazil Remote Department: Engineering Employment Type: Contract (B2 B) Contract Length: 6 months About YLD: Our goal is to help our clients keep moving forward. We work with them to build the skills and capabilities they need to stay ahead of the competition, and we know our success only happens when they succeed. We're a team of curious, talented people, and we're committed to making YLD a place where great people want to work, grow, and stay. We're a remote-first consultancy specialising in software engineering, product design, and data. Our teams are based across London, Lisbon, and Porto, and we create digital solutions that continue to deliver value long after our work is done. About the role: As a Forward Deployment Engineer at YLD, you'll be part of a client team building innovative products. We're looking for someone curious, passionate, driven, and enthusiastic. You should be skilled in problem-solving and experienced in designing scalable, resilient, and fault-tolerant architectures. You're also an effective communicator and a strong team player. Together with your team, you'll thrive in a fast-paced engineering environment, delivering outstanding results and exciting projects. Your day-to-day responsibilities can look like this: Design, build, and maintain robust backend and infrastructure systems using Golang and Java with contributions across the broader engineering stack Work closely with client teams in collaborative working sessions, explaining technical decisions and translating complex engineering concepts clearly Deploy and manage cloud infrastructure across AWS and GCP using Kubernetes (EKS/GKE), Terraform, and Flux Actively leverage AI-powered tools and workflows to accelerate development, improve code quality, and drive engineering best practices Preferred skills: Strong backend and infrastructure engineering background, with hands-on Golang and Java experience; Experience developing or integrating decentralised systems, data infrastructure, or distributed technologies; Solid command of cloud infrastructure: AWS, GCP, Kubernetes (EKS/GKE), Terraform, and Flux; Actively and meaningfully using AI tools in day-to-day coding practice (not just awareness, but advanced, habitual use); Familiarity with Tiger Beetle, Yugabyte DB, or Red Panda; Experience in fintech, core banking, or regulated financial services environments; Open to occasional travel to London. You should apply if you are: Proactive: You take ownership and move things forward without waiting to be asked; A strong communicator: you express technical ideas clearly, in writing and in client-facing conversations, with full professional fluency in English; Confident presenting: you bring a polished, engaged attitude to working sessions and stakeholder interactions; Focused on quality: you care about doing things properly and hold yourself to a high standard; Pragmatic: you make sensible trade-offs and deliver results in ambiguous, fast-moving environments; A creative problem solver: you approach hard engineering challenges with curiosity and ingenuity; Collaborative: you thrive on working within cross-functional, distributed teams and value others' input. What you'll get in return: The chance to work with a forward-thinking, ethical, and fun group of people and to develop and grow your skills in a fast-moving business Our typical recruitment process: 1st Interview with someone from the Talent team (30/45 mins) Technical Interview with our Senior Developers (1h30) Final chat with our Client Partner (30/45 mins) Get a glimpse of what it's like working at YLD! Check out our Linked In page We're an equal-opportunity employer and value diversity in all its forms. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, pregnancy or maternity, age, marital status, or disability. We also offer a remote-first working environment, with flexible working and work–life balance as standard for all employees.

title: Hardware engineer
description:
Confira a vaga para Hardware engineer em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Hardware Electronics Engineer Be a founding member of Quectel's new LATAM hub in Manaus Location Manaus, Amazonas, Brazil Role Hardware Electronics Engineer – LATAM Level Mid-Level (1-3 years of experience) Type Full-Time, On-Site Languages Portuguese & English required · Spanish a plus About Quectel Quectel is one of the world's leading suppliers of cellular Io T modules, antennas, and connectivity services, with more than 4,000 professionals across 8 R& D centers and 50+ sales offices worldwide. Our technology powers everything from smart meters and connected cars to industrial robots and point-of-sale terminals — quietly enabling billions of devices to talk to the cloud. A New Chapter: Quectel in Manaus This is something special. Quectel is launching a brand-new operation in Manaus, Brazil — and we're building the founding team right now. Hosted at ICT Manaus (Instituto Centro de Pesquisa e Desenvolvimento em Tecnologia de Software), an accredited Science, Technology and Innovation Institution under SUFRAMA's CAPDA framework, this new setup will become Quectel's regional engine for R& D, customer enablement, and ANATEL certification across Latin America. Joining now means more than taking a job — it means shaping a team, a culture, and a way of working from day one. Your fingerprints will be on everything we build here. Learn more about Quectel: Company website — Our history & global footprint — LATAM in action — Furukawa Electric Lat Am customer story (Brazil) Follow us on Linked In The Role We're hiring the founding hardware engineer for Quectel's brand-new Manaus operation. You'll be the first technical point of contact — and the technical voice — for customers across Latin America who are building tomorrow's connected products on Quectel modules: automotive telematics, smart energy, industrial Io T, connected payments, and more. Because this is a new setup, you won't be slotting into someone else's playbook. You'll define how we review designs, how we work with ANATEL labs, how we support customers, and how we train the next engineers who join the team. You'll work hands-on with hardware, sit across the table from customer engineering teams, and partner with Quectel's global R& D centers to bring solutions home for the LATAM market. " Joining a brand-new operation means you're not just doing the work — you're deciding how the work gets done. That's rare, and it's the reason engineers stay." What You'll Do Partner with LATAM customers to understand their products, then design hardware architectures and recommend the right Quectel solutions. Review schematics and PCB layouts in Altium, Cadence, or PADS — and turn your feedback into better, more reliable designs. Get hands-on at the bench: power supply analysis, signal integrity, oscilloscope work, debugging interface and certification issues. Be the trusted technical voice for our LATAM customers — answering tough questions and solving complex problems alongside our global engineering teams. Lead technical discussions with customers and certification labs, including ANATEL homologation activities. Write the application notes, design guidelines, and FAQs that help customers ship faster. Train internal FAE and Sales teams across the region — your expertise will scale across LATAM. Support the project team with BOM preparation for fast, accurate customer quotations. What You Bring Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics, Computer Engineering, or a related field. 3–5 years of hardware design or hardware support experience — bonus if you've worked in customer-facing or FAE roles. Solid grasp of hardware fundamentals: CPU, memory, PMU, system interfaces. Strong skills in power supply design, power sequencing, charging, and power consumption analysis. Comfortable with serial interfaces — I² C, SPI, UART, USIM — for integration and debug. Confident with bench tools: power supplies, multimeters, oscilloscopes. Hands-on with at least one EDA tool (Altium Designer, Cadence, or PADS). Fluent in English and Portuguese; Spanish is a plus. Bonus Points For Experience designing PCBA end-to-end. Deep knowledge of USB 2.0/3.0, USB hub architecture, USB Type-C. Experience with high-speed interfaces: MIPI DSI/CSI, PCIe, SDIO. RF testing experience across cellular (2 G/3 G/4 G/5 G) and Wi-Fi 802.11. Background in PC, mobile, server, or FWA system integration. Prior ANATEL homologation experience. Team leadership or technical mentoring experience. The Tech You'll Work With Quectel's full product portfolio — cellular (5 G/LTE/LPWA), GNSS, smart modules, and antennas. Quectel services — including device certification work for ANATEL and other regional bodies. See it in action — Quectel customer stories from automotive, smart metering, agribusiness, and more. Why You'll Love Working Here Founding-team energy — you're not joining an established office, you're building one. The processes, the culture, the technical playbook — you'll help write it. Real impact from day one — your decisions and designs ship inside products used by millions across LATAM. Backed by a global leader — startup feel, but with the technology, customers, and resources of a 4,000-person publicly-listed Io T company behind you. Direct line to global R& D — work side-by-side with our R& D centers in China, Europe, and North America while staying rooted in Manaus's growing tech ecosystem. Cutting-edge technology — 5 G, LPWA, AI at the edge, smart camera modules, and the next generation of connected devices. Career growth on a fast curve — early team members typically grow into senior technical or leadership roles as the operation scales. Customer-facing exposure — directly shape how leading LATAM brands build their connected products. Competitive package — attractive compensation, benefits, and the stability of a global market leader. Compensation & Benefits Competitive base salary aligned with LATAM market benchmarks. Performance bonus / sales commission structure (role dependent). Flexible meal and grocery vouchers (meal allowance / food allowance). Health insurance with no co-pay. Life insurance. Paid time off. International travel opportunities — HQ visits and global trade shows. Ready to Apply? If this sounds like your kind of challenge, we'd love to hear from you. Send your CV (in English) along with a short note about what excites you most about the role. We review applications on a rolling basis. Apply via: sasha.saini@ | Browse open roles: Quectel is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to building an inclusive team where everyone can do their best work.

A New Chapter: Quectel in Manaus This is something special. Quectel is launching a brand-new operation in Manaus, Brazil — and we're building the founding team right now. Hosted at ICT Manaus (Instituto Centro de Pesquisa e Desenvolvimento em Tecnologia de Software), an accredited Science, Technology and Innovation Institution under SUFRAMA's CAPDA framework, this new setup will become Quectel's regional engine for R& D, customer enablement, and ANATEL certification across Latin America. Joining now means more than taking a job — it means shaping a team, a culture, and a way of working from day one. Your fingerprints will be on everything we build here. Learn more about Quectel: Company website — Our history & global footprint — LATAM in action — Furukawa Electric Lat Am customer story (Brazil) Follow us on Linked In The Role We're hiring one of the founding software engineers for Quectel's brand-new Manaus setup. You'll work on the embedded Linux software stacks running inside Quectel's cellular Io T modules — Qualcomm-based platforms supporting LTE, 5 G, and LPWA technologies — and you'll be the go-to software expert for customers across Latin America. Because the team is being built from scratch, you'll have unusual influence: the tooling, the development workflows, the customer-engagement model, the way we triage and resolve field issues — these are decisions you'll help make, not inherit. You'll collaborate closely with Quectel's global R& D centers while owning the LATAM software story end to end. " You get the depth of an embedded Linux job — kernel, drivers, Yocto — and the rare chance to help build a brand-new operation from day one. That combination doesn't come around often." What You'll Do Design, develop, and maintain software modules for Quectel cellular modems (LTE / 5 G / LPWA) on Qualcomm So Cs. Build and tune Linux-based networking systems for Io T devices and gateways — TCP/IP, sockets, routing, the works. Develop device drivers, daemons, and system services on embedded Linux. Hunt down issues across the full stack — kernel, Yocto build system, middleware, and applications. Use Wireshark, tcpdump, and your debugging instincts to crack tough field and lab problems. Support LATAM customers directly: develop new SW features, debug their issues, maintain the SW stack, and improve our demo applications. Partner with hardware, integration, and QA teams during board bring-up and validation. Contribute to architecture decisions and performance optimization for the next generation of modules. What You Bring Bachelor's or Master's in Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field. 3–5 years of experience with embedded Linux, cellular modem development, or both. Hands-on experience with Qualcomm-based modem So Cs and their firmware. Strong C and C++ skills, with a real understanding of microcontroller/microprocessor architecture. Solid knowledge of Linux internals and system programming. Comfort with the Linux network stack and packet analysis tools (Wireshark, tcpdump). Working knowledge of Linux networking: TCP/IP, sockets, routing. Day-to-day experience with Git and Agile workflows. Strong problem-solving skills and the communication chops to work directly with customers. Fluent in English and Portuguese; Spanish is a plus. Bonus Points For Yocto Project or other embedded Linux build framework experience. RTOS exposure. LPWA experience (NB-Io T, LTE-M) and familiarity with cellular certification. Prior FAE or customer-engineering experience in the LATAM region. The Tech You'll Work With Quectel's cellular module portfolio — 5 G, LTE-A, LTE Cat 1/4, NB-Io T, and LTE-M, all on Qualcomm So Cs. LATAM in production — see the Furukawa Electric Lat Am case study for an example of the kind of work you'll support. Quectel blog & insights — deep dives on cellular Io T, edge compute, and industry trends. Why You'll Love Working Here Founding-team energy — you're not joining an established office, you're building one. The processes, the culture, the technical playbook — you'll help write it. Real impact from day one — your decisions and designs ship inside products used by millions across LATAM. Backed by a global leader — startup feel, but with the technology, customers, and resources of a 4,000-person publicly-listed Io T company behind you. Direct line to global R& D — work side-by-side with our R& D centers in China, Europe, and North America while staying rooted in Manaus's growing tech ecosystem. Cutting-edge technology — 5 G, LPWA, AI at the edge, smart camera modules, and the next generation of connected devices. Career growth on a fast curve — early team members typically grow into senior technical or leadership roles as the operation scales. Customer-facing exposure — directly shape how leading LATAM brands build their connected products. Competitive package — attractive compensation, benefits, and the stability of a global market leader. Compensation & Benefits Competitive base salary aligned with LATAM market benchmarks. Performance bonus / sales commission structure (role dependent). Flexible meal and grocery vouchers (meal allowance / food allowance). Health insurance with no co-pay. Life insurance. Paid time off. International travel opportunities — HQ visits and global trade shows. Ready to Apply? If this sounds like your kind of challenge, we'd love to hear from you. Estamos expandindo nossa equipe em Manaus e buscamos um(a) Advogado(a) focado(a) em Direito Público e Administrativo. O que você precisa entregar (Requisitos): Inscrição ativa: OAB no Estado do Amazonas; Domínio Tecnológico: Conhecimento prático nos sistemas e-SAJ, PJE, EPROC, Projudi, e em softwares de gestão (ADVBOX, CRM); Soft Skills: Escrita persuasiva e direta, alta organização, atenção a detalhes e proatividade inegociável; Diferencial Estratégico: Pós-graduação em Direito Público, Administrativo, Constitucional ou Processo Civil. O que oferecemos: Honorários: A combinar (alinhados ao seu nível de entrega); Formato: Atuação 100% presencial em Manaus/AM; Ambiente de alto desempenho, focado em crescimento técnico e desenvolvimento de carreira ao lado de uma equipe dedicada. title: Consutor funcional sap fi/co sênior
description:

O que buscamos: Sólida experiência (mínimo 8 anos) nos módulos SAP FI (GL, AP, AR, AA, Bank, Fechamento) e SAP CO (CCA, PCA, IO, Product Costing, CO-PA); Domínio comprovado de SAP S/4 HANA Finance, incluindo Universal Journal e impactos de migração/simplificação; Forte vivência em sustentação (AMS) e execução de demandas de escopo fechado; Experiência na construção de propostas técnicas, dimensionamento de horas e refinamento de escopo; Conhecimento em integrações de FI/CO com MM, SD, PS e TRM; Capacidade de orientação consultiva para guiar o cliente em melhorias e processos de negócio; Inglês técnico para leitura e comunicação. Desejável: Experiência em SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud (modelo Fit-to-Standard e Clean Core); Conhecimento em SAP BTP (extensões side-by-side e APIs); Vivência nos segmentos de Energia, Utilities ou Setor Público; Domínio de Localização Brasil e obrigações fiscais integradas ao financeiro; Experiência em pré-venda ou apoio técnico ao time comercial. Venha ser #Megawork e faça parte de grandes desafios!
